[**May 31, 1790:** Under the new constitution, the United States Congress enacted its first copyright law protecting books, maps, and charts for fourteen years, which could then be renewed for fourteen more. This copyright law was based on the British Statute of Anne, but it would be revised continuously to expand copyright protection in the United States. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8e263788a3f54287b1f68836d42ea6ca&_e=SptZUhapEuVq0f1_o9Ooas_f5I-Tb743b36ivU_M-EesePqtvB_jJHMpvfMNMJGCtEam_YEBFjRUQ3DvOjSxD3gMWdTT22tRchifG2EA2Ugsi9WWEfng2rXpKmlsfcHiknEFT5xSuUJi6KVdOsj4wEncgIUETbM2iAvKYRhzY0v30Svt29LZKdv3o4WcHAus8vj1To9WhbRruzioIvO33jwcMDP7LMN3fXBWIhGHpmfvlPSpPxHhdjMiM_pfdana) **Source -[copyright.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8e263788a3f54287b1f68836d42ea6ca&_e=SptZUhapEuVq0f1_o9Ooas_f5I-Tb743b36ivU_M-EesePqtvB_jJHMpvfMNMJGCtEam_YEBFjRUQ3DvOjSxD3gMWdTT22tRchifG2EA2UgIArQs-dBeo5iCGLCPPC0SUilUYdVy1CopcC8m3kQ8jzAgtmliBhKp9sX0dHDCWtlUFHYsRlxgauJg0QB--7KTU9XOmSqlt4PFdN_Npu9QcDaQe1zAPPcU2iOs2cUOM9p3KmuxcjQdsIeQCzdCJmL6)**

[**May 31, 1819:** American poet Walt Whitman was born on Long Island and grew up in Brooklyn in the early nineteenth century. Despite having various occupations throughout his life, he found success and fame with his self-published book of poetry, _Leaves of Grass,_ in 1855. Ralph Waldo Emerson claimed that it was “the most extraordinary piece of wit and wisdom that America has yet contributed.”](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8e263788a3f54287b1f68836d42ea6ca&_e=SptZUhapEuVq0f1_o9Ooas_f5I-Tb743b36ivU_M-EcW4xrNi1s5w2KGScQwP6ykqkB4VHflA9Of9dlsLNvN81ahpydUlBCH1h-z0YvfFj-4EoVH7rgjm_wGppyfgzGFumjJlstMBmogmeZqd6FX0mkx35c3weOiQ2Jlk_srF9CaN28cZ6PPsAP-d7nzkkjYX7jejVOQGNF51FDajFSSvnzmqMDgGqrRm_FqW8wwOEsp9rG-z-FJVHFB34zWixoG) **Source -[poetryfoundation.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8e263788a3f54287b1f68836d42ea6ca&_e=SptZUhapEuVq0f1_o9Ooas_f5I-Tb743b36ivU_M-EcW4xrNi1s5w2KGScQwP6ykqkB4VHflA9Of9dlsLNvN81ahpydUlBCH1h-z0YvfFj-gsig9K8DSWsUbwOK5UTSsMWWzI6FArghRHvJALQrsMYSOkoLNa4VMBTZEG5k_FOuitbIwkTCck3aQlL2FYL_Z_GFiMhNmDY3b7V-OChS5CuvKUph-toEX_5j5ALjstgUFnooctnz3hmXZt_0kq3T2)**

[**May 31, 1889:** The most destructive flood of the nineteenth century was the Johnstown Flood, also known as the Great Flood of 1889. Fourteen miles upstream of Johnstown, Pennsylvania, the South Fork Dam failed, resulting in catastrophic flooding, millions of dollars in damage, and the death of 2,208 people. The Red Cross, led by Clara Barton, undertook massive recovery efforts, and the ensuing lawsuits changed the laws regarding liability and dam structures.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8e263788a3f54287b1f68836d42ea6ca&_e=SptZUhapEuVq0f1_o9Ooas_f5I-Tb743b36ivU_M-Ee8ywtn8n1N6iExDGzM5cHqGq2hI0moYUJuFTQunT27e7MVVBnzkQdXXe6jk8gRh7vVlyNP4OpdGN7TP76djabEQPkTtsdOxAWPGzqxMPdchO1fuioZZt4_m3K3pzrnO37qwGN-pgxCr_JdIr58G51OgDSbq2qlZnzzhl5PpVI5QZrH1kiiZWoIDOqqC31UA5k%3D) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8e263788a3f54287b1f68836d42ea6ca&_e=SptZUhapEuVq0f1_o9Ooas_f5I-Tb743b36ivU_M-Ee8ywtn8n1N6iExDGzM5cHqGq2hI0moYUJuFTQunT27eyClriRLrqV5seEiMzw1Fq3yc3ZfiLOD6Hpr-cRUPa8kOGs-hX25X7DTh-1i8DxVQthmCtfRDPGegZDWWU0bq9MuDdTNGzBNbHQ8myjpBWb-blLACX18p1kTyaMXu33TxbhglLNmK_AbdOhjckjnWPo%3D)**

name: FLIP THE HOUSE FUND
subject: the GOP is out of control, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
we can’t let them get away with this

| **Peter, the House GOP majority is _out of control._**

🔴 They have spent _weeks_ fighting with one another instead of fighting for Americans — _and wasting our taxpayer dollars in doing so!_

🔴 They want to _expand_ access to guns but _limit_ access to books — make it make sense!

🔴 And they’re pouring _millions_ into battleground House races so they don’t lose their majority in 2024!

[**We won’t have a _fighting chance_ at taking back the House if we can’t keep up with the GOP money machine. Our race for Arizona’s 3rd Congressional District is shaping up to be one of the most competitive and expensive . It’s still early but we need to show that our community and the progressive movement is engaged in this race and has the resources to win.
We need you onboard to meet our fundraising goal. This is your last chance before the deadline. Anything you can chip in makes a difference and I couldn’t say thank you enough for the support.

Raquel

body:
| | Hey everybody! Our May fundraising deadline is coming up at midnight tonight. It’s been a tough month across the board, and my team tells me that we’ll need to pick up the pace in order to stay on track. Can I count on your help?

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kbn-2305-fr](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64142106/409107714/760158825?contactdata=ROuike0lAZFOXFHVZZvSpIoGdbWznqQAd/Psu52YrU1raOqHepAun/qYAPvVw3EFHLIOPhr0WRqifCAlk1/M+dKRa4+24vp9FOEY12CYFQo=&amount=10&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_WL_230531_2_4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzdjOTM2NGYtMGYwMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nf0_VrW4U59KliJmLWlSPi5nl8PuwE3ia8xnOtEhdzQ=)

Hitting all of our fundraising goals is crucial, especially with national Republicans and MAGA extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene working (and spending) overtime to keep Michelle Steel in Congress.

**This race is winnable (Biden won our seat in 2020!) but I can’t do this without you. Can you make a donation of $10 to help me win? →** [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kbn-2305-fr](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64142108/409107716/760158825?contactdata=ROuike0lAZFOXFHVZZvSpIoGdbWznqQAd/Psu52YrU1raOqHepAun/qYAPvVw3EFHLIOPhr0WRqifCAlk1/M+dKRa4+24vp9FOEY12CYFQo=&amount=10&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_WL_230531_2_4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzdjOTM2NGYtMGYwMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nf0_VrW4U59KliJmLWlSPi5nl8PuwE3ia8xnOtEhdzQ=)

Kim

| **Democrat Kim Bernice Nguyen is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation.** The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. At just 25, she became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council. name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: The attacks have already started
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
It's crucial that Democrats retake the House majority in 2024 and retire Kevin McCarthy from the speakership. I'll keep this short, Peter.

From continuing attacks on reproductive rights to playing dangerous political games that have put our economy at risk, Kevin McCarthy and the House Republicans have made very clear just how important it is that we retake the House majority next year.

We can win back the House and retire Kevin McCarthy from the speakership, but it is only going to happen if I win my race. Washington's 8th District is a true purple district, and it's clear we have another tough fight ahead of us.

The NRCC has named me a top target, and earlier this month, they launched ads attacking me. In a district as competitive as ours, we can't afford to fall short of any fundraising goal we set. That's why I'm counting on your support.

**Before our end-of-month deadline at midnight, will you chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can afford to help defend this seat and retake the House majority in 2024? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-may23-eom](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64142326/409108267/-1952093294?refcode=em23_230531_EOM5_fnd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230531_EOM5_fnd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=8ec9364f-0f00-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWM5MzY0Zi0wZjAwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GbHn4IjFGUvvLnC-3yf2i18o-KR1l-wwXwp0qy279wE=)**

Thank you,

Kim

clean_body: It's crucial that Democrats retake the House majority in 2024 and retire Kevin McCarthy from the speakership. I'll keep this short, Peter. From continuing attacks on reproductive rights to playing dangerous political games that have put our economy at risk, Kevin McCarthy and the House Republicans have made very clear just how important it is that we retake the House majority next year. We can win back the House and retire Kevin McCarthy from the speakership, but it is only going to happen if I win my race. Washington's 8th District is a true purple district, and it's clear we have another tough fight ahead of us. The NRCC has named me a top target, and earlier this month, they launched ads attacking me. In a district as competitive as ours, we can't afford to fall short of any fundraising goal we set. That's why I'm counting on your support. Before our end-of-month deadline at midnight, will you chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can afford to help defend this seat and retake the House majority in 2024? >> = Thank you, Kim | Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. name: Mandela Barnes
subject: I simply cannot do this alone.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
[**Friend — I'm reaching out to respectfully ask if you can contribute $3 before the Long Run’s end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-may23.KmyRkU&refcode=em230531-1-t45&t=1&akid=4488%2E196590%2Ekug4p_)
Here's why:
Democrats are vulnerable in 2024, in every manner. We are facing Ron Desantis’ and Trump's GOP mega-donor funded presidential campaigns. We hold a slim Senate majority that Republicans will be coming after. And we know that more Republicans will face off against vulnerable House Democrats in an effort to resurrect their lost “red wave.”
Soit is no exaggeration that Democrats are vulnerable in 2024 and that means so is our democracy.
But we have the power to make a difference in 2024 — in races across the country, up and down the ballot. And I’m proud to say we have already done so in Wisconsin’s Supreme Court race.
But I am going to need your unwavering support if we are to continue to back changemaking candidates. Because I simply cannot do this alone.
So I'm relying on this grassroots movement to help us to continue supporting candidates in critical races across the country — whether that be in big races like Colin Allred’s in Texas or small ones, like Lashrecse Aird’s Virginia State Senate campaign.
[**Friend, can I count on you to contribute $3 ahead of our end-of-month fundraising deadline? It would mean a lot if you could chip in today.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-may23.KmyRkU&refcode=em230531-1-t45&t=2&akid=4488%2E196590%2Ekug4p_)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $3](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1272?c0=longrunpac-em-may23.o1BvBT&refcode=em230531-1-t45&t=21&akid=4488%2E196590%2Ekug4p_)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-may23.Us0otA&refcode=em230531-1-t45&t=22&akid=4488%2E196590%2Ekug4p_)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-may23.hjFgdN&refcode=em230531-1-t45&t=23&akid=4488%2E196590%2Ekug4p_)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-may23.bv5qPu&refcode=em230531-1-t45&t=24&akid=4488%2E196590%2Ekug4p_)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-may23.neM_ob&refcode=em230531-1-t45&t=25&akid=4488%2E196590%2Ekug4p_)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-may23.KmyRkU&refcode=em230531-1-t45&t=26&akid=4488%2E196590%2Ekug4p_)
Thank you for being a part of this team and our movement.
Mandela
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-may23.KmyRkU&refcode=em230531-1-t45&t=27&akid=4488%2E196590%2Ekug4p_)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=4488%2E196590%2Ekug4p_). name: Don Huffines
subject: Liberty Report: Corporate Tax Breaks Are Bad for Texans
body:
"If the Governor signs this, the Texas legislature will have done something remarkable: it will have legalized theft."
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-zjltrht-yuddtktydi-p/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjltrht-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## **Liberty Report: Corporate Tax Breaks Are Bad for Texans**
## _" If the Governor signs this, the Texas legislature will have done something remarkable: it will have legalized theft."_
[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjltrht-yuddtktydi-y/) DALLAS, TX, May 31, 2023 -- Texas received an unprecedented amount of your money this year. Taxpayers overfunded the government by $62 billion. This massive surplus should have been returned to all Texans by eliminating the school property tax.Instead, a few days ago, the Texas Legislature passed corporate welfare, which gives tax relief to businesses on your dime. Giving tax breaks to politically connected companies while continuing to raise everyone else's property taxes to pay for the tax breaks is theft.[**My weekly column in the Dallas Express discusses how bad corporate tax breaks are for Texans.**](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjltrht-yuddtktydi-j/) Members of the Texas Legislature that vote for these programs--and governors that sign the bills that allow for them--are aiding and abetting theft. School district property tax abatements should not be renewed.The best economic incentive we can provide businesses (or anyone) is lower property taxes across the board. Texans deserve definitive action that permanently locks in property tax relief and puts Texas on the path to eliminating school M&O property taxes. [Read the latest LIBERTY REPORT](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjltrht-yuddtktydi-t/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of **liberty** , **prosperity** , and **virtue** in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.###
### _Help us advance liberty and prosperity in Texas:_
[Donate](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjltrht-yuddtktydi-h/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjltrht-yuddtktydi-k/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjltrht-yuddtktydi-u/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjltrht-yuddtktydi-o/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjltrht-yuddtktydi-b/) | [ Share ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-fb-zjltrht-yuddtktydi-x/) | [ Tweet ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-tw-zjltrht-yuddtktydi-f/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-zjltrht-l-z)
---|---|---

name: Tina Smith
subject: Last time I’ll ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Your secure giving link inside |
#
Team — Our strength truly relies on the support of the people. This team stopped Donald Trump. You supported my work as we passed some of the most impactful legislation in history. Together, against all odds, we even expanded the Senate majority. It’s not an understatement to say that’s all under threat if Republicans win back the Senate majority. They’ll continue to do whatever they can to divide us, because they know how strong this team is, too. And I will already tell you that the election is going to be close. The hard truth is that our work to continue making progress for every person, regardless of who you are or where you live, _will be determined by a small number of votes._ It’s on us to make sure we do everything we can to win. That’s why our fundraising goals are so important, and why I’m personally reaching out tonight to ask for your help to reach our monthly goal. **Will you make a contribution to protect the Senate majority ahead of tonight’s midnight deadline? I know we can get this done.** **Here’s your secure link to donate:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em-may2023?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64143529/409123375/-210462503?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_EOM_AC60_20230531_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzY4MGM3ZC0xMzAwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=niz-KJ-UlAxNJNYF3qxJH3eIbSGf5iIWMkA6NAFAMJE=)** Always grateful for your support, Tina

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Last chance:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Just a few hours left
#
Peter, I apologize for reaching out to you at this late hour, but I have an important ask.
We're at the end of May, and we're facing a fundraising deadline in**just a few hours.**
The MAGA Republicans in Washington are playing political games, obstructing progress, and pushing an agenda that doesn't align with the American people.
Now more than ever, we can't afford to let the hyper-partisan GOP regain control of the Senate. If we are going to win next November, we have to get ready now, and that means hitting our fundraising goals every month till then.
**[Our May end-of-month deadline is fast approaching, and we're still falling short. Can I count on you to pitch in $5 or any amount you can now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64143642/409125373/1572322025?refcode=dd_em_230531_1_t1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTFlYjUzMS0xNDAwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EMax9jIYituT127J5z4Et9LrzF9cSG9pg6j3sHJMP0M=)**

Thank you again for your unwavering commitment.
My best,
Dick Durbin

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Before midnight tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
I’ve always been able to count on supporters like you, Peter — and now I need your help again.
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
Yesterday, our campaign set a goal of raising 500 more donations online before the end of May — **and now, we’re just hours from our deadline and about 50 donations away from hitting our goal.**
I’m so grateful that I’ve always been able to count on supporters like you in times like these. But the clock is ticking and most people have logged off for the day, so I need anyone reading this to help us close the gap. That’s why I’m asking:
**[Can you rush $10 or anything you can afford to our campaign before midnight tonight? Hitting this goal means we’ll have the resources to keep reaching voters with our message and standing up to the GOP insiders doing everything in their power to tear down our grassroots movement.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33640?refcode=em20230531-3201&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3201%2E614464%2E6Y1hDd)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33641?refcode=em20230531-3201&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=3201%2E614464%2E6Y1hDd) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33641?refcode=em20230531-3201&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=3201%2E614464%2E6Y1hDd) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33641?refcode=em20230531-3201&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=3201%2E614464%2E6Y1hDd) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33641?refcode=em20230531-3201&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=3201%2E614464%2E6Y1hDd) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33641?refcode=em20230531-3201&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=3201%2E614464%2E6Y1hDd) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33641?refcode=em20230531-3201&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=3201%2E614464%2E6Y1hDd) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33640?refcode=em20230531-3201&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=3201%2E614464%2E6Y1hDd)
---
When we stay on track with these monthly goals, our campaign has the ability to plan ahead for critical things like scaling up our campaign operation, opening field offices, hiring staff, putting ads on TV, and so much more.
**That’s why we need your help _right now_ , Peter.** Whether you donate $10, $100, or even just $1 — your early contribution helps us keep building the foundation for a winning grassroots campaign.
**[So please, can you help us close the gap on our May goal by rushing a donation of absolutely any amount before midnight tonight? I don’t take a penny from corporate PACs or corrupt mega-donors, so I mean it when I say your support is the only way we’ll be able to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33640?refcode=em20230531-3201&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=3201%2E614464%2E6Y1hDd)**

clean_body: I’ve always been able to count on supporters like you, Peter — and now I need your help again. Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce. Yesterday, our campaign set a goal of raising 500 more donations online before the end of May — and now, we’re just hours from our deadline and about 50 donations away from hitting our goal. I’m so grateful that I’ve always been able to count on supporters like you in times like these. But the clock is ticking and most people have logged off for the day, so I need anyone reading this to help us close the gap. That’s why I’m asking: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: When we stay on track with these monthly goals, our campaign has the ability to plan ahead for critical things like scaling up our campaign operation, opening field offices, hiring staff, putting ads on TV, and so much more. That’s why we need your help right now , Peter. Whether you donate $10, $100, or even just $1 — your early contribution helps us keep building the foundation for a winning grassroots campaign. Thanks for everything, — Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: Kelly (personal)
subject: Final hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Fairness Project
body:
Dear friend,

Sorry for the late message but my team just let me know we are $8,824 of the way to our $10,000 May fundraising goal. With just a few hours to go until midnight, things are looking too close , so I needed to reach out.

The number of campaigns we’re able to support every cycle is a direct result of the amount we’re able to fundraise every year from emails just like this one. And right now, bans on abortion are coming down in nearly half the states across the country, and we’ve already allocated a ton of resources to preserving ballot measures in Ohio.

Your support means we can go on defense to help protect Ohio voters and go on offense to pass more progressive policies like abortion protections, minimum wage raises, paid leave policies, healthcare expansion, and so much more.

With just $1,176 left to go, will you be one of the final donors we need to hit our goal and finish out May strong? I’ve included my personal ActBlue link below that you can use to donate.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/TFPUS-ALL-Email-May2023-FR-May23EOM?refcode=E21606-20230531-EOM4-SL-DeadlineEOM-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/TFPUS-ALL-Email-May2023-FR-May23EOM?refcode=E21606-20230531-EOM4-SL-DeadlineEOM-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=25]

Thank you, friend.

— Kelly

subject: Peter, I need just a moment…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wilson for Louisiana
body:
Peter, thanks to the outpouring of contributions from my supporters, we have made enormous progress towards completing our $13,000 end-of-month fundraising goal. But, Peter, we still need one last push before it's all over.

With only hours to go before our deadline and $975 left to raise, I know one last push can help us clear this hurdle.

Peter, I cannot stress enough how much we need to make the most of moments like this one. It could be make or break for us – especially with the election just months away. So, can you make your first grassroots donation to my campaign before midnight tonight?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sw_rtw_eom2305?refcode=EM_FR_230531eom7_SW_SW_90D_6_NG_B_P1

Thank you for all your help,

Shawn Wilson

name: Tammy Baldwin (iPhone)
subject: I’m grateful
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Before midnight, will you chip in any amount to help defend this seat and our Senate majority?
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=351%2E35263%2EPoK1Jj)

name: dan kildee
subject: I want to reach you before it’s too late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Hi, it’s Dan. I know it’s late, but I need to reach you.

Your support has been crucial to my team for years. We couldn’t have won in 2022 without you.

Now, we’re looking toward 2024 and once again my race will be a bellwether for the rest of the nation. National Republicans have already launched earlier-than-ever TV attack ads to distort my record. And with Michigan being a battleground state for the presidential race and an open U.S. Senate seat, we need to be prepared for our biggest campaign yet.

**That’s why hitting the goals we set out to is already mission-critical. Our grassroots supporters have helped us show our strength before. Can I count on you to do it again? My team still needs to raise $1,000 by midnight tonight.**

Here’s the secure link to give:

**_[https://go.dankildee.com/a/supportdan2023](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64143833/409133056/-630551611?amount=15&source=EM_NBI_DK_20230531_FR_EOM.1.2_0_12MO_candidate_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWJkNjBmYS0xNjAwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rx92QRQh8SDFXxtODNpDk9_y9VH9QIKqk393A1RErd4=)_**

Our district will remain one of the most competitive House races, and holding this district requires around-the-clock organizing. Your donations help to fund and support those efforts.

Thank you so much,

Dan

---

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! name: Shontel Brown
subject: McCarthy’s $100,000 chapstick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
The GOP is playing games when we need to deliver for the people.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64144073/409136459/284133522?refcode=EM_FR_230531Chapstick_N_SB_90DO_5_G_TESTA_logo&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzg5NzFmOC0xNzAwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sCMqnqhHRtArbDziofrzFMs93F2Wxf5NsYLoqU3HFSc=) The audacity of the GOP, Peter.

While Democrats are hard at work ensuring America pays its bills on time, the GOP is off auctioning Kevin McCarthy's used chapstick. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64144074/409136460/284133522?refcode=EM_FR_230531Chapstick_N_SB_90DO_5_G_TESTA_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzg5NzFmOC0xNzAwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sCMqnqhHRtArbDziofrzFMs93F2Wxf5NsYLoqU3HFSc=) With the deadline to raise the debt ceiling looming, the GOP is showing its priorities clearly.

They're willing to kill about **7,500 jobs** in Ohio's 11th congressional district alone. Not to mention the millions across the nation who will lose health care access, the veterans who will lose their disability benefits, and so much more.

And, Peter, it's all because they want to gut support for working families and make it easier for the rich to cheat on their taxes. Well, I won't stand for it.

[**_Will you help me and my Democratic colleagues in Congress send a message to the GOP, that we must deliver for the people, by donating $5 or whatever you can afford today? clean_body: The GOP is playing games when we need to deliver for the people. = The audacity of the GOP, Peter. While Democrats are hard at work ensuring America pays its bills on time, the GOP is off auctioning Kevin McCarthy's used chapstick. = With the deadline to raise the debt ceiling looming, the GOP is showing its priorities clearly. They're willing to kill about 7,500 jobs in Ohio's 11th congressional district alone. Not to mention the millions across the nation who will lose health care access, the veterans who will lose their disability benefits, and so much more. And, Peter, it's all because they want to gut support for working families and make it easier for the rich to cheat on their taxes. Well, I won't stand for it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Onward, Shontel Brown As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Here's how we can defeat Ted Cruz:
| Hey there – we’ll be brief...

Democrat Colin Allred just launched his campaign to unseat MAGA stooge Ted Cruz. _Here’s what's at stake in the toss-up Texas Senate race:_

**If we step up to boost Democrats like Colin Allred to victory,** we can finally end Ted Cruz’s far-right reign AND expand our blue Senate majority. _It’s a win-win!_

**But if we get complacent,** Republicans will use every dark money dollar in their warchest to DESTROY promising Democrats like Colin Allred and tank any chance we have of holding the Senate.

_Remember, we’re defending TWICE as many seats as Republicans!_ That’s why we need a FLOOD of grassroots donations today to stop the MAGA takeover. In a crowded race like this, we need to be organized – in the office, in the streets, online – and Mark's the guy who keeps everything running smoothly. He's also the guy who makes sure we have the resources we need to win. According to our latest numbers, = Like Mark said, there's a lot at stake here, Peter. That's why we're building this grassroots movement for solutions-first leadership in Congress. In unity, Nick Forwarded Message | Hey Peter – I'm Mark Hatton. I just signed on as Nick Melvoin's Campaign Manager, and I'm so excited to join you on the team! We're up against our end of month deadline, when I need to file a report that shows our fundraising to date. Every donation counts in establishing our footing in this crowded race for Congress. = As you know, this is a crowded race. Nick's running against 16 (yes,sixteen) other candidates in the primary, but he's the only one with a track record of putting aside politics and finding solutions. # _**_ New Date June 24th
---
## Learn how to defend yourself
---
|
---
Do you want to learn how to defend you and your family?
Enough is enough, get in the fight today!
Join us to mobilize and unify in order to remediate and reconcile our freedoms with fresh strategies. Tested methods on draining your local swamp Enforcing your constitutional protected rights Putting your public officials on notice Affectively fighting back on government overreach. Be awakened to your identity as one of we the people and how to assert that power. Learn how to write an affidavit and lawful notification letters.
Tony Pellegrino has proven methods to drain the local swamps, win court cases, protecting your children, and protecting your individual freedoms. Derrick Gates has fought on the frontlines for freedom of faith and family for the last two decades. Derrick has successfully lobbied for freedom from the local to the federal level.
June 24th 1pm - 7pm
$40 Advance Ticket / $50 at the door
FOR SEMINAR, Q&A, AND FOOD.

name: NDRC HQ
subject: You won’t be hearing from us again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team, May ends at **midnight tonight** , which means you won’t be hearing from us again before the end-of-month fundraising deadline.

[**_Any donation you can make to the NDRC – even if it’s only $10 or $20 – will go a long way toward helping us reach our goal so we can keep fighting for fairness. Will you pitch in now?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64144247/409141024/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230531_FR_5HH_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzYjQ5MGM3LTE5MDAtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fr2yXyqQx9Ye5CBkwSXK-XmpS0AIhgTDYZLSjhp4Grc=)

Your donation today will help the NDRC: **→ Fight for fair maps** in key states across the country where districts could shift before the next election. According to CNN, enough districts could be redrawn to swing control of the House majority.

**→ Advocate for voting rights** in the face of GOP efforts to pass onerous voter suppression laws and weaken the voting rights act.

**→ Defend our democracy** from fringe legal theories that would hand unchecked power to gerrymandered legislatures and from dangerous election deniers who seek to undermine our system of government.

**_→ ...and so much more!_** **The NDRC is committed to doing everything we can to strengthen our democracy, but we rely on grassroots supporters like you. So please: Will you donate to help power our work?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | Team, May ends at midnight tonight , which means you won’t be hearing from us again before the end-of-month fundraising deadline. = Your donation today will help the NDRC: → Fight for fair maps in key states across the country where districts could shift before the next election. According to CNN, enough districts could be redrawn to swing control of the House majority. → Advocate for voting rights in the face of GOP efforts to pass onerous voter suppression laws and weaken the voting rights act. → Defend our democracy from fringe legal theories that would hand unchecked power to gerrymandered legislatures and from dangerous election deniers who seek to undermine our system of government. → ...and so much more! The NDRC is committed to doing everything we can to strengthen our democracy, but we rely on grassroots supporters like you. So please: Will you donate to help power our work? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = This is the last time we’ll ask before tonight’s deadline. We hope we can count on you. – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Pickup Opportunity (with URD)
subject: re: what Stacy Abrams said
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
Stacey is watching this race >>>>

| |
---
Peter, Did you see what Stacey Abrams said about the Mississippi governor’s race? _"I think that we have an exciting set of elections coming up in Mississippi with Brandon Presley running against a very weakened Tate Reeves... I think it's very important that we pay attention to [Mississippi] and that we invest heavily in their success." - Stacey Abrams_ **The latest poll has this race virtually tied** – but with Republican Tate Reeves announcing a million-dollar ad buy, there’s never been a more important moment to listen to Stacey.** ** [**_Can we count on you to donate to Brandon Presley’s campaign for governor? Split a donation of any amount with United Rural Democrats right now._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64144347/409143790/-1321711562?refcode=230531_bp_split_l1&ms=230531_bp_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjk4NjUzNzUtMWIwMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p8gwDl-IAvC9MJef92YprY0N9J9V1YZ4hmRz0sDnI2Y=) **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64144348/409143791/-1321711562?refcode=230531_bp_split_b1&ms=230531_bp_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjk4NjUzNzUtMWIwMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p8gwDl-IAvC9MJef92YprY0N9J9V1YZ4hmRz0sDnI2Y=)** Stacey has been on the frontlines of organizing the South. She knows just how much work needs to go into this campaign – and how important grassroots fundraising is going to be in November. **That’s why Stacey is personally calling on Democrats to pay attention to and get involved with this race.** Experts are saying this is going to be the most competitive Mississippi election in decades. But Tate Reeves has a massive fundraising advantage – if Democrats don’t step up and pay attention to this race, we could lose all of our early momentum. [**_Will you invest in Mississippi’s success now, Peter? Any amount makes a major difference to this grassroots campaign._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64144349/409143792/-1321711562?refcode=230531_bp_split_l2&ms=230531_bp_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjk4NjUzNzUtMWIwMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p8gwDl-IAvC9MJef92YprY0N9J9V1YZ4hmRz0sDnI2Y=) Thank you, – United Rural Democrats
| United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. **Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?** **[Contribute Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64144350/409143793/1646350971?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=29865375-1b00-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=230531_bp_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjk4NjUzNzUtMWIwMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p8gwDl-IAvC9MJef92YprY0N9J9V1YZ4hmRz0sDnI2Y=)** **[GIVE Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64144351/409143794/1646350971?refcode=emailfooter&recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=29865375-1b00-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=230531_bp_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjk4NjUzNzUtMWIwMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=p8gwDl-IAvC9MJef92YprY0N9J9V1YZ4hmRz0sDnI2Y=)**

clean_body: | | | | They are already targeting my seat... | Peter, My End-of-Month fundraising deadline is HERE and I’m $4,278 short of my $20,000 goal._ I asked my finance team to pull your donor record and I saw this: NAME: Peter MAY EOM DONATION: PENDING SUGGESTED DONATION: $25 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM ON APR. 30 | Unfortunately, the far left is already targeting my seat, even though the election is still a long way off. If they succeed in unseating me, our community will be left without a strong voice in Washington to advocate for our interests. That's why I am asking for your support today. By making a donation to my end-of-month goal, you will help me get a head start on building the campaign infrastructure we need to fend off attacks from the far left and secure victory for our community. Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 P.S. - Peter, PLEASE DON’T WAIT! DONATE NOW and help me reach my end-of-month goal and keep our district safe from the far left. | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \- =

name: Bob Casey
subject: I have to ask one more time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=107%2E552475%2EZELjML)
Peter,
Pennsylvania is one of the most competitive electoral states in the country, and we can’t expect our race to be any different.
Mitch McConnell has already announced that Pennsylvania is one of his top targets — which means we are up against the full force of the GOP establishment.
In a race like ours, we cannot afford to fall short of a single fundraising goal. And right now, we’re coming up short on our end-of-month deadline.
**[Peter, I’m counting on your support tonight. Please pitch in now and help put us over the top of our critical $25,000 goal before midnight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230531-2?refcode=em20230531-2&refcode2=107_552475_ZELjML&akid=107%2E552475%2EZELjML)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230531-2?amount=5&refcode=em20230531-2&refcode2=107_552475_ZELjML&akid=107%2E552475%2EZELjML)**
I go to work every day on behalf of Pennsylvania to fight to make things a little easier on our working families. We’ve achieved important wins for our Commonwealth that will make a difference in the job opportunities in our state and money heading back into people’s pockets.
In 2024, our Democratic majority in the Senate is at risk, and with it the chance to continue our progress. Your early support makes a real difference in helping us get ready for the fight ahead.
**[So I’m asking one more time before the deadline: Will you give $5 or any amount you can to help us reach our goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230531-2?refcode=em20230531-2&refcode2=107_552475_ZELjML&akid=107%2E552475%2EZELjML)**
Thank you for getting on our team early; it means so much.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=107%2E552475%2EZELjML)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=107%2E552475%2EZELjML)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: 3X-Match Expiring (via DLCC.org)
subject: Your 3X-match expiring
body:
This is the last time I’ll email you about our end-of-month deadline. | | |
---
| | **This is the last time I’ll email you about our end-of-month deadline.** But first, here’s where things stand:
* There are **TWO****HOURS** left until our May end-of-month deadline.
* But we’re still **$12,000** short of our critical goal.
* And based on our projections, we need strong grassroots Democrats **in your area** to help us close this gap.

subject: Peter, are you there?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
Today’s the day.

| Peter -- Midnight today is our big May fundraising deadline.

name: Moms Against DeSantis
subject: MAGA moms
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
We would not be reaching out if this was not so important, but tonight is our end of the month deadline [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsagainstdesantis] and we have to share something with you.
Did you know that last year, more than twice as many women in Florida have switched parties from Democrat to Republican than the reverse—that’s over 51,000 voters.
Ron DeSantis has managed to convince women and parents of his lies by positioning himself as “pro-family”.
There is nothing “pro-family” about Florida. The state doesn’t offer any parental leave beyond the federally mandated 12 weeks of job security and Florida has the second-highest number of maternal deaths in the country, behind only Texas.
Groups like Moms for Liberty and Mamas for DeSantis have raised millions of dollars from dark money groups last year and they are planning to do the same in 2024.
Help us stand up to MAGA Moms and chip in what you can because our kids deserve better. We need your help organizing women in Florida and electing more Democratic moms. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsagainstdesantis]
DeSantis is determined to translate his "parents’ rights victory" and movement in Florida onto the national stage in 2024 and we are determined to stand up to his lies.
We are up against a huge movement of MAGA moms with millions of dollars of dark money behind them and we need your help amplifying the truth. With just an hour left until our May fundraising deadline tonight, can we count on you at this critical time? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsagainstdesantis]
RUSH A DONATION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsagainstdesantis]
Thank you for everything!
Simona Grace

name: Goldco
subject: FREE Ben Stein Retirement Guide
body:
It’s no wonder Americans are becoming more and more concerned

| | | **FROM THE DESK OF BEN STEIN**
---
|
---
# **Is Your Retirement At Risk?**
---
| | Rising interest rates. Skyrocketing inflation. Exploding debt. Global chaos. A looming recession. It’s no wonder Americans are becoming more and more concerned about their savings and investments. That’s why I wrote my newest report...
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbcfto7c0ainnmi3kjar5heb9rjllp9ohkovul5o_rp22sh2s8i66o75cdi60o34cjh2bs)
---
| **Protecting Your Retirement From Recessions & Depressions**
---
|
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Will you pledge to be a servant leader for our great nation?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| |
---
| | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTUyLWMyNzBmZGViN2FhMzQwN2Y4NGU3MWQ1OWQ0OGFkODUxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL29mZmVycy5hbWVyaWNhbmNvcm5lcnN0b25lLm9yZy9zZXJ2YW50LWxlYWRlci1jYXJkLXBsZWRnZS8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1lbWJlcnNoaXBjYXJkX3BsZWRnZSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfU1BPMzk1NTMmc291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUNJMjMwNUVQMDA1In0/1N5mQB9owIdACg8EbLJCNQ)
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot,

As you and I know – our freedoms are under attack.

They are under attack from our fellow citizens who see this country and her people as irredeemable.

They are under attack from leaders in government, media, and education who serve only one interest: their own interest.[](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTUyLWMyNzBmZGViN2FhMzQwN2Y4NGU3MWQ1OWQ0OGFkODUxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL29mZmVycy5hbWVyaWNhbmNvcm5lcnN0b25lLm9yZy9zZXJ2YW50LWxlYWRlci1jYXJkLXBsZWRnZS8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1lbWJlcnNoaXBjYXJkX3BsZWRnZSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfU1BPMzk1NTMmc291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUNJMjMwNUVQMDA1In0/S-c-vFC2UEbUuWV0UrFKOw)
These people hold the most dangerous, most extreme, most anti-American beliefs. They have taken more-and-more power away from the people... they are asserting more-and-more control over us.

They tax us, they regulate us, they silence us, they punish us, they remove opportunities from us, they weaken us, and they indoctrinate our children.

It is up to us to rise above as servant leaders committed to upholding the principles that inspired America.

We must set an example as faithful leaders and unite our fellow Americans in an effort to preserve our freedom.

We must be willing to sacrifice, to fight for our freedoms, to not just envision – but to ensure – a strong, prosperous, great America for our grandchildren.

Because if not us, then who will do it? Who will lead?

Today, I’m hoping that you’ll pledge your commitment as a servant leader for our great nation.

They are under attack from our fellow citizens who see this country and her people as irredeemable. They are under attack from leaders in government, media, and education who serve only one interest: their own interest. These people hold the most dangerous, most extreme, most anti-American beliefs. They have taken more-and-more power away from the people... they are asserting more-and-more control over us. They tax us, they regulate us, they silence us, they punish us, they remove opportunities from us, they weaken us, and they indoctrinate our children. It is up to us to rise above as servant leaders committed to upholding the principles that inspired America. We must set an example as faithful leaders and unite our fellow Americans in an effort to preserve our freedom. We must be willing to sacrifice, to fight for our freedoms, to not just envision – but to ensure – a strong, prosperous, great America for our grandchildren. Because if not us, then who will do it? name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Endorsement Announcement!
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| We've all heard the saying, "Elections have Consequences" and Mississippians can attest to the validity of that statement. Within the past few years, we have witnessed our state government transition from Democrat Party-control to a Republican Party-controlled government. Within the first few years, great strides were made to change the direction of our state, but as time passed, our elected Republican leadership has slowly moved away from our Republican principles and toward the old policies that drove our state into last place both educationally and economically.The Mississippi Freedom Caucus was formed by legislators who were determined to stop the slide back into the failed Democrat-party policies of the past and restart our advancement into a prosperous future.To accomplish this goal of more freedom and a better economy, we must elect patriots who are willing to stand and fight for our principles and ideals. The Mississippi Freedom Caucus has spent the past several months interviewing candidates. We have met with many individuals who are seeking office and asked them to complete a lengthy questionnaire and attend candidate training classes. After months of rigorous examination, we are **announcing our endorsements** of candidates seeking election to the Mississippi Legislature. Each endorsed candidate has met our requirements and, once elected, will become a member of the Mississippi Freedom Caucus. The Mississippi Freedom Caucus only endorses candidates seeking election to the Mississippi House of Representatives and Senate because we are a caucus of legislators. While we may support candidates for other positions, like Lt. Governor, we do not officially endorse these candidates. One exception to that applies to members of the Mississippi Freedom Caucus seeking other positions. We are officially endorsing Chris Brown for Public Service Commissioner. Chris served twelve years in the Mississippi Legislature and was a founding member of the Mississippi Freedom Caucus.
---
|
1. [Lauren Smith](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/MHTKJeJOun4FWdU4KCw_FQ) -Senate District 6
2. [Ricky Caldwell](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/FR_EBWip9UwK-1rXI66pIg) -Senate District 9
3. [Alan Sibley](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/KPeZGXaIY89NUzr8IK0VFw) -Senate District 15
4. [Walter Hopper](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/b6hyIHQAOHN_L0fTthwGQQ) -Senate District 19
5. [Jamey Goodkind](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/isCQ4Fz15H3RIpIa1JXnNA)-House District 7
6. [John T. Williams](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/VYyKf270Ar_ARRnVOU0egg) -House District 28
7. [Chris Brown](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/IYnHpGBIdf68-OUbcSnBYw) -Northern District Public Service Commissioner

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Urgent: Me vs. the Machine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
I'm depending on you!
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KAAJw2OHPjR7AX8V7gzPl6xxIoKHJuGXa5RxIx50f_WMBl3-9w9RqXVknn7DGvqkrRYXpY25vl7fmMss8Q7CviKpvQ9uSCEbD6YutJnbeYLNaQ5IKd2ngWrR6E7XSc2T4Xr4rWAo8cZ_H7MAslccPdEeYudS5ukRipGignc0BNc=&c=JKosccaM38NNWbSfRE3pKBiTqWmD9zxi60IYnoO-7_54-NpbR12cmg==&ch=ZkWBNgIdz65oz4T-hTzkBBV-WPYAOa43t3fsMpieRYrHcw6ZIGRoXA==)
---
---
| |
---
| |
---
Election day is right around the corner, and [I NEED Patriots like you on my side.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KAAJw2OHPjR7AX8V7gzPl6xxIoKHJuGXa5RxIx50f_WMBl3-9w9RqXVknn7DGvqkrRYXpY25vl7fmMss8Q7CviKpvQ9uSCEbD6YutJnbeYLNaQ5IKd2ngWrR6E7XSc2T4Xr4rWAo8cZ_H7MAslccPdEeYudS5ukRipGignc0BNc=&c=JKosccaM38NNWbSfRE3pKBiTqWmD9zxi60IYnoO-7_54-NpbR12cmg==&ch=ZkWBNgIdz65oz4T-hTzkBBV-WPYAOa43t3fsMpieRYrHcw6ZIGRoXA==) My name is Amanda Chase, and I am Virginia's sitting State Senator in the 12th District. I know you have heard of me because I am the Senator that fights for our principles in Virginia. You might wonder why I am proud to never back down, but it is because I am doing something that few of the other Senators have done. I vote with my Constituents rather than how the Party wants me to. That is because I know who signs my paychecks; it isn't the special interest groups, it's you. My least favorite part about being a politician is fundraising. I would rather be on the ground hearing from folks like you and knowing how I can make a difference in your life than selling myself to stuffed shirted lobbyists. And mark my words. I WILL NEVER SELL MYSELF TO LOBBYISTS! [So instead, I am asking you to put your faith in me again. I always lean on my record because talk is cheap. Every time I step on that Senate floor, I fight for Patriots like you.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KAAJw2OHPjR7AX8V7gzPl6xxIoKHJuGXa5RxIx50f_WMBl3-9w9RqXVknn7DGvqkrRYXpY25vl7fmMss8Q7CviKpvQ9uSCEbD6YutJnbeYLNaQ5IKd2ngWrR6E7XSc2T4Xr4rWAo8cZ_H7MAslccPdEeYudS5ukRipGignc0BNc=&c=JKosccaM38NNWbSfRE3pKBiTqWmD9zxi60IYnoO-7_54-NpbR12cmg==&ch=ZkWBNgIdz65oz4T-hTzkBBV-WPYAOa43t3fsMpieRYrHcw6ZIGRoXA==) That is why I was voted the most conservative member of the Senate. I don't just talk the talk, I walk the walk. But we are in urgent need on fundraising because I'm not out there taking money from Pearson and Dominion like my opponents! This has been a much more expensive race than originally anticipated, and my opponents are willing to make deals with the devil to ensure they can take my seat. I am the incumbent in this district because my constituents know they can count on me, but my opponents are trying everything they can to pull ahead. Unfortunately, the Democrats gerrymandered my district because they didn't want me to stay in office. Now the RINOs are taking advantage of that to run on soft platforms. My opponent, Glenn Sturtevant, voted for Red Flag laws and gun control when he was in office, and now he thinks he can take my seat. I don't think so. [I NEED Patriots like you on my side to stop him. Fundraising is a necessary evil, and this close to election day, I NEED your help. We have just over two weeks left, and I need to go on TV until election day. Can I count on you to donate $100 today?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KAAJw2OHPjR7AX8V7gzPl6xxIoKHJuGXa5RxIx50f_WMBl3-9w9RqXVknn7DGvqkrRYXpY25vl7fmMss8Q7CviKpvQ9uSCEbD6YutJnbeYLNaQ5IKd2ngWrR6E7XSc2T4Xr4rWAo8cZ_H7MAslccPdEeYudS5ukRipGignc0BNc=&c=JKosccaM38NNWbSfRE3pKBiTqWmD9zxi60IYnoO-7_54-NpbR12cmg==&ch=ZkWBNgIdz65oz4T-hTzkBBV-WPYAOa43t3fsMpieRYrHcw6ZIGRoXA==) We can't afford to lose this solid red seat to a RINO that is trying to destroy our party from within!
[-> Donate $100 <-](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KAAJw2OHPjR7AX8V7gzPl6xxIoKHJuGXa5RxIx50f_WMBl3-9w9RqXVknn7DGvqkrRYXpY25vl7fmMss8Q7CviKpvQ9uSCEbD6YutJnbeYLNaQ5IKd2ngWrR6E7XSc2T4Xr4rWAo8cZ_H7MAslccPdEeYudS5ukRipGignc0BNc=&c=JKosccaM38NNWbSfRE3pKBiTqWmD9zxi60IYnoO-7_54-NpbR12cmg==&ch=ZkWBNgIdz65oz4T-hTzkBBV-WPYAOa43t3fsMpieRYrHcw6ZIGRoXA==)

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsOXLfaDNp

You are an informed citizen-I believe that wholeheartedly. You
love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S.
Constitution says

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osOXLfaDNp

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Good day,
fellow American.

You are
an informed citizen-I believe that wholeheartedly.

You love
this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S.
Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to
stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty
that define our nation.

Your
leadership and knowledge are needed today…

Do you
believe the American education system is failing millions of
young Americans?
YES
NO

We need
more citizens like you-informed citizens-because America is at a
turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold
thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the
Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism.

The
country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore
knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We
can't let that happen!

That's
why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of
Hillsdale College and our new, nationwide initiative-the CAMPAIGN
FOR INFORMED CITIZENS.

We are
the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and
teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal
of this new campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable
Americans who understand:

WHAT
the Constitution says
HOW
it relates to current issues and events
WHY
the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to
liberty

If this
campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the
Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people,
that our education system failed.

These are
young people that "educators" deliberately deceived or who just
haven't learned about a proper understanding of American history
in school.

You are
essential to the success of this effort to make America more
knowledgeable.

That's
because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach
the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to
10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative
starts with you-YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights.

And we
must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer
support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student
grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you
who want what's best for the country.

So
please, share your opinions by completing the National Survey on
the State of American Education today at the link below. Thank
you for reading my email!
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61869608:sOXLfaDNp:m:3:2532013465:487A04F17B713297BD6F5DEBAB6D02DE:r

For our
children,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

name: Team Allred for Texas via Blue Amp Action
subject: Roll Call Ratings Change
body:
Texas pick up!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5258f075-1c3a-458d-bb2f-928bbbdec141/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T92648070-ad41-407d-83ba-585c960c2a3c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) INCREDIBLE news, Peter: Roll Call just shifted their Texas Senate race ranking from “Solid Republican” to “Battleground,” and now, FiveThirtyEight says this could be [Democrats’ best pickup opportunity in 2024!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T39716d9c-0ad6-429d-865c-93431065a709/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) National news outlets are confirming what we already know: Texans are ready for change, and Colin Allred has what it takes to win this thing. But Ted Cruz isn’t going down without a fight. It’s clear this will be one of the most expensive races in the country, and we’re counting on your grassroots support to make sure Colin has the resources he needs to defeat Ted Cruz. [Please, will you rush $10 or more to split between our campaign and Blue Amp Action](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdf4d2352-65f1-404d-a136-e7bb9da5935d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ before our midnight fundraising deadline to help Colin beat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T67b38364-fc10-4c64-b6d7-bb4ef473d04b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, Team Allred
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T398cc21f-3aeb-4f54-84e3-ca966087f873/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---

# Thursday, June 1, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** It's National Pen Pal Day, so feel free to [ drop us a line](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover) if you have any feedback or just want to say hello. We read every email and value your ideas! Today we’re talking about last night’s pivotal vote on raising the debt ceiling, China’s aerial challenge to a U.S. pilot, and the winning of a record $3 million pot in TV poker. If this is your first time reading _The Flyover_ , [sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FOAzEMgOGnSbZWdpzax5ANdSsr4ymX-FqjXIOOUMTbI7HC-kv_8L1e5ku2ZvfrS940jbXPuQx76Ax8ADwEmoOvaVUNSl4T8nTiABAmf0uoqrDA6UlICvHEBUSmuBSpS-Yo3lKAQMCACEgkx4wcJaPECoplVRdBq42-H9-63cdN1_bdH7ofS998S3-jC2dH58-xOXqO4PdU37-sNftgcRGuW7b2-47_KT8BAAD__8QKSdU) and make sure you don't miss our next edition. ## House Easily Passes Debt Bill
Kevin McCarthy won his bid to shepherd a debt ceiling bill through the House, [winning passage](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL_G3oiOw4AzMHTJlq4dLcwd8VXYRDZNlL-v0rnj01ue3td1ukYpst0-48qh5TrF1OTBEzgFWqGZsKeQmZFNz0G70ToEwLFfAlLKOQ2GCRxm662jhCN5jpb12VAvAQENONAatDH-FLUbfNR-IGCdMncDMEmr--m7ytYWzuVVH7yfUl37EpbW7kdnPjq8dHiJ942fx1u9YW-SCnd4IZ6bKrJKU7MQb2pNKe5teaml_hysHrXxoc7G25T4PHuLbkaCaD2OeaQh6jFC7PdA96eUIofz3QC3NUr5y2j_X_kNAAD__78iYv0) by a vote of 314-117, but now he must deal with angry members of his own party. More Republicans voted against the bill than Democrats, putting McCarthy's speakership in potential danger from GOP members who have threatened to seek a [removal vote](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFutDAQhJ_GdKD1Gmz-guJv3F3alGixl8OJwSdjDvH2EanTTTGa-fR9PsYHhRi25wetPJQ5jeRKePMIugZZoxqx8sPMjKwqHqTuO40A2FfLMKHvDRJKbTQy9QRyQjnTpLyXnVFVGBBQgQYpQSplGpK6NSRN64Glm1m0wD6UlJuvFLay8Byv9ObcuLRWcVhKee1C_RdoBdrzPJtjp5I8XXdBoN1LypdAu_G5C7SvFEMJ7o73sUALnUCrQKD95nfY6tU5ymW56swTxxjSVi_p2LmeM7NPa-3ocMc9YAB133X_AIxAW-XBv84QY9i1ES08Vwrxl7L8Le0nAAD__1GOa7c) over his compromise deal with the White House. The bill itself moves [now to the Senate](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2S4yAQhJ8GZaiGH4MuILhEmS-9UIWHwWILgUpga_32W3a8SSfdQX_f_-ty9Smncv_nN3I91sVjT09awHAQXKpFDsFFIklqICfMdDESQE7D6iaFqC4WrLEBEFHHKXptjbl4_cfANCQnQSowIAQIpezohdHWC6sDkMBITAOF1OsxftVU-koxv-qTjhHrNmS39r43pv4yOTM5n-c5xvpd6Gzvnsl5rzn1hI3Jea2PRnz3rVHjG6I_-vritxSo8EC3zpE-mDyQz7xRCe2dvhOP6Uk8-Ffj8VHCe4PHo-A6HC7sZ8o5NWOZhvvmU_4867-L-gkAAP__-99tCA), where leaders of both parties have said they support it. If passed there, it will end global market concerns over a potential government shutdown.
## Retail Boycotts Intensify
The backlash against companies embracing LGBTQ+ marketing continues to build, even as new companies step or stumble into the fray. [The North Face](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyhCAQANCvwQ6HXRC9wiKN3d2kS-lsYFUSkAty59zfp0mZL3gz7-M6XynEsK83SjzWJc_kanjyrKxUIFHP2PhxYUbWDY9gh86iUjg029ipxWp_8UD9Bf0Fhg4GM5DSnQdjwDZhRIVaWQWgQOu-JbCmJ-iNVwxuYWEU-1Bzab9y2OvGS3zlJ5fW5dTEcav1fgj9JnASOJ3n2XoK8ZUoxNbl9vEtcNr5PAROVGpwkSUgoFG6FzjdcqmbnMixXMjxIT_zy-Va5fFIiYt8L8Gz9IVW-fNg3iV56SjdKax7u9UUmzL6-xliDIfthVHrH5ya-v_UbwAAAP__gI9p9Q) is now facing pushback for an ad showing a drag queen sporting its outdoor wear. The boycotts in these cases have been remarkably effective. Target's decline in market value has now [grown to $12.4 billion,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyqzAQQNGvEZ2Y1UoIu1DxGjq_NiUjYGWUCORhNyb5-4xTpz_Fnft2G28xl7zf_8eNgqQ6xlnyk0bwGoxGO2KzhESEZBsKxl86jwB4adbgXJeSmcyENqG9Tnbxnb1633l_6Wb0TQ4IaMGDMWCs7dtovOuj6d0CZOZEygEtWerRvte8y0qpfNcnHe1ct6aEVeTByv5TOCgczvNsU_2aPjnvxPwyCoctHh8krHCQeNxJdKnMxJpPKkVL1Qa101MuJddd8xoPYr3mlzuJRXPeZ9IIAM0Rlsf5gux75eC-xVx-S-TvMT8BAAD__3v-ZRY) with shares at their lowest price since the 2020 pandemic. Bud Light, meanwhile, saw [another 30 percent decline](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGSpCAQgOGn0QyraTw0IbjEbC690EJotLcQLGDGnbff2o03_4O_vv-P9WE5ctr_2ZNMC3m1rvGLVtACpEC1Yu9NIEJSPRmp5z8aAXDuDwM4q0DBg9601aMDGJ2bEbS2blYb9WwQUIEGKUEqNQ1W6nGycho9kHSBuhHIc8tl-Mic2kEhvvOLyuDy2UdztHbVTv3tcOlwue97CPlze1ZOVOt30-Fy5ciNXe1w2Z5eRN6PJqqNVIXPdxKJbIlvoUC4fF62kBcIiOKypSUq9eBLtGJT3Sl5KoJTiE9KjkpfjL9ujpGrnroR9tNy_Dlrv0N9BQAA__8pnmzj) in sales in the most recent month, and Budweiser sales are down 10 percent. [Disney](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGO4yAQgOGnwR3RAA52Copr3OXaKy0MQ5hbzESGJMrbr7L11l_xS_-_63r1VKje_vodXU-8-tDpiStYCUpqs-ohuoSo0QzolJ3PVgPoecgOjAppjnECZbw3ZosqXNI5oVcXO2-XgZwGbcCCUqCMmU5e2XHyahojoAoJxQgYqfNx-s9Ue8ZU3vzE4xR4H4rLvd-bMH-EXoReEtWNS_yY0EvGAyU1mfkl90fIMlKr-Jatc_j6QORXlVSllzvXnqVvcuN34N5l4NqpPrAJvQyHi_cXlULNTmKE2-6p_PT77zu-AwAA__9sk2MB), caught up in a long feud in Florida with Gov. Ron DeSantis, is down 21 percent since last May.
## US, Chinese Jets Play Top Gun
A Chinese fighter jet came within 400 feet of a U.S. Air Force plane over the South China Sea in what the U.S. military called an ["unnecessarily aggressive"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2PozAQQH-N6QbZg8NHQZGGKrnipNOVyDFjmMjYke2A9t-vsvVWr3jN0_t_n--GPYf1j9lpLC7OxhY-aJYtSAXYzFgtoyNCaioaVdtfWpQS-2ob1aVX2g2PHt2Amjo5LNaoi-1NrwmHvuIRJTaylUpJ1TRdbVSrO6M6vUhS1pHQkhYuMdXPyKFs5PxXPCjVNu6VH7dSXlk0V4GTwOk8z3rP4eMEThTgnQVOgc4Pzpj8InCyGwfKBI7XrVCCJxWwcacMJ5eNA2gpwREViA7eGQwncDFZgpc3gYADmHVNlDMfBLsJ9D4owcELRYGTSXC9qse_2-1vlcbldbL3nNtOaLnuhv1PePn943cAAAD__7BkdWg) maneuver. Tension has been growing in the area, which is considered international air space. Video of the encounter ([Watch here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOszAQBOCnMZ3Reg0mKSj-xl3-9kq0gjVsZHBk-4Ly9ieuvv4bzWi-HtODJMqx_qedxxrSRHOVN0_gNBiNdsJmGQMzsm14NO7WOwTAW7ONvUWYaVhuDocAiMBdQLrfHTE614dGRgS04MAYMNYOLRnXDWSGbgE2c2DVAS9SU26fSY66cYif9Obczmlv4rjV-irK_lPoFfrzPNtdolTKnyo7l0sp9CFS2V5Xvij08yYHKfRXs0IPvUJvQaF_y8JJly2dRV-IC-sg61Y56ydXHeJHjlXPMRXWNenvoknynClUhb7J4_I6JUYpblAdrDtJ_J1Z_37tJwAA__83Jm5i)) shows the U.S. aircraft shuddering from the turbulence of the close encounter. The U.S. officially complained to the Chinese, who responded by demanding that America cease surveillance flights over the South China Sea. [The U.S. said flights would continue.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHOpCAURp8GO8zl4oBbWGwysZttttjSIFyUDcoEUDNvv3Hzl3_3FSc5-c6f1_QyIYZ9-WU2GqpPk7E1nDSB4iA4ygkbN3giJNnQIFT_UAiAfbMONPfuR2-dn5XqtNA9zL5DEE47kFrbJgwIKEGBECCk1K0RqtNG6M4BCeuJdUAu1JTbvynsdSUfP-mk3Nq0NXFYa30XJn8yHBmO13W1c0xpmykvN8Fw3OkqDEeTa7CR7nkbOTy4BIbjUbix9ihUuF3Dbnjy3CxLplLCSZx2m469Uua3lJd01PULLGSYHEveHZPPd6YtHBtDFcm43-nIlph8Hifl4D8MHwiXibHJg3tfIcZQlGYdLJsJ8f-V-n3ZfwEAAP__N_Z7cQ)
➤ **Mike Pence** and Chris Christie plan to join the growing ranks of Republicans running for president. Former VP Pence will announce his candidacy next week in Iowa, while former N.J. governor Christie will announce next week in New Hampshire. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL_G3oiOw4Z4YOiSLV07Wmc4kqswWDZJ1L-v0rnj01ue3td1vpJkKbdPWtm3VGcKTZ48g1WgFZoZ--gTM7Lp2Wt7Hi0C4Lm_-8mEic4UaUwuTgHRAoVEhpfI1i1TLx4BDVjQGrQx7kTaDo60GyKwDom7AThKq_vpu0ppd075pz55P4W69tnfW9uOznx0eOnwQlvh1_FWb9ibhMwdXjYugRWVUh8l8MqlKQQc1LbzIZFLE8qq7Y91U1JfpMwYpikmwjQktONiBrto4hgXG10g7ncft5fkLId13QC3lST_BbX___wGAAD__02cZ6Y)) ➤ **Virginia** Gov. clean_body: Kevin McCarthy won his bid to shepherd a debt ceiling bill through the House, winning passage by a vote of 314-117, but now he must deal with angry members of his own party. Kevin McCarthy won his bid to shepherd a debt ceiling bill through the House, winning passage by a vote of 314-117, but now he must deal with angry members of his own party. | | | | | | Thursday, June 1, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! It's National Pen Pal Day, so feel free to mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover if you have any feedback or just want to say hello. We read every email and value your ideas! Today we’re talking about last night’s pivotal vote on raising the debt ceiling, China’s aerial challenge to a U.S. pilot, and the winning of a record $3 million pot in TV poker. If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, . | House Easily Passes Debt Bill Kevin McCarthy won his bid to shepherd a debt ceiling bill through the House, by a vote of 314-117, but now he must deal with angry members of his own party. More Republicans voted against the bill than Democrats, putting McCarthy's speakership in potential danger from GOP members who have threatened to seek a over his compromise deal with the White House. The bill itself moves , where leaders of both parties have said they support it. If passed there, it will end global market concerns over a potential government shutdown. Retail Boycotts Intensify The backlash against companies embracing LGBTQ+ marketing continues to build, even as new companies step or stumble into the fray. is now facing pushback for an ad showing a drag queen sporting its outdoor wear. The boycotts in these cases have been remarkably effective. Target's decline in market value has now with shares at their lowest price since the 2020 pandemic. Bud Light, meanwhile, saw in sales in the most recent month, and Budweiser sales are down 10 percent. , caught up in a long feud in Florida with Gov. Ron DeSantis, is down 21 percent since last May. US, Chinese Jets Play Top Gun A Chinese fighter jet came within 400 feet of a U.S. Air Force plane over the South China Sea in what the U.S. military called an maneuver. Tension has been growing in the area, which is considered international air space. Video of the encounter () shows the U.S. aircraft shuddering from the turbulence of the close encounter. The U.S. officially complained to the Chinese, who responded by demanding that America cease surveillance flights over the South China Sea. ➤ Mike Pence and Chris Christie plan to join the growing ranks of Republicans running for president. Former VP Pence will announce his candidacy next week in Iowa, while former N.J. governor Christie will announce next week in New Hampshire. () ➤ Virginia Gov. Glenn Youngkin is joining other GOP state leaders in sending National Guard troops to the U.S.-Mexico border. Virginia will send 100 troops and support personnel to help Texas handle its ongoing migrant crisis. () ➤ Americans remain largely unsatisfied with the state of the nation, a new Gallup poll reports. Only 18 percent say the country is doing well, about half the historical average from the survey. Over 75 percent say they believe the economy is getting worse. () ➤ Donald Trump proposed a year of massive celebration in 2026 to commemorate 250 years of American independence. The country will celebrate its semiquincentennial birthday, and Trump says he wants it to be a 12-month “Great American State Fair.” () Flying together with: Do you find eating healthy hard? Going to the grocery store and having no idea what to buy? Tired of the same old dinners night-after-night because you don't know what else to make?
