At Clean Plates, we won't ever tell you to follow a specific diet. And we certainly won't judge you for having a glass of wine. Or a hamburger. Or a slice of chocolate cake. We want to make healthy eating easier and more enjoyable. So, join us and 500,000 others by . No really, it's just one click and you're automatically signed up to get healthy recipes and grocery store hacks right to your inbox - FOR FREE! ➤ NASCAR suspended driver Chase Elliott from his next race for deliberately crashing into Denny Hamlin during this weekend's Coca-Cola 600 at the Charlotte Motor Speedway. () ➤ Poker star Tom Dwan won the largest pot in televised poker history Tuesday night, taking down a $3.1 million pot with two pairs. His opponent only had a pair of eights. () ➤ Alabama banned transgender athletes from participating on any female sports teams in college. The state had previously banned transgender athletes from participating in female youth sports from grades K-12. () Market Report 5/31/23 | ▼ | Nasdaq Natl. Assoc. of Securities Dealers Automated Quotations | 12,935.29 | -0.63% ---|---|---|--- ▼ | SPX S&P; 500 | 4,179.83 | -0.61% ▼ | DJI Dow Jones Industrial Average | 32,910.90 | -0.40% ▼ | BTC Bitcoin | 26,864.0 | -1.31% ▼ | UHAL U-Haul Holding | 52.77 | -16.24% ➤ Big Stock Move: U-Haul stock dropped nearly 17 percent after a disappointing 4th quarter earnings report. The company reported that moving and storage activity was shrinking back to more traditional levels. () ➤ Amazon employees staged a symbolic walkout Wednesday to protest a lack of trust in Amazon leadership and new return-to-the-office rules. More than 1,000 employees walked out, mainly at Amazon's main headquarters in Seattle. The company has 360,000 employees worldwide. () ➤ Twitter 's market value has plunged by as much as 70 percent since Elon Musk bought it for $44 billion last fall. Financial partner Fidelity held a $20 million stake in the company before the purchase and now values that stake at just $6.5 million. () ➤ Hubble Network, a Seattle-based startup, plans to launch a cutting-edge satellite network capable of connecting with any Bluetooth device anywhere in the world. The company says it will launch its first four satellites this coming January. () ➤ Meanwhile, across the Pacific, North Korea's attempted launch of a spy satellite failed this week as the rocket fell into the sea. The launch was a violation of UN resolutions and drew sharp rebukes from South Korea and Japan, but North Korea pledged to try again. () ➤ Amazon’s Alexa will no longer allow customers to use celebrity voices, including those of Samuel L. Jackson, Melissa McCarthy, and Shaquille O’Neal. The popular service costs up to $4.99 per voice, but Amazon says it’s cutting off the voices by October, even if customers paid for them. () ➤ Wild video captured at a Georgia accident scene shows a car soaring through the air for 120 feet before crashing into another moving car. The driver was hospitalized in serious condition. () ➤ " Godfather" star Al Pacino, 83, is expecting his fourth child, this one with 29-year-old girlfriend, Noor Alfallah. That will beat fellow "Godfather" star Robert DeNiro's record of 79 in the very-old-dad sweepstakes. () ➤ Air New Zealand will begin requiring international passengers to step on a scale and weigh themselves as part of a 10,000-person survey. The airline says its pilots need the data to calculate the weight and balance of a loaded aircraft. () Flying together with our sponsor Planning out meals weekly is time-consuming and stressful. name: NextGen America
subject: This Pride Month, protect LGBTQ+ youth rights
body:
Open to take action.

| | Friend, **Happy Pride Month! ** At NextGen, this month and every month, we’re celebrating the culture, diversity, and power that the LGBTQ+ community brings to our movement. name: Conservative Direct
subject: Free eBook from Victor Davis Hanson: Dueling Populisms
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWOL8zaDN2

Dear Friend, Populism is nothing new to world history. While it
can be easy to think about American politics as being divided
between the Left and the Right, the reality is much different.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWOL8zaDN2

Dear
Friend,
Populism
is nothing new to world history. While it can be easy to think
about American politics as being divided between the Left and the
Right, the reality is much different. What we've really been
seeing is two sets of populist backlash against both the Democrat
and Republican establishment.

And
believe it or not, these tensions actually trace their roots back
to Roman times.

That's
why I'm sending you this email today.

I want to
make sure you get a free copy of one of our popular eBooks:
Dueling Populisms by Victor Davis Hanson.

Hanson is
a Hoover Senior Fellow and world-renowned historian, and I think
you'll get a lot out of his insights. Inside this important
eBook, you'll learn more about:

What
we can expect from a political climate ruled by movements that
rebel against both the establishment-and each other.
The
important parallels between these ancient movements and their
modern counterparts in both progressive and conservative
populism.
What
lies ahead for America as we revive these ancient tensions in our
culture.

You can
get your free copy of Dueling Populisms using this secure link:
https://resources.hoover.org/dueling-populisms-signup/.

And
please feel free to share this with your family and friends. It's
important that we recall the voices of experience and apply them
to contemporary conflicts and challenges.

You can
use this link to get access to your free eBook right now.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
we've been through so much together

| |
---
| | | Friend,

As one of my most loyal supporters, I wanted to send you this personal message.

Thanks to you and thousands of other committed patriots, I survived a bruising campaign battle with the Left.

But winning took everything I had and more. My campaign took on some debt, and it is time to pay it off.

I hate to ask this, [**but will you help me finally see this campaign through to the end so I can double down on our Conservative efforts in the Senate?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=22b52f0480be462db8638efa2b6bbc32&_e=69F0yUJeMsBg1oJtCjQvbE6pN502NJV_c8NyHdeR8SP4ocO3-cvi4-hX6j8ua5DvQIZlTPeGIGYbi-KX9vbL2bvgpfJsfDRXDZ5qM371PZinkQz0E99RvO1_IT4PodSuYKK-22Jhc201URZZtpdgawAAnLqY18JqQPzBAQgWzDW-UcDoIPHdXpcIsu7-sQsFMqhpScm2lcSOwZTH0i810OS9QkSjL50S_FpMANr01AZluiVJL1ttd30WlSaZGV7fr1D27KMFwk4bqgp9Wg4DuTpwc7_YQ4ud3aZmLX8ExdId6S7xeu9tpIRMQKO2UGSrcge_aj6eM2AaAKCs-gV-dFc6hWyOeSKZTdDVo-mF3ZsHWcJYRZCoej2bhUJSmrUNWVVd80EsYdCHjo8qF9Q5EXUMLMNrFyHlp7CCHP1vX__pRjPF86eb7KfdY1FUg8qc "but will you help me finally see this campaign through to the end so I can double down on our Conservative efforts in the Senate?")

**[You have already given so much to our grassroots campaign, but I hope you will help again.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=22b52f0480be462db8638efa2b6bbc32&_e=69F0yUJeMsBg1oJtCjQvbE6pN502NJV_c8NyHdeR8SP4ocO3-cvi4-hX6j8ua5DvQIZlTPeGIGYbi-KX9vbL2bvgpfJsfDRXDZ5qM371PZinkQz0E99RvO1_IT4PodSuYKK-22Jhc201URZZtpdgawAAnLqY18JqQPzBAQgWzDW-UcDoIPHdXpcIsu7-sQsFMqhpScm2lcSOwZTH0i810OS9QkSjL50S_FpMANr01AZluiVJL1ttd30WlSaZGV7fr1D27KMFwk4bqgp9Wg4DuTpwc7_YQ4ud3aZmLX8ExdK0S8OB99O3uctKe1DsdFT6ZnueA5LqFv8a5cXs5eyDWtozwKV0IlqzVNZDgteKRxgueyrPnpiq6IRo1KSBq7Jii7m4ERhiLYzkJvqY-L8yRpCwtkWN5aLcfRZKARmnnM9krHVoW5_GoyJ1cvdABzIx "You have already given so much to our grassroots campaign, but I hope you will help again. ")**

Any amount you can donate would be greatly appreciated - $2 or $200.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: House guts bedrock environmental law. STOP the Senate from passing it
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1799881?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **_BREAKING NEWS:_ The U.S. House just passed a Dirty Debt Deal that would GUT bedrock environmental protections and fast-track fossil fuel projects, including the catastrophic Mountain Valley Pipeline! **[**Send a message to your Senator asking them to REMOVE the anti-environmental provisions before it’s too late!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1799882?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) The bill coming out of the House is devastating, Friend. It would give Big Oil a massive win, stripping the National Environmental Protection Act of some of its most critical functions and **paving the way for dirty energy projects** to land in communities like yours **without your input. ** **The Senate could pass this Dirty Debt Deal at any moment! [Please, Friend, don’t waste any time -- DEMAND your Senator pass a deal that benefits people and the planet, not greedy oil corporations!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1799883?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1799884?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Here’s what it might look like if this deal passes and the Mountain Valley Pipeline is completed: beautiful**mountain landscapes carved away.** Rivers and wetlands**contaminated with shale gas.** Communities **poisoned with air and water pollution. **
The Mountain Valley Pipeline is just one of the many projects that this deal would fast-track. Communities across the country are already suffering from Big Oil pollution projects --**breathing in toxins from coal plants and unknowingly drinking methane-contaminated water.** Black, Brown, Indigenous, and low-income neighborhoods face the worst impacts.
**This is a DO or DIE moment, Friend![We need at least 1,387 more people from your state to send a message to their Senator by 11:59 pm TONIGHT to hit our goal. Add your name and help PROTECT our communities from dirty oil and gas pollution!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1799885?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1799884?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Ariel Moger
Government and political affairs director,
Friends of the Earth**
|

body:

| | | **Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt indictment against Trump:**
_"The Democrat Party wants a one-party country, it wants a one-party system... And it's not an accident that this happens in Democrat cities, with Democrat judges, with Democrat prosecutors, with Democrat grand juries, and that's the way it's going to work."_
Levin hit the nail on the head.

This is not some even-handed, unbiased prosecution. This Manhattan DA is a hyperpartisan zealot rushing to throw Donald J. Trump behind bars, stop him from running for president, smear his supporters, and cement TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL...

We're PLEADING with every Patriot in America to speak out right now. Here's how you can help:

We need 1,000,000 signatures BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so the Radical Left knows they don't speak for the will of the American People.

Unfortunately, we can't make that case without YOU.

**As of this morning, nearly EVERY Patriot we've asked has agreed to sign our petition - we're just waiting on a few more holdouts who haven't signed. Including you.**
**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0tich9vfdutdoclu7utd38lc2fjkd9veaplfgio_rp22sh2s8i66o75cdj62pj2c3h2bs "SIGN ON: Demand Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**

subject: Dems now hold a +3,000 registration advantage in this district, which is why National Democrats have listed CA-41 as one of the “top offensive targets” in 2024.
body:
“Top offensive target”
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5201345e-267f-4483-a3d2-a5c80885b452/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._

I’m a former federal prosecutor, openly gay Democrat, and I just launched my campaign for Congress in California's 41st District \-- a critical swing seat that could decide the House Majority. When I ran for this seat last year, none of the pundits thought we had a shot in this Republican-leaning district. But we shocked everyone by nearly unseating a 30-year incumbent. _Dems now hold a +3,000 registration advantage in this district, which is why National Democrats have listed CA-41 as one of the “top offensive targets” in 2024._ My opponent is Ken Calvert -- a Trump-endorsed extremist who is best-known for his staunch opposition to LGTBQ rights and for outing a gay political opponent. **[We have another shot at putting an end to his career, but I can’t do this without your support. Please split a donation of $ask or $5, $35, $100 to my campaign and Blue Amp Action right away to become a Founding Donor of my campaign.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T04d6b94b-f6fd-4a29-959a-1e379454fda8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thanks, Will.

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

subject: what I don’t believe about politics.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I think most candidates get this wrong, and I want to set the record straight. | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=30004e2887&e=84ee529f47)
---

Fellow Conservative,

I don’t believe politics is entertainment. I don’t believe politics is building a brand or virtue signaling.

Ultimately, politics is about **WINNING** and about **PRODUCING RESULTS.**

So instead of writing you a long email about what I believe, I just want to show you what I've DONE in Florida.

**Do you want results like these for all of America?** [**Then join my campaign today.** ](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=e411eb1849&e=84ee529f47 "Then join my campaign today.")
---
| | [Donate](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=8cd4f4da9d&e=84ee529f47)
---
Ron DeSantis

**RON DESANTIS GOT RESULTS FOR FLORIDA**
---
| | | **K-12 Education**

Parents' rights have been increasingly under assault around the nation, but in Florida, we stand up for the rights of parents and the fundamental role they play in the education of their children.
* School choice is available for all Floridians by eliminating enrollment caps and income requirements while still prioritizing lower-income families and expanding scholarships for students with special needs.

* Florida is now the first state in the nation to have school choice fully integrated in the public K-12 funding process.

* Florida is ranked #1 in education freedom, #1 in parental empowerment, #1 in state spending on private school choice, and #1 in school choice enrollment.

* Florida eliminated Critical Race Theory in its K-12 schools.

* In 2021 Florida created annual increases in scholarships for students with special needs and we provided $750 for transportation costs to the chosen school.

* Florida has established robust civics education requirements so that students learn about the constitution and what it means to be an American.

**Higher Education Reform**

Academia, writ large, across the country, has lost its way. In Florida, we’re changing that with a series of reforms:
* Ending tenure by instating regular performance reviews.

* Dismantling the monopolistic style of higher ed accreditation agencies.

* Resetting the focus of higher ed towards preparing students to be contributing members of society, rather than imposing political ideology.

* Ensuring students and staff are evaluated based on merit and eliminating so-called D.E.I. programs, which are effectively programs based in discrimination, exclusion, and indoctrination.

**China**

Ron DeSantis has taken action to stand against the United States’ greatest geopolitical threat — the Chinese Communist Party (CCP). He signed legislation that:
* Prevents Chinese entities or affiliates from buying farmland in Florida or land near our military bases.

* Stops sensitive data from being stored on servers that might be owned by entities affiliated with the CCP.

* Prohibits the Chinese influence that we rooted out of higher education from working its way into our primary and secondary education institutions, including a prohibition on Confucious institutes.

* Blocks access to dangerous applications, such as TikTok, on government servers and devices.

**Protecting Life**
* The Heartbeat Protection Act protects the most vulnerable: babies in the womb whose hearts have already begun to beat.

**Defending 2nd Amendment Rights**
* Enacted constitutional carry that allows Floridians to carry concealed weapons without a government-issued permission slip.

**Law and Order**

Other states endanger their citizens by making it easier to put criminals back on the street. Here in Florida, we support and enact policies to protect our communities and keep our people safe. Governor DeSantis signed reforms that:
* Strengthen pre-trial detention and pushed back against woke “bail reform” efforts

* Increasing sentences for drug traffickers that target children with dangerous fentanyl.

* Subjected child rapists to the death penalty while simultaneously reforming death penalty statutes to ensure justice.

* Gov. DeSantis is also the only elected official in America to remove a “progressive” Soros-funded district attorney from office.

**Immigration**

The Biden Border Crisis has wreaked havoc across the United States and has put Americans in danger. But Governor DeSantis did not stand idly by while the federal government abandoned its lawful duties to protect our country, instead he:
* Mandated immigration status verification through E-Verify for public and private employers.

* Made knowingly transporting illegal immigrant minors a felony.

* Made using a fake ID to gain employment a felony.

* Required hospitals to report healthcare costs for illegal aliens.

* Gave Florida more money to send more illegal immigrants to more “sanctuary” jurisdictions such as Martha’s Vineyard.

**Prescription Drugs**

Pharmacy benefit managers and Big Pharma have managed to escape the public eye and work in the shadows for far too long. Ron DeSantis signed a bill that takes the reins back from these healthcare monopolies while empowering consumers.
* With the legislation passed this session, drug companies must disclose wholesale drug price increases of 15% or more.

* Florida is also prohibiting pharmacy benefit managers from mandating mail orders.

**Tax Cuts**

Florida’s economy has consistently outpaced the nation, but we are still fighting against inflationary policies imposed on us by the Biden administration. IIn Florida, we supported our residents and helped them afford the goods that they need.
* We lowered tolls across the state.

* We created a permanent tax exemption on diapers, wipes, baby clothes, cribs, strollers, and much more.

* We reduced taxes by nearly $5 billion – a Florida record.

**Legal Reform and Housing**

As Florida’s population booms, we have provided record support for Florida’s workforce to get quality housing and live the American Dream.
* The Live Local Act dedicates more than half a billion dollars to incentivize and jumpstart new construction.

* The Hometown Heroes Program makes sure police officers, firefighters, teachers, and other community leaders can afford to live in or near the communities they serve.

**Environmental, social, and corporate governance & Central Bank Digital Currency **

Ron DeSantis refuses to let elites circumvent the ballot box to implement a radical ideological agenda through financial sleight of hand.
* Governor DeSantis signed legislation that prohibits the financial sector from considering so-called “Social Credit Scores” in banking and lending practices that aim to prevent Floridians from obtaining loans, lines of credit, and bank accounts.

* And Governor DeSantis is on the record: NO to CBDCs or Federally-controlled digital dollar. Any proposal will be dead on arrival.

**Let Kids Be Kids**

There is a disturbing trend in our society to try to sexualize young people. That is not the way you look out for our children. You protect children—and Governor DeSantis has, by signing landmark legislation that:
* Prohibits sex reassignment surgeries and prescriptions for children under 18.

* Bans children from attending drag shows.

* Protects students from having to “declare” their pronouns in school and ensures that students are not forced to use pronouns that are not based on a student’s biological sex.

* Expands parents' rights in the education of their children by prohibiting classroom instruction on sexual orientation and gender identity in Pre-K through 8th grade.

* Protects young women from being forced to use bathrooms and locker rooms alongside biological males who have decided that they can invade women’s spaces.

---
| | **These kinds of accomplishments are why Floridians re-elected Ron DeSantis as their governor by a whopping 20-point margin, turning Democrat strongholds red. We need candidates and proven records who can win—that’s Ron DeSantis. Are you ready to win big for ALL of America? **
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=3e9c152fd9&e=84ee529f47)
---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=66e773fbd6&e=84ee529f47)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state’s infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Here in Florida, we support and enact policies to protect our communities and keep our people safe. Governor DeSantis signed reforms that: Strengthen pre-trial detention and pushed back against woke “bail reform” efforts Increasing sentences for drug traffickers that target children with dangerous fentanyl. Subjected child rapists to the death penalty while simultaneously reforming death penalty statutes to ensure justice. Gov. DeSantis is also the only elected official in America to remove a “progressive” Soros-funded district attorney from office. Immigration The Biden Border Crisis has wreaked havoc across the United States and has put Americans in danger. But Governor DeSantis did not stand idly by while the federal government abandoned its lawful duties to protect our country, instead he: Mandated immigration status verification through E-Verify for public and private employers. Made knowingly transporting illegal immigrant minors a felony. Made using a fake ID to gain employment a felony. Required hospitals to report healthcare costs for illegal aliens. Gave Florida more money to send more illegal immigrants to more “sanctuary” jurisdictions such as Martha’s Vineyard. Prescription Drugs Pharmacy benefit managers and Big Pharma have managed to escape the public eye and work in the shadows for far too long. Ron DeSantis signed a bill that takes the reins back from these healthcare monopolies while empowering consumers. With the legislation passed this session, drug companies must disclose wholesale drug price increases of 15% or more. Florida is also prohibiting pharmacy benefit managers from mandating mail orders. Tax Cuts Florida’s economy has consistently outpaced the nation, but we are still fighting against inflationary policies imposed on us by the Biden administration. IIn Florida, we supported our residents and helped them afford the goods that they need. We lowered tolls across the state. We created a permanent tax exemption on diapers, wipes, baby clothes, cribs, strollers, and much more. We reduced taxes by nearly $5 billion – a Florida record. Legal Reform and Housing As Florida’s population booms, we have provided record support for Florida’s workforce to get quality housing and live the American Dream. The Live Local Act dedicates more than half a billion dollars to incentivize and jumpstart new construction. The Hometown Heroes Program makes sure police officers, firefighters, teachers, and other community leaders can afford to live in or near the communities they serve. Environmental, social, and corporate governance & Central Bank Digital Currency Ron DeSantis refuses to let elites circumvent the ballot box to implement a radical ideological agenda through financial sleight of hand. Governor DeSantis signed legislation that prohibits the financial sector from considering so-called “Social Credit Scores” in banking and lending practices that aim to prevent Floridians from obtaining loans, lines of credit, and bank accounts. And Governor DeSantis is on the record: NO to CBDCs or Federally-controlled digital dollar. Any proposal will be dead on arrival. Let Kids Be Kids There is a disturbing trend in our society to try to sexualize young people. That is not the way you look out for our children. You protect children—and Governor DeSantis has, by signing landmark legislation that: Prohibits sex reassignment surgeries and prescriptions for children under 18. Bans children from attending drag shows. Protects students from having to “declare” their pronouns in school and ensures that students are not forced to use pronouns that are not based on a student’s biological sex. Expands parents' rights in the education of their children by prohibiting classroom instruction on sexual orientation and gender identity in Pre-K through 8th grade. Protects young women from being forced to use bathrooms and locker rooms alongside biological males who have decided that they can invade women’s spaces. | | These kinds of accomplishments are why Floridians re-elected Ron DeSantis as their governor by a whopping 20-point margin, turning Democrat strongholds red. We need candidates and proven records who can win—that’s Ron DeSantis. Are you ready to win big for ALL of America? | | | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn’t stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.” Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state’s infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 %%profilecenterurl%% %%subscriptioncenterurl%% %%unsubcenterurl%% | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2023 American Victory 2024. Friend –

This is urgent! I'm reaching out to you personally because I need your help.

I built a group of 5,000 of our top supporters to participate in our critical focus group, **but I still need** _YOUR_**response.**[**Will you take my survey right now?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64149273/409160423/-1657212254?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=15&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2662-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU1N2FiYmY2LTdjMDAtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rnxggO-hqgvoOc_fJLbx4mInmlbfg6cOMkSBha0Cv_g=&emci=592444fd-ebfb-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=557abbf6-7c00-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=23124236)
**Here's why this is so important:**

1\. We're five months into the new Congress, and the GOP is working to enact their dangerous, destructive agenda – **like cutting Social Security & Medicare and stripping away our fundamental rights.**

2\. **Trump's presidential campaign is underway, and he's already raised $34 million.**

3\. If we don’t get to work NOW, our chances of **taking back the House and holding the Senate and the White House are kaput!**
As we plan our strategy for the months ahead, we're relying on YOUR input to help us hold Republicans accountable and defeat them at the ballot box.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Fighting Leftist racial discrimination
body:
The Left is trying to advance laws and programs that create discrimination in America

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

The Left is trying to advance laws and programs that _create discrimination_ in America...
...but Judicial Watch is using the legal system and the courts to fight them, and preserve the bedrock American principles of "equal opportunity and protection under the law."
We are winning...but we need you to join with us!
[**Can I count on you to make a special tax-deductible gift today?**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63588&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63588&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

The ugly fact is that the radical Left wants to divide Americans against each other for their own political gain... _divide and rule_ ...but they didn't count on dealing with Judicial Watch!

As you know, where others talk, _Judicial Watch acts_ ...and where it counts..._in the courts_.

* The City of Asheville (NC) settled a Judicial Watch federal civil rights lawsuit we had filed on behalf of a North Carolina citizens group, NC Citizens for Equality, Inc., seeking to overturn a city-sponsored scholarship program that excluded individuals who were not Black.

_Our client 's members included students who were ineligible for this program solely because of their race_, so let me be clear...**The U.S. Constitution and the Civil Rights Act of 1964 _outlaws_ this discrimination based on race..._period_.**

So the Asheville City Council settled our lawsuit by agreeing to remove all racially discriminatory provisions from the scholarship program, as well as from a related program that provides grants to educators.

_This was a clear victory for the rule of law_ that sets a clear precedent for challenging similar Critical Race Theory discriminatory publicly-funded scholarship programs!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63588&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

* We scored another major victory when a California court ruled unconstitutional the state's _racial, ethnic and LGBT quota_ for corporate boards of directors. The court granted Judicial Watch's motion for summary judgment in our lawsuit on behalf of three California taxpayers who challenged the constitutionality of this _quota_

In a ruling that shook the Left and the state's liberal political establishment to its core, the court agreed with Judicial Watch and ruled this quota unconstitutional under California's constitution!**_

_**

* Then _another_ California court delivered _another_ victory to Judicial Watch and _another_ blow to the Left when it struck down a 2018 diversity mandate (SB 826) which required every publicly held corporation headquartered in California to have at least one director "_who self-identifies her gender as a woman_ " on its board by December 31, 2019. This quota law also required corporations to have up to three such persons on their boards by December 31, 2029, depending on the size of its board.

And recently, the California Court of Appeal denied two separate emergency requests by the California Secretary of State to lift the injunctions in these two cases...upholding Judicial Watch's courtroom victories _and_ the core American value of equal protection under the law!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63588&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Judicial Watch’s commitment is to uphold the U.S. Constitution and the rule of law... _and that includes our laws against racial discrimination_!

But the radical Left's Marxist commitment to dividing Americans against each other is being played out in _many_ arenas and localities...and that means Judicial Watch must continue to lead the fight against the radical Left on multiple, critically important fronts, including:

* Exposing the use of taxpayer dollars to indoctrinate elementary and high-school students with noxious, Marxist and racist Critical Race Theory (CRT) in more and more states and communities;
* Filing federal civil rights lawsuits on behalf of public school teachers fired from their jobs for exercising their First Amendment free speech rights and criticizing CRT and other extremist programs in their schools;
* Filing friends of the court briefs in support of challenges to race-based admissions programs at both private and public colleges and universities, including Harvard and the University of North Carolina where our arguments prevailed in recent rulings;

You see, all of these efforts...research, investigations, filing federal and state open records law requests, and lawsuits...come with very real price tags attached to them.

But I believe, as I'm sure you do, that our work countering the Left's efforts to corruptly pit Americans against each other is worth it...

...especially since we are virtually the "only game in town" when it comes to taking on the politicized and weaponized Biden Justice Department, liberal politicians in Congress and state legislatures...plus the corrupt liberal media, who are all working hand-in-glove with the Marxist Left to destroy our laws against discrimination.

**[So, I deeply hope I can count on you to help us today!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63588&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)**

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63588&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Judicial Watch is _your_ voice in Washington and across the country...perhaps your only independent, conservative and _effective_ voice, and we can do more if you will join our fight today. Thank you in advance for your support!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63588&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

|
---
|
---

Washington, DC 20024

| |

name: Gabe Amo
subject: NEW: Former Rhode Island Attorney General Patrick Lynch has endorsed our campaign
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105455/images/Gabe%20Amo%20Header_V6.png]

Friend,

Great news: Our campaign for Congress has been endorsed by former Rhode Island Attorney General Patrick Lynch!

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-pl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-pl]

Former Attorney General Patrick Lynch has not only been a mentor to me, but was a pathbreaking leader on so many fights that I want to take on for Rhode Islanders in Congress. Like General Lynch, I will stand up to protect our environment, including our most valuable natural resource, Narragansett Bay; I will protect the most vulnerable, elderly residents and low-income children, on critical issues like safe housing; I will always fight for LGBTIA+ equality; and I will work to protect communities from the fear of gun violence. I’m honored to receive his endorsement and I look forward to the opportunity to build upon his legacy of service from day one.

Click below to read the story [https://www.wpri.com/news/politics/patrick-lynch-backs-gabe-amo-in-packed-ri-congressional-race/] on WPRI 12:
https://www.wpri.com/news/politics/patrick-lynch-backs-gabe-amo-in-packed-ri-congressional-race/ [https://www.wpri.com/news/politics/patrick-lynch-backs-gabe-amo-in-packed-ri-congressional-race/]

Here is what Attorney General Lynch said about our campaign:

“As a lifelong resident of the First District, I proudly endorse a fellow native son of Pawtucket, my friend, Gabe Amo,” said Lynch. “I’ve known Gabe for decades — from volunteering on my campaigns to working in the policy and legislation department of my office to witnessing him rise to the heights of government in the State House and the White House. I’m proud that he’s committed his career to service and I ask my fellow First Congressional District voters to support him. Since I left office, I rarely get involved in politics too vocally, but the stakes are too high in this race. We need to elect Gabe, so that Rhode Island can have an effective and experienced leader in Congress.”

We are continuing to build a strong coalition of leaders from across all of Rhode Island. As your representative in Congress, I will work with both state and local leaders here in Rhode Island to ensure the wellbeing and success of our entire state.

You can show your support by sharing and liking my announcement tweet [https://twitter.com/gabeamo/status/1664255369906991105] and donating to our team [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-pl] today.

CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-pl]

Forward,
Gabe Amo

https://www.facebook.com/gabeamoforcongress [https://www.facebook.com/gabeamoforcongress] https://twitter.com/gabeamo [https://twitter.com/gabeamo] https://www.instagram.com/gabeamoforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/gabeamoforcongress/] https://www.gabeamo.com/ [https://www.gabeamo.com/]

Gabe Amo for Congress
P.O. Box 40457
Providence, RI 02940
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XWtddIVotU--0Apd99NvFQ2?unsubscribedata=6jhzhWKhe7JOrEJLTRwl3zs5fI1F2Pn95tWufM5rYGwFyCjVvGXgoXuEKU1OAtnzqPGPcrY9lMFHLsf8Qsj3M3riR0A%2FnUCKcn9ZyKdZ3v7HoraqNl5DYh0jNYvIm1mLaxCH%2BxPoHsEEucssVrlZJ5u73Q1P6VQK5BTOdw9bo3TC7fLEdY6VKr%2FkxkFVVXbPCwTNcD4EQ%2BhYMN9%2FtjsUOx%2BwlWI4fL0px6rrlsyt5olHNyUJGU6V6bs8XjydcT5upHUhLIAG%2Bikv27XvHPwZ2o1r8eBzNkT3GE%2Feb0t4DhGXUpARm%2B07OSvZuiTyQKUefS6s7D%2BtbNYNt48NaHNZ6tuXsQR8bWw2S8WGaKr9HQRIe70qie%2Fdasvey%2FLCgaIjGDeX0LetUQoifcpACmANbsnDq6HAtWSTz%2BA0gd8Aq%2FWwGi9nFC8zzKfJxgIcDQO4 .

Featured Article:

** The Latino Education Gap: Implications For Employers (https://www.hrpolicy.org/insight-and-research/resources/2023/hr-workforce/public/05/the-latino-education-gap-implications-for-employer/)

By Michele A. Carlin and Mike Madrid

May 30, 2023 - The face of America is changing, driven by a historic demographic transformation. Within the next two decades, the number of non-Hispanic Whites is expected to decline to less than half of the population, a shift driven by an increasing Latino population. Latinos make up one in five workers and have contributed an estimated three-quarters of the entire labor force expansion since 2009. But there’s another fact about this segment of the workforce that will have significant implications for America’s employers: Latinos rank lowest in educational achievement among racial and ethnic groups.

Only three quarters of Latinos have completed high school, compared with over 90% of their non-Latino peers. Despite improvements in the past decade, Latinos have college completion rates below all other groups. This educational underachievement means an increasing segment of the available labor pool is ill-equipped for today’s jobs, let alone those of the future, and the burden of preparing those workers will fall to employers. This is not a new development. According to ** College is Just the Beginning (https://files.eric.ed.gov/fulltext/ED558166.pdf)
, in 2015 America’s employers spent $177 billion on formal post-secondary education, and a staggering $413 billion on informal, on-the-job training each year. The growing gap between workforce preparation and the jobs of the future will require a continued high level of investment.

How is this investment delivered? In addition to on-the-job training, most large employers offer educational assistance as part of a comprehensive employee benefits package. These programs provide tax-free financial aid equal, on average, to $5,250 for undergraduate degree and $10,500 for graduate programs. But despite their widespread adoption by employers, only a fraction of employees take advantage of them. A ** study (https://hrpolicy-my.sharepoint.com/personal/ahuang_execcomp_org/_layouts/15/onedrive.aspx?id=%2Fpersonal%2Fahuang%5Fexeccomp%5Forg%2FDocuments%2FMicrosoft%20Teams%20Chat%20Files%2Febook%2Dwhat%2Demployees%2Dthink%2Dabout%2Dtraditional%2Deducation%2Dprograms%2Epdf&parent=%2Fpersonal%2Fahuang%5Fexeccomp%5Forg%2FDocuments%2FMicrosoft%20Teams%20Chat%20Files&ga=1)
by InStride and Bain & Company found that while 80% of employees expressed interest in attending school while working, only 40% knew their employer offered educational assistance and only 2% took advantage of the benefit. The reason? Poor communication, complex administration and requiring workers to pay tuition upfront and seek reimbursement after completion, something that is out of reach financially for most workers.

Traditional approaches to supporting the educational needs and aspirations of the emerging workforce may not be enough to close the education gap. Some more modernized programs seek to address the cash flow challenge of the traditional model by offering company-funded assistance instead of reimbursement. In addition to addressing the cash flow challenge, companies will need to create conditions that allow workers to take advantage of the financial support offered by traditional programs. This includes developing new, more flexible work arrangements that help employees integrate their learning journey into their personal lives. This is especially important for Latino workers, for whom family obligations are often primary. Employees may also need the help of dedicated resources to help them navigate the learning journey, so that the skills they are acquiring can be translated into jobs valued by both workers and employers.

Creating a work environment where learning is a core expectation, supported by the flexibility and financial resources needed for workers to succeed, will be key to creating talent strategies tailored to the changing American workforce.

** Learn More About The Latino Worker Project Here (https://www.hrpolicy.org/initiatives/council-on-inclusion-and-diversity/the-latino-worker-project/)

Thank You

anytime.

name: Costello for Senate Newsletter
subject: Costello Campaign Update
body:
Dear Friend,

Just a brief note to update you on our progress and to solicit your
opinions on our draft brochure, poster, and pending Op Ed piece (see
attached below).

*Campaign News: *

We are pleased to announce that Gerry Dube has agreed to take on the role
of the campaign’s campaign manager. A native of Lewiston, Gerry recently
returned to Maine to help care for his mother after retiring from 27 years
of service with the State of Texas. Gerry has more than 38 years of
government and non-profit policy, analysis, and management experience, both
in Maine and Texas.

In Maine, Gerry served as the Parks and Recreation Director for the Dunaway
Performing Arts Center in Ogunquit; Executive Director of the Public Policy
Office for the Diocese of Portland; and Executive Director of the Maine
Hospice Council. In Texas, Gerry served as the Executive Director of Santa
Rosa Hospice, in San Antonio; Director of Medicaid, Medical Appeals, and
Provider Claims for the Texas Department of State Health Services, in
Austin; Senior Federal Funds Budget Analyst for the Texas Legislative
Budget Board; and Chief Financial Officer for the Texas Racing Commission.

In addition to his work experience, Gerry has served on several boards
including the former Portland Home for Persons and Children Living with
HIV, and he currently serves on the board of J’Miah’s Place, a vocational
training center for disabled adults in Roundrock, Texas.

Gerry received a BA in Political Science from the University of Maine in
Orono and a PhB in Philosophy from the Pontifical Gregorian University in
Rome, Italy.

*Summer 2023*

Campaign efforts this summer will center on reaching out and spreading our
message of reform, real change, and progress to various activists and the
public via social media, door-knocking, and attendance at various fairs,
forums, and other events. Please let us know (by responding to this email)
if you are interested in organizing supporters or campaign activities in
your town or neighborhood.

Thank you,

Grace

P.S. Our first campaign finance reporting deadline is fast approaching
(June 30), if it is something that you can afford, please consider making a
small donation to help us invest in the resources required to win (via
www.costelloforsenate.com).

[image: Campaign Poster.png]

name: Scott Parkinson for U.S. Senate
subject: Why I’m running for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parkinson for Senate
body:
Over the past three years, we have needed leaders to stand up and fight for our freedoms.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbcmh5m9dto3udgfravcfeogqh0hjdfm2t41732o_rp22sh2s8i66o75cdj69p32c9h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfmmm4ui6cpur4h42hr886urlgsulqj0nor460g8_rp22sh2s8i66o75cdj69p32c9h2bs)
---
Friend, My name is Scott Parkinson, and**I’m running for U.S. Senate in the great state of Virginia.** I'm a father, husband, and neighbor. I’ve spent the past 18 years **taking on the swamp** to advance the conservative movement, working for three United States Senators and serving as Chief of Staff to then-Congressman Ron DeSantis during his election for Governor of Florida.
---
[**GET INVOLVED >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf7rvvv0fq6atnd6resiv5ln3t0ki7dvsgscgouo_rp22sh2s8i66o75cdj69p32c9h2bs)
---
**Our campaign is proud to be endorsed by**
---
* Senator Mike Lee
* Congressman Byron Donalds
* Congressman Jim Banks
* Congresswoman Lauren Boebert
* Congressman Jason Smith
* Former Senator Jim DeMint

---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd3h104vvpf9hrqfk3br08cg7u2ou80qrmcnjq1g_rp22sh2s8i66o75cdj69p32c9h2bs)
---
Over the past three years, we have needed leaders to stand up and fight for our freedoms. Unfortunately, Tim Kaine fought alongside radical leftists to **take our freedoms away** and **destroy the middle class** , prioritize**woke ideologies over parents' rights** , and enable **open-border policies** and **violent crime**. All of this while turning his back on law enforcement causing a public safety crisis. Kaine's leftward lunge began when **he joined Hillary Clinton** on the ticket as the Vice Presidential nominee in 2016. With nearly **30 years in elected office** and nine appearances on the ballot, Kaine has lost his way. He’s gone from "Blue Dog" to a**partisan radical** that **votes with Bernie Sanders 94% of the time.** We can feel it now -- at the kitchen table, the gas station, and the canceled family vacation. **Virginia cannot afford 94% of Socialism.**
---
[**STOP RADICAL SOCIALISM – DONATE NOW >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zke3qar4l166gnqcrq2889t6licqjkd8t6r6jn00_rp22sh2s8i66o75cdj69p32c9h2bs)
---
Career politicians like Tim Kaine have failed the American People and are completely disconnected from economic and cultural reality. It's time for **new conservative leaders like me** to fight back against Tim Kaine. I pledge to work with all Virginians to
---
* Increase public safety in our communities
* Strengthen parental rights in the classroom, and
* Rescue the Middle Class from an economic crisis.

---
Governor Glenn Youngkin designed the blueprint to end the Democrats' control in Virginia. Now, that blueprint will be applied to **fire Tim Kaine.** I look forward to meeting with tens of thousands of my fellow Virginians on the campaign trail and sharing my vision fighting for families and fighting for our freedoms. But the biggest challenge we face is money. Tim Kaine is going to have **millions of dollars from the elite liberal Washington establishment** that he’s spent over 30 years building up. We have to have the resources to take on his political machine. [**Will you help us get our campaign off the ground by chipping in a donation of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or even more today?****
****
**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr6jue0m6np9sn4tjmspqn0gnnpm8v3ao4908icg_rp22sh2s8i66o75cdj69p32c9h2bs)**I’m honored to stand by your side as we work to fire Tim Kaine.** For Freedom, Scott Parkinson
Candidate, U.S. Senate (VA)
---
[**HELP US FIRE TIM KAINE: CHIP IN >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zigj32bq4oi6l6sh95ih33lrmq413gnbn2bp2vno_rp22sh2s8i66o75cdj69p32c9h2bs)
---
Paid for by Parkinson for Senate
---

name: Del. Sam Rasoul
subject: Important Endorsements!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
body:
Momentum is on our side in this competitive seat
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Jg8vDHa34Mjrp06Bc50yp8VZHPgwCAcaFHvXd_eK3s8px2Jse9KyBS_5ru-R3WAsUGfHgWGX0SU1DdnKnm1VYUe2z30rFM6yzzn-UZYjkIMQYjdyr96jbk16x-OxCaeKXp7AjjDul5jl2NMtqws_9RSh2XfdMQc70pzanYcgSOE=&c=vT43VdTtgyBrV-Ds-2PCir8uG-fHvoBhpVyxR7aN8Mpzu2ZdyHmKbA==&ch=8oQhGCAoR-83W_hF2Pa4JBEIbLEoMrch1PakDgKm95w07g_MHtmDFg==)
---
| Hi Peter,
We've got the momentum on our side and I need your help to keep it up! Together since I announced my re-election campaign in this redrawn, competitive district we've made over 10,000 voter contacts.
In that same time I've been endorsed by the Virginia Education Association, Freedom Virginia, Voters of Tomorrow Virginia, The Virginia Sierra Club, and Clean Virginia's endorsement. I also earned the Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate distinction. I'm fighting for public schools, a clean environment, and an end to gun violence in our communities in the House of Delegates and I need you to join me in this fight.
[Now with just one week before our June 8th fundraising deadline can you keep our momentum going by contributing?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Jg8vDHa34Mjrp06Bc50yp8VZHPgwCAcaFHvXd_eK3s8px2Jse9KyBV_j-W-85ycZCWbmJZ9asAp9ne6U427EA0xg-_4Om2YmDVQKbJh69brjV4ucx21WqWdcFkO4hkESqyJGCQ-qfisOHPXPXN1bwMHVux1-qtkmyuEHXHL-IQWhpMXN3o1Ru3kZhCm_Urt0IMCmfBeRJ_Q=&c=vT43VdTtgyBrV-Ds-2PCir8uG-fHvoBhpVyxR7aN8Mpzu2ZdyHmKbA==&ch=8oQhGCAoR-83W_hF2Pa4JBEIbLEoMrch1PakDgKm95w07g_MHtmDFg==)
---
|
---
| We've got to finish off this fundraising period at the top of our game. The new competitive district I'm running to represent shifted six points to the right in redistricting. We need to be prepared for anything and we can't take this seat for granted!
---
| | | [Click Here to Donate!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Jg8vDHa34Mjrp06Bc50yp8VZHPgwCAcaFHvXd_eK3s8px2Jse9KyBV_j-W-85ycZCWbmJZ9asAp9ne6U427EA0xg-_4Om2YmDVQKbJh69brjV4ucx21WqWdcFkO4hkESqyJGCQ-qfisOHPXPXN1bwMHVux1-qtkmyuEHXHL-IQWhpMXN3o1Ru3kZhCm_Urt0IMCmfBeRJ_Q=&c=vT43VdTtgyBrV-Ds-2PCir8uG-fHvoBhpVyxR7aN8Mpzu2ZdyHmKbA==&ch=8oQhGCAoR-83W_hF2Pa4JBEIbLEoMrch1PakDgKm95w07g_MHtmDFg==)
---
| I'm grateful that I'm not in this fight alone. None of this would be possible without the support of so many of you in Roanoke and beyond. Together we can win this newly competitive seat to help Democrats take back the majority this November.
My very best,
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Jg8vDHa34Mjrp06Bc50yp8VZHPgwCAcaFHvXd_eK3s8px2Jse9KyBS_5ru-R3WAsUGfHgWGX0SU1DdnKnm1VYUe2z30rFM6yzzn-UZYjkIMQYjdyr96jbk16x-OxCaeKXp7AjjDul5jl2NMtqws_9RSh2XfdMQc70pzanYcgSOE=&c=vT43VdTtgyBrV-Ds-2PCir8uG-fHvoBhpVyxR7aN8Mpzu2ZdyHmKbA==&ch=8oQhGCAoR-83W_hF2Pa4JBEIbLEoMrch1PakDgKm95w07g_MHtmDFg==)

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Take Action Against Ranked Choice Voting NOW!
body:
We value your input.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqvmf4amue2t2hf5vg9jcs6uom47c7efpptdnds0_rp22sh2s8i66o75cdgm0or1c9h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input.

**Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlq1aad883er44sj3ha5ma2fsh6bnbnti5lh60d8_rp22sh2s8i66o75cdgm0or1c9h2bs)**

By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system.

Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America.

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I understand better than most what a $20 donation means to someone making little more than the minimum wage.
#

Just a short note to say thank you.
We hit our May fundraising goals thanks to a last minute surge of thousands of donations made by regular folks chipping in what they could afford yesterday.
And let me just say this to those who have given -- and those who are considering whether to donate in the future -- these donations mean a lot to me.
I grew up poor. I think you know that. But what that means is I understand better than most what a $20 donation means to someone making little more than the minimum wage.
It is nothing like a hedge fund manager giving $6,600 that they don't think twice about.
So my promise to everyone who has donated, and even those who have not, is that we will be good stewards of your support. We will spend it on what we need to win this race.
And when I am elected to the Senate, you can count on me to vote for the interests of working folks who desperately need more representation and people who look out for them.
Thank you again.
Ruben
* * *

**🙏🏼 Hi. Please don’t click away just yet. ☀️**

Ruben Gallego is a candidate for United States Senate in Arizona and the strength of our campaign is the people who power it. Senator Sinema has the hedge fund managers and Republican donors. Kari Lake has Donald Trump and the entire MAGA-right.

Ruben has you and people like you. So if you haven’t already, please add your name as a personal endorser of his campaign using this link. [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em230601_Personal_Endorse/?source=em230601-1-op&refcode2=674.734936.Un1U0w&akid=674%2E734936%2EUn1U0w)
---

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=674%2E734936%2EUn1U0w). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=674_734936_Un1U0w&akid=674%2E734936%2EUn1U0w)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots  Action
subject: CTA June 1: Stop the debt deal in the Senate
body:
| | |
---
Kevin McCarthy passed the disastrous debt ceiling deal with the help of Democrats in the House, and Democrats are ecstatic about the deal. They can’t believe how good it is – how it funds their progressive, woke policies and suspends the debt ceiling. Joe Biden couldn’t have asked for a sweeter deal. **To sum it up, Republicans are basically agreeing to $4 trillion more debt for NOTHING in return.** Chuck Schumer wants the Senate to pass this deal by midnight tomorrow (Friday) night.
---
**Please call both of your Senators today and tell them to vote no! This is such a bad deal for Americans, they must vote NO.** **Call the Capitol switchboard at (202) 224-321 and ask for your senator by name and you will be transferred. When you are done, call again and ask for the other senator. If you don’t know who your senators are, use the**[**Senate website**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MjA4MDY4NzgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxNTItZTRhZjkyMjQyYzdkNGZkMWEzZGYwOWFlMTEzZWQzOTYiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnL2ZpbmQtc2VuYXRvcnM_bWlkPTQ2NDI4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/UjuAo_mKhbF_E75zFa7Zyg)**to find them (just find your state in the dropdown menu and it will bring up both of your Senators and their D.C. phone numbers).** We are including the graphic below again, so that you can see just some of the terrible aspects of this deal.
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin

name: Emily with Team Gillibrand
subject: I'll give you the bad news first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, it's Emily from Team Gillibrand. I'll give you the bad news first: Last night, we missed our $50,000 end-of-month goal by $3,748.
I know that this was an ambitious goal from the start. But these are the kind of numbers we need to be putting up to compete with GOP megadonors and defend our narrow Senate majority. I know that $3,748 might not sound like much, but in an election like this one, it can make all the difference.
**Thankfully, there's some good news too:_If we see a surge in donations in the next 24 hours, we'll still be able to make up this gap and get back on track to hit our Quarter 2 fundraising goal._**
Because you're one of Kirsten's most reliable supporters, I need you with me on this. **Please, will you chip in $5 or more to hit this goal and ensure that we can send Kirsten back to the Senate and defend our Democratic majority? Here's your own personal donation link: [www.secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_fr_defend-senate-2023](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64154324/409180857/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4189-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWI1ZWIzZS04MzAwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uW5gez4XOy2FH1wvzzslMmLgsO6S1UeFT8Cb1D9aSxw=)**
Our Quarter 2 numbers will be made public soon _,_ so __ we've got to get back on track ASAP to show Kirsten's rivals that this seat isn't up for grabs. Can I count on you to help out tonight?

Thanks so much,

Emily (Kirsten's Digital Director)

Sent from my iPhone
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64154325/409180858/1575385346?refcode=jtk4189-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWI1ZWIzZS04MzAwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uW5gez4XOy2FH1wvzzslMmLgsO6S1UeFT8Cb1D9aSxw=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64154326/409180859/1575385346?refcode=jtk4189-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWI1ZWIzZS04MzAwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uW5gez4XOy2FH1wvzzslMmLgsO6S1UeFT8Cb1D9aSxw=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64154327/409180860/1575385346?refcode=jtk4189-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWI1ZWIzZS04MzAwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uW5gez4XOy2FH1wvzzslMmLgsO6S1UeFT8Cb1D9aSxw=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand
