clean_body: | | | Friend, it's Emily from Team Gillibrand. I'll give you the bad news first: Last night, we missed our $50,000 end-of-month goal by $3,748. I know that this was an ambitious goal from the start. But these are the kind of numbers we need to be putting up to compete with GOP megadonors and defend our narrow Senate majority. I know that $3,748 might not sound like much, but in an election like this one, it can make all the difference. Thankfully, there's some good news too:If we see a surge in donations in the next 24 hours, we'll still be able to make up this gap and get back on track to hit our Quarter 2 fundraising goal. Because you're one of Kirsten's most reliable supporters, I need you with me on this. Please, will you chip in $5 or more to hit this goal and ensure that we can send Kirsten back to the Senate and defend our Democratic majority? Here's your own personal donation link: = Our Quarter 2 numbers will be made public soon , so __ we've got to get back on track ASAP to show Kirsten's rivals that this seat isn't up for grabs. Can I count on you to help out tonight? Thanks so much, Emily (Kirsten's Digital Director) Sent from my iPhone | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Facts on the debt ceiling deal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
Peter- On Wednesday the House passed the Fiscal Responsibility Act of 2023. This bill raised the debt ceiling while also enacting spending cuts, easing permitting requirements for energy projects, and increasing work requirements for certain welfare programs. I spent a lot of time deliberating over this bill, but ultimately I decided to vote yes. Here's why:
We vote based on realistic choices, not what we wish were true. Of course, I wish that Ronald Reagan was resurrected, and we had 60 votes in the Senate. Then we could enact massive reforms that truly put our spending on a reasonable path. But this isn't the reality we have now. The reality we have is a slim House majority while radical Democrats have the Senate and White House. Our leverage is limited.
But even with that limited leverage, we forced Biden to give up on every single demand he had. He first wanted a clean debt ceiling increase without reforms. We said no. He then wanted tax increases. We said no. He wanted cuts to our military. We said no. In the final bill, Biden got nothing, and we got about half of what we wanted. Of course we wanted more, but again, our leverage was limited.
Here are other facts to consider. Whether you like it or not, there has to be a debt ceiling increase. The economic consequences are catastrophic if you let the government default on its debt. Your 401k would crash as markets crash, the cost of borrowing would increase and make our debt worse, and recession would be imminent. Only third-world countries have allowed this to happen.
Some might say, "well if we cut spending, we wouldn't have to increase the debt!" But this isn't really true, not unless you're fine with abolishing our Social Security and Medicare programs for our seniors, which account for nearly TWO-THIRDS of all spending. Yes, you read that right. Nearly TWO THIRDS. That means during these negotiations we are only arguing over 11% of all spending. Why? Because no one wants to touch Social Security, Medicare, Veterans benefits, or the military. That leaves all the other government agencies and programs which only account for 11% of spending. So, even if you abolished the entire federal government apart from the military, you WOULD STILL HAVE TO INCREASE THE DEBT LIMIT!
So, given that there is no choice but to increase the debt ceiling, and given we only have control of the House, where does that leave us? With what options? The options are clear. They are (1) a Biden-preferred clean debt ceiling increase with no reforms, (2) a default and say goodbye to your 401k, or (3) a debt ceiling increase with all the reforms we got.
Anyone claiming there is another option is being EXTREMELY dishonest with you.
So what reforms did we get? About $1.5 TRILLION dollar decrease in spending over 10 years. Not bad. Environmental permitting reform which is HUGE for our energy sector. This means Biden can't wait 10 years to allow a permit for a new highway lane or gas pipeline. We finally forced the reforms we've been trying to do for YEARS. Billions of dollars in investment and jobs for Texas will be unleashed because of this. We also got some additional work requirements on Food Stamp programs and required some spending limitations (called "pay as you go" requirements) on any administrative action taken by the Biden Administration. We also cut all funding for new IRS agents this year.
There's more, but those are the basics. The complaints from other Republicans aren't about what's in the bill, they're about what's not in the bill. But this is faulty logic. I can ALWAYS vote against something because it doesn't have something I want. And it's true, I can come up with a MILLION things this bill doesn't have. No, it doesn't fix our border, nor does it cure cancer, nor does it give me a new eye. But these are ridiculous excuses not to vote for a bill. Some Republicans will nitpick each of those wins and say they're not enough. Well, I agree! They're not enough! But that's not that question. The QUESTION is (1) was this the best we could get? And (2) is it better than the alternatives, which is a clean debt ceiling increase or a default? The answers to both questions are very clearly YES.
Many Members of Congress are afraid to take tough votes even when they know it's the right thing to do. I'm not. Never have been. I could EASILY have taken the easy way out and voted "no," and kept my voters in the dark about the truth. No one would write to me to complain about a "no" vote. But I won't do that. I can't help but tell you the truth. And the truth is that this bill was the best case scenario given the political reality we live in. There is no evidence from anyone that we could have negotiated a better outcome. None. Therefore, I had to vote yes.
In service,
---
|
---
| Congressman Dan Crenshaw
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | | PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS
---
| | Dan Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007

name: Brian Burch
subject: Urgent: LA Dodgers reverse decision, attack Christians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catholic Vote
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWJ7fBaDWN

I need your urgent help to expose the LA Dodgers baseball team
for blatantly supporting an anti-Christian hate group.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWJ7fBaDWN

I need
your urgent help to expose the LA Dodgers baseball team for
blatantly supporting an anti-Christian hate group.

The group
calls itself the "Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence."

And their
motto is "go forth and sin some more."

The
"sisters" are a bunch of men who dress up in sexually explicit
and rainbow-colored "nun" clothing with one purpose:

To mock
Christians.

Then they
perform stunts designed to be as shocking and offensive as
possible.

A
"condom savior mass"
An
annual "Jesus in drag" competition
Pole
dancing on a cross
And
much more.

They even
tricked an archbishop into giving them communion, then defiled
the Eucharist.

And the
Dodgers are choosing to honor this anti-Christian hate group with
their "Community Hero Award" during so-called "Pride month."

FIGHT
BACK

It's
vile.

It's
disgusting.

It's a
blatant attack by a major American corporation on our Lord.

And
faithful Christians like you and I must not tolerate this kind of
hatred.

That's
why CatholicVote is raising $1 million to run ads on every
Dodgers-linked radio station and TV channel to send a clear
message:

Any
business that promotes anti-Catholic bigotry WILL suffer the
consequences.

FLOOD
THE AIRWAYS!

If you've
been following the news closely, you may have read about
CatholicVote's campaign to ask the Dodgers to remove this
anti-Catholic group of fake "sisters" from their celebration.

Thanks to
our public pressure campaign, thousands of CatholicVote
supporters FLOODED Dodger stadium with phone calls.

Within
minutes, we filled up their voicemail inboxes.

The
Dodgers almost immediately disinvited the "sisters."

A HUGE
thank-you to everyone who made those calls!

I'm
incredibly proud of our CatholicVote family for taking action
right away.

But
unfortunately Patriot, the story doesn't end there.

As soon
as the Dodgers disinvited the "sisters," the leftwing LGBT
movement went crazy.

Other gay
and transgender groups began to pressure and threaten the Dodgers
for daring to cross the LGBT agenda.

Then, the
Dodgers re-invited the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence back and
decided to honor them with the baseball team's "Community Hero
Award."

They also
offered their "sincerest apologies to the Sisters of Perpetual
Indulgence, members of the LGBTQ+ community and their friends and
families."

And they
made the decision without even consulting any faithful Christians
- people like you and me. The Christians who the "Sisters of
Perpetual Indulgence" target with their hatred in the first
place.

It's
shocking, but not surprising.

Patriot,
this is the state of American culture today.

If anyone
dares to call a "transgender" person by their biological name or
pronoun, they risk being fired by woke corporations.

But those
same woke businesses heap honor on bigots who insult Christians,
hate our biblical values, and mock our Lord and Savior.

DEFEND
CHRIST!

As
Senator Marco Rubio said last night after the news broke, "Today
our great country is controlled by socio-political ruling elites
who don't just tolerate anti-Christian bigotry, they encourage &
celebrate it."

He's spot
on, Patriot.

One thing
is absolutely clear today:

Hate has
a home at Dodger stadium.

And it's
our job to stand up for the majesty of our Lord and our Church.

For God
and for country,

Brian
Burch

President, CatholicVote

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
P.S. Like
I mentioned earlier, we've set a goal to raise $1 million to run
ads exposing the anti-Christian bigotry of the LA Dodgers and the
"Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence."

Please
click here to donate anything you can spare today.

We didn't
have this in our budget, and we need to raise the money in the
next few days. So no matter what you can afford to chip in -
please don't hesitate. The most important thing is time.

Thank you
in advance, and please keep our work in your prayers.

Paid for by Catholic Vote.

name: Giffords.org
subject: Will you take action to prevent ATF’s stabilizing braces rule from being overturned?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Team -
This week, the U.S. Senate may vote on a dangerous resolution that threatens to rollback recent progress. Last year, our movement convinced the ATF to classify pistols with stabilizing braces as short-barreled rifles. But a group of extreme Republicans want to overturn that lifesaving regulation, and we need to make our voices heard once again.
Stabilizing braces when used with semi-automatic pistols are extremely dangerous because they enable shooters to use the brace as a shoulder stock, creating a short-barrelled rifle. This means shooters can use the braces to create a firearm that is accurate when firing multiple rounds, AND concealable and maneuverable when perpetrating a mass shooting. These weapons pose grave risks to the public and law enforcement.
We need your help to make sure that this dangerous resolution is not passed.
[**Will you click here to sign our online petition to let us know that you reject the overturning of the ATF’s stabilizing braces ruling?**[SIGN ON](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_stabilizingbracespet_jun23/?source=em230601-1-15&refcode2=5816.3935704.zKR77l&akid=5816%2E3935704%2EzKR77l)** You can also call our hotline at **202-335-5608** to urge your representative to vote NO on the GOP’s resolution of disapproval on the ATF’s rule. [](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_stabilizingbracespet_jun23/?source=em230601-1-15&refcode2=5816.3935704.zKR77l&akid=5816%2E3935704%2EzKR77l) Thank you so much for taking action. We won’t back down in this fight, and we’re grateful to have you by our side. \- The team at Giffords
Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=5816%2E3935704%2EzKR77l) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
| |

---
| | | This is Jim Jordan.

If you know anything about me, you know I don't beat around the bush. If I'm worried about something, you'll hear about it. Immediately.

So let me be 100% honest with you right now.

I just spoke with Majority Leader Steve Scalise and he told me we're in quite a bind: **1)** _Inside Elections_ released their first set of House Ratings and they have us TIED with the Democrats for control of the House **2)** The latest FEC reports show Democrats OUTRAISED Republicans by $12,000,000+... **3)** _**[We still need fifteen-hundred strong Conservatives to make a small donation right away or our Republican Majority will be in SERIOUS JEOPARDY.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=27d9e31c2ed8479f8a8a2a5e08a7c15a&_e=BTu_lhqTxDlzF1iEfVwylxbppP7a1Px177u3ySJqD14DbMT_q8_iHf7c9ChdfoGi2k0OWb91xA7c6hT7GR_7HHR_2H-rrL5Oc94HTzKoLFAG4gzi-RH-4GtTYzhzXmzCR-tuejBfrmlVVFKYKy0gMS2W7ZHHJOC3srTC2zGC3OyC_m84-fjF2nSnvRVPZJT8d4uIhb1U2c10sNpLsGQSL2MnKID2pPea8uCPu8FKBXUBO8UyxgwKUGdNQLpJVTZWedvEoXpQaqhbOVAgNVUwJz_PCSrh1-SK8VXAZk6Zpqv1deQ9B5MmDJkCUWQxix203wep9M_ta8qzDHQ9s1cIO0dHx7CHRdwUrjnGqr3M-VX9xjDDEl1JFIn5BkAV31Al "We still need fifteen-hundred strong Conservatives to make a small donation right away or our Republican Majority will be in SERIOUS JEOPARDY.")**_

Listen, House Democrats exploited every ounce of their power to cover for Joe Biden and misled the public during every crisis they created together.

_If they outraise us and manage to destroy our Majority, the American People will never get ..._
* **ANSWERS** on Biden's weak response to Chinese aggression
* **ANSWERS** on President Trump's corrupt indictment
* **ANSWERS** on how Big Tech interfered with our elections
* **ANSWERS** on Democrats colluding with Big Tech to silence critics
* **ANSWERS** on Biden officials treating parents as domestic terrorists

The American People deserve answers, but getting them depends entirely on Republicans holding the House Majority. If we lose our Majority, we will lose all of the progress we made.

We need the support of our grassroots donors to prevail. **Without it, we might as well throw in the towel.**

_**[As I write this, we're falling critically behind the Democrats' fundraising efforts. I'm counting on you to make a small donation to help us catch up before our critical deadline.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=27d9e31c2ed8479f8a8a2a5e08a7c15a&_e=BTu_lhqTxDlzF1iEfVwylxbppP7a1Px177u3ySJqD14DbMT_q8_iHf7c9ChdfoGi2k0OWb91xA7c6hT7GR_7HHR_2H-rrL5Oc94HTzKoLFAG4gzi-RH-4GtTYzhzXmzCR-tuejBfrmlVVFKYKy0gMS2W7ZHHJOC3srTC2zGC3OyC_m84-fjF2nSnvRVPZJT8d4uIhb1U2c10sNpLsGQSL2ayOhGff1Or4Df5wvDjvI827aHV4Q8miJ6gD2U4C-q4hvvjVIT7DsNXK6eYkodVLaLY-RmTwS5Pwag12mHaKWBfFP48LzOplr4-fplxLGJgAA1aTu6mmIHvZI0yNO29PrIaj-nEB08krDINfoNV8x8kYrjP31hy1xjuFzMrk6Ng "As I write this, we’re falling critically behind the Democrats’ fundraising efforts. Time is of the essence and I'm really counting on you.

For America,

Jim Jordan

| | Late last year, the Department of Homeland Security updated its terrorism advisory bulletin to draw renewed attention to domestic terror threats that put the LGBTQ, at a higher risk. My opponent, Jack Bergman not only voted against the 'Respect for Marriage' Act, he also voted against a bill protecting minority groups from domestic terror. His votes in the House put our fellow Americans in danger. LGBTQ+ rights are human rights. Period. Threats of violence against the LGBTQ+ community are intensifying, and our friends in rural America need allies the most. I am proud to stand shoulder to shoulder with you on our way to Congress. Happy [Pride Month](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/5aOXt6Z_J/c?w=T_uoFlSNOQvMOYgoWJHKcEn56vvjvTWojcmx6wGIKpw.), everyone. I am honored to continue our fight. -Bob Bob LorinserCandidate for US CongressDemocrat, MI01

name: Tim Scott
subject: Whoopi Goldberg
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
I knew it wouldn’t take long. The Democrats were right on cue...

| |
---
| | |

I knew it wouldn't take long. The Democrats were right on cue...

Just a few hours after I officially announced that I was running for President of the United States, I was already under attack.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdnqvsgjam2lrbsul3n4ugevtefh6imv70mndfmo_rp22sh2s8i66o75cdgm4ob2c5h2bs "Whoopi Goldberg suggests Tim Scott has 'Clarence Thomas syndrome,' accuses him of using racial 'dog whistle'")
---

Democrats will do everything they can to undermine me, my experience, and my story because I'm a THREAT to their narrative. They're more interested in cheap shots and scoring political points than progress. They're more invested in inciting anger and hatred to ensure they win the next election.

**That 's why I need your help. This isn't the first and won't be the last time the Left attacks me for daring to speak out against them. I won't stop fighting, but it's an uphill battle I can't - _and won 't_ - win alone.**

**_[If you're able, can I count on you to chip in $5, $10, whatever you can to show we won't take this lying down?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zps40ddn9dfgss0qu44nijb9l18trvddt9bjrbug_rp22sh2s8i66o75cdgm4ob2c5h2bs "If you’re able, can I count on you to chip in $5, $10, whatever you can to show we won’t take this lying down?")_**

---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbur2fr9qmauahrifrt87ckbqa88qvvsrpj5u29o_rp22sh2s8i66o75cdgm4ob2c5h2bs "CHIP IN NOW")
---

They can keep calling me names, but I will never fall in line. We will always fight back.

God Bless,
Tim

---
* * *
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpeb1n3473gabn3j2lrlea6vp412mrtml22aj90o_rp22sh2s8i66o75cdgm4ob2c5h2bs "TIM SCOTT IS RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES - TELL TIM HE'S GOT YOUR SUPPORT!")
---

I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. **It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president.**

**_[That's why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2f2fa5mihhe65i9425bkuosm7q593rriqvlqdcg_rp22sh2s8i66o75cdgm4ob2c5h2bs "That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.")_**

---
| | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zom8jn39ile3mg2i1dti14q850tge4huclfhfcm8_rp22sh2s8i66o75cdgm4ob2c5h2bs "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE")
---

The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here's the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream _because I have lived it._ My family went from cotton to congress in a **single lifetime.**

**This isn 't going to be easy.** I'll need your help to win.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0o7djqrg79hgejfrlnkgpjr7t0dph1tn5ro7pc0_rp22sh2s8i66o75cdgm4ob2c5h2bs "I NEED YOUR HELP TO WIN!")
---

**_[Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zik9o3p466df48n2tk0f4svnstahemuuq6i18e2o_rp22sh2s8i66o75cdgm4ob2c5h2bs "Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?")_**

This campaign relies on very generous gifts from people just like you. Trust me, I know that times are tough in Joe Biden's America, so even if it's just $5 I would be so grateful.

Thank you for your support!

-Tim
---

---
| | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
---

1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD
CHARLESTON, SC 29407

[Privacy Policy](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5mf9bnnbdqtdcgih7uepkto1ui6tkk1fp4a7ml8_rp22sh2s8i66o75cdgm4ob2c5h2bs)

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0kp5oqamrrmlc02nefmn0ms83kcnqno6aab9ve8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni68p31cpj66oh1k8gn48n24hhm1pb3c5h62oj1c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5o974dnfuap99jb6lp73eugd57825n42o4s5858_rp22sh2s8i66o75cdgm4ob2c5h2bs)_

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Our children are under attack
body:
If you’re sick and tired of the radical Left running roughshod over our rights...

| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, If you’re sick and tired of the radical Left running roughshod over our rights... If you’ve had it with the do-nothings in Washington who’ve let these radicals take over our government, intelligence community, schools, media, and corporations... I’m right there with you. My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I’m an attorney and a conservative. And since the do-nothings in Washington won’t lift a finger to stop the radicals who are destroying our country... ...I’m helping patriots just like you take matters into their own hands by...
---
...dragging these freedom-robbing radicals into court, ...bringing them to justice, ...and making them pay.
---
In a minute, I’ll tell you more about some of the cases my non-profit the _Center for American Liberty_ and I have taken on and won to defend freedom and shut down the Left. [**But first, I have to tell you the urgent reason I’m writing you today and why I’m asking you to make a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14300%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IMxDaW%2f0%2fjboKmfM752UwA&sysid=1) And even though we’ve never met, I’m asking you to join the fight for parental rights with me. Our client is a mother who’s risking everything to stand up to the out-of-control radicals in California schools. And if she wins, what a victory it’ll be for all of us who are sick and tired of these elitist “educators” lecturing us... and hijacking our children and grandchildren! This landmark case was announced on **Jesse Watters Primetime** but in case you missed it, let me recap... **Aurora Regino’s daughter was in the 5th grade in California’s Chico Unified School District when a school guidance counselor took it upon herself to “assess” that Aurora’s daughter was a “boy.”** Aurora’s daughter was given a new name, new pronouns, and a whole new identity to be used secretly at school. **_There wasn’t a single phone call home._** On the contrary, the guidance counselor manipulated Aurora’s daughter into keeping everything that was going on a secret from her own mother. If you’re the conservative I think you are, you see the real and present danger here. **If we lose this case, for the first time in American history, schools across the country will have a green light to overturn a parent’s authority and values.** **And radicals will be 100% free to use government schools -- the schools you’re forced to pay for -- as re-education centers for every one of their twisted and anti-American ideas that go against what you and I believe.** Aurora Regino is suing California’s Chico Unified School District because PARENTS have a fundamental right under the Fourteenth Amendment of the United States Constitution... ...to direct the upbringing of their children. Radicals at the California Department of Education think they can get away with what they’re doing because they adopted “guidelines” that PROHIBIT schools from notifying parents of gender transitions until the _student_ decides its ok! I can tell you, as long as I’m involved, no California Dept. of Ed “guideline” is going to tell parents how to raise their children! Aurora’s daughter was 11-years-old when her guidance counselor convinced her she was a “boy.” By law, she wasn’t old enough to get a tattoo or get her learner’s permit to drive. But the woke radicals at the California Department of Education say 11-year-olds can make life-altering decisions about their gender. And parents need to be kept in the dark. I don’t know what’s more insane... ...that we’re talking about girls being boys or that schools think they should have more control over children than parents do! Our case can stop this madness. Our case MUST stop this madness. But on her own, Aurora Regino would never have the resources to battle the leftist giants in California. **Battles like this are why I started the _Center for American Liberty_.**
---
**> > We bring together attorneys who want to fight for what’s right...** **> > People like Aurora Regino who otherwise would have no choice but to let these elitist radicals steamroll right over her and her daughter...** **> > And patriots like you who offer whatever financial support you can to fund these freedom-saving cases. **
---
| | And our unique strategy is taking down the Left. The _Center for American Liberty_ has already won THREE Supreme Court cases... we’ve had multiple victories for religious freedom... ...and right now, in addition to Aurora Regino’s case concerning parental rights.... ...we’re fighting to stop government censorship of conservatives... to get justice for journalist Andy Ngo who was beaten by Antifa thugs while liberal politicians did nothing... ...and we just launched a historic case suing activist doctors who mutilate children with barbaric “transgender” surgeries. The _Center for American Liberty_ is honored to be fighting in the courts to protect your freedom to say what you want, to live according to the dictates of your conscience, and to pass on your values to the next generation. [**Will you help us by making an urgent donation of $35, $50, $100 or more today?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14301%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NyFo0HVY6ssGeEOrNVXEFQ&sysid=1) Your generous gift is your direct way to help Aurora Regino \-- and all the other patriots whose cases we’re working on right now. But I can’t wait two weeks, three weeks, or a month to know what resources we have to use. The Left is gathering its army to defeat us. And the giant ACLU has already tried to throw its might behind the radicals at the Chico Unified School District. [**So please, will you make a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $75, $100, $200 $500, or more? Contributions of ANY size are so appreciated.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14302%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NROX926e%2bEWmFrPY5maPqw&sysid=1) But because the stakes are so high in this case, I have to mention -- I’m looking for 10 patriots who are able to rush back $1,000 each in the next 48 hours to fund this case as we prepare for oral arguments. Whether you can help with $35, $1,000 or any amount higher or lower, your gift will go far in this battle to beat back the Left. Thank you, my fellow patriot. Some days it seems like the radicals will never stop advancing -- but I know we can bring them to a screeching halt in the courts. Thank you for doing your part.
---
| | Thank you and God Bless,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
Founder & CEO
---
|
---
| | P.S. Time is critical. [**Please rush your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $200, $500, $1,000 or more in the next 48 hours. It’s time to stop these radicals and make them pay.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c14303%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wrZNKNYAnTbqhLYWgKBSnA&sysid=1)

clean_body: If you’re sick and tired of the radical Left running roughshod over our rights... | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, If you’re sick and tired of the radical Left running roughshod over our rights... If you’ve had it with the do-nothings in Washington who’ve let these radicals take over our government, intelligence community, schools, media, and corporations... I’m right there with you. My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I’m an attorney and a conservative. And since the do-nothings in Washington won’t lift a finger to stop the radicals who are destroying our country... ...I’m helping patriots just like you take matters into their own hands by... ...dragging these freedom-robbing radicals into court, ...bringing them to justice, ...and making them pay. In a minute, I’ll tell you more about some of the cases my non-profit the Center for American Liberty and I have taken on and won to defend freedom and shut down the Left. And even though we’ve never met, I’m asking you to join the fight for parental rights with me. Our client is a mother who’s risking everything to stand up to the out-of-control radicals in California schools. And if she wins, what a victory it’ll be for all of us who are sick and tired of these elitist “educators” lecturing us... and hijacking our children and grandchildren! This landmark case was announced on Jesse Watters Primetime but in case you missed it, let me recap... Aurora Regino’s daughter was in the 5th grade in California’s Chico Unified School District when a school guidance counselor took it upon herself to “assess” that Aurora’s daughter was a “boy.” Aurora’s daughter was given a new name, new pronouns, and a whole new identity to be used secretly at school. There wasn’t a single phone call home. On the contrary, the guidance counselor manipulated Aurora’s daughter into keeping everything that was going on a secret from her own mother. If you’re the conservative I think you are, you see the real and present danger here. If we lose this case, for the first time in American history, schools across the country will have a green light to overturn a parent’s authority and values. And radicals will be 100% free to use government schools -- the schools you’re forced to pay for -- as re-education centers for every one of their twisted and anti-American ideas that go against what you and I believe. Aurora Regino is suing California’s Chico Unified School District because PARENTS have a fundamental right under the Fourteenth Amendment of the United States Constitution... ...to direct the upbringing of their children. Radicals at the California Department of Education think they can get away with what they’re doing because they adopted “guidelines” that PROHIBIT schools from notifying parents of gender transitions until the student decides its ok! I can tell you, as long as I’m involved, no California Dept. of Ed “guideline” is going to tell parents how to raise their children! Aurora’s daughter was 11-years-old when her guidance counselor convinced her she was a “boy.” By law, she wasn’t old enough to get a tattoo or get her learner’s permit to drive. But the woke radicals at the California Department of Education say 11-year-olds can make life-altering decisions about their gender. And parents need to be kept in the dark. I don’t know what’s more insane... ...that we’re talking about girls being boys or that schools think they should have more control over children than parents do! Our case can stop this madness. Our case MUST stop this madness. But on her own, Aurora Regino would never have the resources to battle the leftist giants in California. Battles like this are why I started the Center for American Liberty. > We bring together attorneys who want to fight for what’s right... > > People like Aurora Regino who otherwise would have no choice but to let these elitist radicals steamroll right over her and her daughter... > > And patriots like you who offer whatever financial support you can to fund these freedom-saving cases. | | And our unique strategy is taking down the Left. The Center for American Liberty has already won THREE Supreme Court cases... we’ve had multiple victories for religious freedom... ...and right now, in addition to Aurora Regino’s case concerning parental rights.... ...we’re fighting to stop government censorship of conservatives... to get justice for journalist Andy Ngo who was beaten by Antifa thugs while liberal politicians did nothing... ...and we just launched a historic case suing activist doctors who mutilate children with barbaric “transgender” surgeries. The Center for American Liberty is honored to be fighting in the courts to protect your freedom to say what you want, to live according to the dictates of your conscience, and to pass on your values to the next generation. Your generous gift is your direct way to help Aurora Regino \-- and all the other patriots whose cases we’re working on right now. But I can’t wait two weeks, three weeks, or a month to know what resources we have to use. The Left is gathering its army to defeat us. And the giant ACLU has already tried to throw its might behind the radicals at the Chico Unified School District. But because the stakes are so high in this case, I have to mention -- I’m looking for 10 patriots who are able to rush back $1,000 each in the next 48 hours to fund this case as we prepare for oral arguments. Whether you can help with $35, $1,000 or any amount higher or lower, your gift will go far in this battle to beat back the Left. Thank you, my fellow patriot. Some days it seems like the radicals will never stop advancing -- but I know we can bring them to a screeching halt in the courts. Thank you for doing your part. | | Thank you and God Bless, Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO | | | P.S. Time is critical. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. My name is Fred Guttenberg. Since losing my daughter, Jaime, in the Parkland school shooting over five years ago, I’ve dedicated my life to trying to prevent more gun violence tragedies in America.

**That’s why I need to talk to you about Annie’s new organization, Their Future PAC, and the work they’re doing to tackle the problems our kids are facing.**

**_[First, though, I need to ask you to join me by contributing $10 to this organization that I am so proud to support.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w_lFHxeGZje-SUFN05SFbCcYUzzBshfAMuBYDM1HdZO5obqZh7Akb3izetiMv71SfaDYmnkW5vRIUVmr73SvK5Lr8ctizzkJF8Uxq3bk7UtuKiyE5lYQ5bYsAEzbpbGnK4hjBZlFRNylq-Ua2pS16ShyqsWyFLMIN8xWvNAkS2b75e7xZbcyK3AKCNFDcC2KIIG4wyMZ9mAIrGjqOGRqhPdC6IFh-d1SfwrDEAPVpp7mn7SBIot7VIFG19lB-1mPujw7mJnrrUY0EoB2VVYxCUmkoHTnmr-kFquv1Qev0DatwTiIy8mZiyaVQRoOdPEZuyDorM2ndutNxVeHg36BS45cdJvuliDujOxr2GUGmmbaP-hyTS-wmWjQiIVGGl-ZkZwx1sf1AD8YJBE0GbTpju/3wo/_5ZFGd9pT0y0JHbz2LZMSQ/h1/suN0pdMntgsjTb_Q22A4QAe5X91NT4uesRF83gaJ0OY)_**

Annie is a fierce advocate for common sense gun laws because, as a pediatrician, she knows that gun violence is the leading cause of childhood death in America and has seen kids with bullet wounds too many times in her hospital.

While I was saddened that her congressional campaign did not succeed, I am proud she’s not giving up the fight. In 2022, she saw the appetite folks have for action, and with Their Future PAC, is putting everything she has into affecting real change.

Her new organization is dedicated to ending the stress of mass shootings in our schools, as well as combating the climate crisis, making healthcare more affordable, and strengthening our democracy. I’m putting my support behind Their Future PAC and I’m asking you to as well.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Why I voted no on the McCarthy agreement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

This week, President Biden and Republicans reached an agreement on the debt ceiling. But that deal is not a genuine bipartisan agreement; it concedes to the unreasonable demands of Republicans who held the debt ceiling hostage for their own agenda.

Democrats should have abolished the debt ceiling and the filibuster when we had Congressional majorities. We should have used the 14th Amendment to achieve a clean debt ceiling increase. But here we are.

If the GOP cared about the deficit, they would not pass tax cuts for the rich and cripple the ability of the IRS to go after tax cheats. They would agree to raise revenue and cut excessive defense contractor spending instead.

The McCarthy agreement puts hundreds of thousands of SNAP recipients up to 54 years old at risk by implementing new “work requirements” designed to deny benefits to some of our most vulnerable. It resumes student loan payments that have burdened tens of millions of Americans and reinvigorates the cycle of crushing debt that has stunted economic growth. It fast-tracks the disastrous Mountain Valley Pipeline, locking us into fossil fuel dependency as the climate crisis worsens.

As a political calculation, the McCarthy agreement allows America to pay its bills for the time being. But I believe we need to do better. The concessions made in this deal do nothing but harm hardworking Americans while giving wealthy donors, corporations, and big-money interests a pass.

This is not about politics, it’s about people. That’s why I voted no on the McCarthy agreement. We need to set a precedent of the Treasury paying bills that Congress has authorized and take the issue to the courts so that we never have a manufactured default crisis again.

I will continue to fight for the policies Americans deserve, because when working people thrive, everyone benefits.

Onward,
Ro

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ngp-email-footer?refcode=20230601-mccarthy-debt-ceiling-agreement]

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Join Jim Herring for a book signing!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8133068?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

I have just finished reading a rather good book about Mississippi politics. **"The Switcher," by Judge Jim Herring, is a biographical account of Mississippi’s colorful election campaigns and candidates.

Jim will be premiering "The Switcher" at a book signing on a Tuesday!**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=64a0af30d5&e=5703353baa)
---
_**Click on the image above for details!**_
| **"The Switcher," as the name implies, is a book about one man’s personal journey from the Democrats to the Republicans.** But it is also the story of how an entire state flipped to the GOP.

A former chairman of the Mississippi GOP, Herring himself remains consistent to his political principles across each chapter of the book, favoring limited taxes, light regulation and adherence to the Constitution.

**Tickets to the event are free, and reservations are not required! He would hope to see you there!**

---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=407e5e283a&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| | |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _

Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

name: Vikram Mansharamani
subject: John Avlon and Vikram Mansharamani - NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY
body:
Podcast, radio show, conversations...
| | | |
---
# John Avlon, CNN Political Analyst and Author of "Lincoln and the Fight for Peace"
---
In this episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with John Avlon, Senior Political Analyst at CNN and author fo the recently released LINCOLN AND THE FIGHT FOR PEACE. John shares lessons learned from his study of American political history and his thoughts on how we can move beyond today's political polarization. He also reflects on Lincoln's recipe for peace (unconditional surrender followed by a magnanimous peace) and how it has remained an influential factor in American foreign policy for more than a century. Tune in via the links below.

---
---
PRIOR EPISODES ALL AVAILABLE ON DEMAND!
For those who missed the prior episodes of NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY, have no fear! They're all available on demand via the links below. As you sit in traffic during your weekend trips, tune in and use the opportunity to learn about some fascinating people as well as some of the most important topics of our times!
You'll find my conversations with Derek Leathers, Chairman & CEO of Werner Enterprises, Rudy Glocker, Founder of Burgeon Outdoor, former US Senator Kelly Ayotte, NCUA Vice Chair Kyle Hauptman, Miami Mayor Francis Suarez, NH Governor Chris Sununu, NH Education Czar Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Business and Economic Affairs Taylor Caswell, GOP Presidential Candidate Vivek Ramaswamy, former Commander of NORAD and Retired Four Star General Lori Robinson, and former Chair of House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Mike Rogers.

---
| |
---
---
|
---
|
Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist [Vikram Mansharamani](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bcUHKX19GHXdgj_OZMJeqBPTQQ5B0Y8VaokeY3CdX0ywVvCh2Uf3mfSDrFT8s_mbNq_9RCiaLzTK3mB7xVNgSgj1mMf0w8usraCiqGlYFDZWCsEds4GwYdD-mkzkoY9K3i5N247EGfDAYXTFNX2DLQ==&c=hkWkOI7WxdASzF8pGGmOTyykzu5UzKd5_Y1TmcF9JBiFtIRaTzQjaQ==&ch=GCwSG0nwGxq00EdoBgOhH8jSbXaLyeApqPnLFc6eXkK1bPR8mQSMag==) dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available!
To learn more about Dr. Mansharamani, please visit his website at [www.mansharamani.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bcUHKX19GHXdgj_OZMJeqBPTQQ5B0Y8VaokeY3CdX0ywVvCh2Uf3mfSDrFT8s_mbNq_9RCiaLzTK3mB7xVNgSgj1mMf0w8usraCiqGlYFDZWCsEds4GwYdD-mkzkoY9K3i5N247EGfDAYXTFNX2DLQ==&c=hkWkOI7WxdASzF8pGGmOTyykzu5UzKd5_Y1TmcF9JBiFtIRaTzQjaQ==&ch=GCwSG0nwGxq00EdoBgOhH8jSbXaLyeApqPnLFc6eXkK1bPR8mQSMag==).

Peter, I wouldn’t reach out if it wasn’t important. But I just checked our fundraising numbers and **we missed our crucial end of month goal by $1,673 and we're counting on your gift to help close the gap now. **
**Any shortfall in our fundraising efforts means LESS support, training, and resources to help Democratic women run for office** and fight for our rights in every state. That’s why we’re **extending our deadline but just by ONE more day**.
**[As one of our top supporters, will you help us make up this shortfall by donating $5 or more now – before our extension expires at midnight tonight? Every dollar fuels our recruitment and training programs to empower Democratic women to run and win from school boards to the U.S. Congress.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64160766/409205572/-1986725773?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1234-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk4OGYwNjA1LThkMDAtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=z-e59Rk65LhNCtwNC1Cifhv88g81kwJe6m2o3K733-8=)**

Jasmine Smith

**[Emerge MUST raise $10,000 by midnight on May 31 to expand our programs and empower bold Democratic women in every state. Please donate now!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64160770/409205603/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1234-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk4OGYwNjA1LThkMDAtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=z-e59Rk65LhNCtwNC1Cifhv88g81kwJe6m2o3K733-8=)**
This is serious, Peter.

State by state, Republican lawmakers are accelerating their attacks on abortion rights and denying access to lifesaving health care for our LGBTQ+ community – all while deliberately _failing_ to address the gun violence epidemic devastating our country right now.

We know that Democratic women are the fighters we need to defend our rights and turn our country around. **But they're counting on Emerge** for the training, support and strategy they need to run for office and win!

**Emerge is the ONLY organization ****dedicated to recruiting and training Democratic women of the New American Majority to break glass ceilings in politics ****and turn outrage into lifesaving policy change** **– and we need YOUR help to continue this urgent work. **

body:
**Love should never mean having to live in fear.
[
I am an LGBTQ+ Democrat running against Republican Rep. Obernolte who voted NO on equal rights for LGBTQ+ Americans. Will you chip in to my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64160780/409205640/-727517715?amount=10&refcode=pl_20230531_03&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MThmMDYwNS04ZDAwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E798IES_9MP_BfxLN1-Tm9P31DZTvfukXVvRDvCcNvc=)**
---
Peter**,** the LGBTQ+ community is under siege. “Don’t Say Gay” laws spreading around the country and attacks against companies that support LGBTQ+ rights are creating a legitimate climate of fear.

Florida, the home of the hate agenda, has forced Pride organizers across the state to cancel their Pride events, because it isn’t safe there.

Budweiser and Target Corporation are pulling back their support for the LGBTQ+ community because homophobic MAGAs are threatening violence.

**So much has happened in the past allowing me to run as an openly gay candidate and so much still needs to happen to guarantee the safety of young queer lives.

[I need your help to fight like hell for that future. name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: I wanted you to be the first to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for AG
body:
Supporters like you have been a huge part of everything we’ve accomplished, now it’s time to take the next step!
---
Friend, Over the years, your unwavering support has meant a great deal to me, and for that reason, I wanted you to be the first to know about the exciting new chapter in my public service journey. **Today, I am officially announcing my candidacy for Attorney General of Pennsylvania**. After serving two terms as Auditor General, and for three terms in the State House, I am eager to apply the experience and dedication I demonstrated in those roles to fighting for and serving the people of Pennsylvania as your Attorney General. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64161210/409206961/351240497?refcode=06012023launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDIyZDE0OC04ZDAwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QRYfPr7kLQYHhnIYB3sUld75aReXlI-yEARyMmPGCWQ=)
_Be one of the first to watch Eugene's announcement video!_ You know my story - growing up in Western Pennsylvania, I learned early on what it meant to be a fighter, to stand up for others when they couldn't stand up for themselves. My experiences - caring for my brother with muscular dystrophy, supporting my family after my father went to jail, and tackling crime and corruption as Auditor General - have shaped me and my commitment to public service. Throughout my career, I have been dedicated to going after criminals, corrupt public officials, and extreamists. I have fought to ensure justice for survivors of sexual assault, worked tirelessly to protect our children, stood up for women's rights, and rooted out corruption. As Attorney General, I will take these experiences and use them to go after the bad actors who threaten our freedoms. **I am running to make our communities safer, defend reproductive rights, safeguard taxpayer dollars, and take on the extreamists who threaten our rights and freedoms.** This fight cannot be won alone, and I need your support now more than ever. Let's take this journey together because, together, we can make a difference. Best regards,
Eugene DePasquale
Candidate for Attorney General of Pennsylvania
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64161212/409206965/351240497?refcode=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDIyZDE0OC04ZDAwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QRYfPr7kLQYHhnIYB3sUld75aReXlI-yEARyMmPGCWQ=) | Paid for by DePasquale for AG

clean_body: Supporters like you have been a huge part of everything we’ve accomplished, now it’s time to take the next step! Friend, Over the years, your unwavering support has meant a great deal to me, and for that reason, I wanted you to be the first to know about the exciting new chapter in my public service journey. Today, I am officially announcing my candidacy for Attorney General of Pennsylvania. After serving two terms as Auditor General, and for three terms in the State House, I am eager to apply the experience and dedication I demonstrated in those roles to fighting for and serving the people of Pennsylvania as your Attorney General. = Be one of the first to watch Eugene's announcement video! You know my story - growing up in Western Pennsylvania, I learned early on what it meant to be a fighter, to stand up for others when they couldn't stand up for themselves. My experiences - caring for my brother with muscular dystrophy, supporting my family after my father went to jail, and tackling crime and corruption as Auditor General - have shaped me and my commitment to public service. Throughout my career, I have been dedicated to going after criminals, corrupt public officials, and extreamists. I have fought to ensure justice for survivors of sexual assault, worked tirelessly to protect our children, stood up for women's rights, and rooted out corruption. As Attorney General, I will take these experiences and use them to go after the bad actors who threaten our freedoms. I am running to make our communities safer, defend reproductive rights, safeguard taxpayer dollars, and take on the extreamists who threaten our rights and freedoms. This fight cannot be won alone, and I need your support now more than ever. Let's take this journey together because, together, we can make a difference. Best regards, Eugene DePasquale Candidate for Attorney General of Pennsylvania = | Paid for by DePasquale for AG DePasquale for AG PO Box 53043 Pittsburgh, PA 15219 Contributions are not tax deductible. MAGA Republicans only care about the rich. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvXTqhEItcAfXhYPZs7wch102fkH-zGXif-3CurrhoKIQaPqJbw8OHZcpjQhPXQQKuR27bg-ixLq9XJSR_oVjuD5RHu1MOe08I5IG4jLfn7J0ioywd-EHNAKdLAZcyUQwWUo3vPLjTnKLnqynKly-lImT3L8ocslQCNsz1oBKUvIBWZkhMLw9im5MenG4v_2HjW8urk9vWRaVIp-YFvjeg1A/3wo/IK_8uFhbQvqPEykI1577jA/h0/beIXl2LzW07KtYKJ47ImH4NkQzb3C-j_XHbiYrBB3Fk)

Friend, Last night, MAGA Republicans rammed through a debt ceiling deal that is a direct assault on our communities. It loosens environmental protections, allowing **corporate polluters** to fast track dirty fossil fuel projects. It adds **harsh restrictions to SNAP and TANF** , jeopardizing access to food and essential cash aid for vulnerable communities. And it actually **increases Pentagon spending** while placing caps on services for working families. Even as Republicans have cried crocodile tears about our country’s national debt, we’ve known all along that their cruel bill was not about limiting debt or deficits. **It was about paying for even more tax cuts for the rich and corporations.** Now, as the dust settles on Republican hostage-taking, they plan to introduce a tax package in the next two weeks that makes the expiring portions of the Trump tax scam permanent. **That means they passed a debt ceiling and budget deal that hurts vulnerable families—just to help pay for permanent tax cuts for the rich and corporations!** **We’re fighting back and that means holding Republicans accountable to the voters who sent them to Congress.** [**Donate today to the Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC to win back the House of Representatives, not just with Democrats, but with progressives―and stop future deals that put the wealthy and greedy corporations ahead of the working class.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lK5VxRlR5hApiBFL0wUHBqkqDVMmeHlhzIziZfvDisbW2MDEX49yzxZle52EukdOntmCtqZq-r4k9xlXExIR_xFnhGvJOU5573tGQzpCtL-HFKFEvpMkk9E0xBssfdubuwbVKW8bap4T0UHjAMYssCLpUED1DJnCXlr7J0MZvZqUUBimKjhsWOM_w1wlT8oLabql-ceCuiKR_C6LVuZsjmFAOTofCZeOiPsXRAE834RxolTtn_14fnMSU-4qvr1j3vYMNKhAiTqIgj0Rzttd5fpqbScKJTwci4Z2JxI_4oZfAQfIooMiXgMAOq7bIyq1RW9amSXUakaHpJbxOLOmjXdBTiIlgND8K8Wd8_-HWuCVhO06Qt4PVuDAG14Dfu_Ae_/3wo/IK_8uFhbQvqPEykI1577jA/h1/Qw44LEJ-CmMLtpjuXZb0kAbNVySMYhhjiDD7-mFej4A) As we’ve seen time and again, not every Democrat in Congress is willing to stand up to Big Money, Big Oil, or greedy corporate interests. It’s thanks to the tireless efforts of progressives that we limited the damage done in the debt ceiling deal. And it’s how we secured much-needed investments last year in our nation’s care economy and in climate action.
**Without our work, together, we would not have protected 21 million people from being kicked off of Medicaid.** And we would be seeing harsh cuts instead of caps to critical programs and services. But we’ve got to keep building progressive power in Congress in order to make the transformative changes that our communities need.
[**The Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC is critical in electing allies who will fight by our side for environmental, racial, economic, and social justice. clean_body: MAGA Republicans only care about the rich. | | | Friend, Last night, MAGA Republicans rammed through a debt ceiling deal that is a direct assault on our communities. It loosens environmental protections, allowing corporate polluters to fast track dirty fossil fuel projects. It adds harsh restrictions to SNAP and TANF , jeopardizing access to food and essential cash aid for vulnerable communities. And it actually increases Pentagon spending while placing caps on services for working families. Even as Republicans have cried crocodile tears about our country’s national debt, we’ve known all along that their cruel bill was not about limiting debt or deficits. It was about paying for even more tax cuts for the rich and corporations. Now, as the dust settles on Republican hostage-taking, they plan to introduce a tax package in the next two weeks that makes the expiring portions of the Trump tax scam permanent. That means they passed a debt ceiling and budget deal that hurts vulnerable families—just to help pay for permanent tax cuts for the rich and corporations! We’re fighting back and that means holding Republicans accountable to the voters who sent them to Congress. | As we’ve seen time and again, not every Democrat in Congress is willing to stand up to Big Money, Big Oil, or greedy corporate interests. It’s thanks to the tireless efforts of progressives that we limited the damage done in the debt ceiling deal. And it’s how we secured much-needed investments last year in our nation’s care economy and in climate action. Without our work, together, we would not have protected 21 million people from being kicked off of Medicaid. And we would be seeing harsh cuts instead of caps to critical programs and services. But we’ve got to keep building progressive power in Congress in order to make the transformative changes that our communities need. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for being by my side as, together, we fight for a future that includes all of us, not just the wealthy few. Always serving you, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: NH Senate Republicans
subject: ALERT: NH Senate Democrats threaten to hold up state budgeting process
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Hampshire Senate Republicans PAC
body:
| |
---

| Friends,
ICYMI, this week Senate Democrats on the Finance Committee voted AGAINST funding our state government with our bi-annual FY 24-25 State Budget. This came as a big surprise to all involved in what was an open, honest and bipartisan budget process.
We were especially taken aback after the House of Representatives, in a historic showing of bipartisanship just a few weeks ago, **unanimously** voted in favor of the budget!
The budget that NH Senate Democrats are now trying to hold up is the same budget that includes:

* Protection for NH taxpayers – our budget cuts three-quarters of a billion dollars in excess spending
* No new or higher taxes
* Critical funding for law enforcement
* Reauthorization of Medicaid Expansion
* Increased rates for health care providers
* Funding to combat our housing and child care crisis
* Pay raises for state employees
* Increased education funding for property tax relief
* Increased resources for water and sewer and roads and bridges for property tax relief
* Better protection of the Northern Border
* Increased resources for mental health.
* And new resources to enable NH seniors to stay in their homes.

Will you help us send a message to Senate Democrats that we want a true bi-partisan fiscally responsible budget by [signing our petition here](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMjI3NjMzODAwMTY1MjAxMDk3JmM9eDhwOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0xMTQ5MzExOTY3JmQ9bTd2NXAwYQ==.1hBijmQwqqu6P5DEesU8yCRN7a1F-aLsN0W3bfVeS1I)?
Thank you, NH Senate Republicans

Featured Article:

** The Latino Education Gap: Implications For Employers (https://www.hrpolicy.org/insight-and-research/resources/2023/hr-workforce/public/05/the-latino-education-gap-implications-for-employer/)

By Michele A. Carlin and Mike Madrid

May 30, 2023 - The face of America is changing, driven by a historic demographic transformation. Within the next two decades, the number of non-Hispanic Whites is expected to decline to less than half of the population, a shift driven by an increasing Latino population. Latinos make up one in five workers and have contributed an estimated three-quarters of the entire labor force expansion since 2009. But there’s another fact about this segment of the workforce that will have significant implications for America’s employers: Latinos rank lowest in educational achievement among racial and ethnic groups.

Only three quarters of Latinos have completed high school, compared with over 90% of their non-Latino peers. Despite improvements in the past decade, Latinos have college completion rates below all other groups. This educational underachievement means an increasing segment of the available labor pool is ill-equipped for today’s jobs, let alone those of the future, and the burden of preparing those workers will fall to employers. This is not a new development. According to ** College is Just the Beginning (https://files.eric.ed.gov/fulltext/ED558166.pdf)
, in 2015 America’s employers spent $177 billion on formal post-secondary education, and a staggering $413 billion on informal, on-the-job training each year. The growing gap between workforce preparation and the jobs of the future will require a continued high level of investment.

How is this investment delivered? In addition to on-the-job training, most large employers offer educational assistance as part of a comprehensive employee benefits package. These programs provide tax-free financial aid equal, on average, to $5,250 for undergraduate degree and $10,500 for graduate programs. But despite their widespread adoption by employers, only a fraction of employees take advantage of them. A ** study (https://hrpolicy-my.sharepoint.com/personal/ahuang_execcomp_org/_layouts/15/onedrive.aspx?id=%2Fpersonal%2Fahuang%5Fexeccomp%5Forg%2FDocuments%2FMicrosoft%20Teams%20Chat%20Files%2Febook%2Dwhat%2Demployees%2Dthink%2Dabout%2Dtraditional%2Deducation%2Dprograms%2Epdf&parent=%2Fpersonal%2Fahuang%5Fexeccomp%5Forg%2FDocuments%2FMicrosoft%20Teams%20Chat%20Files&ga=1)
by InStride and Bain & Company found that while 80% of employees expressed interest in attending school while working, only 40% knew their employer offered educational assistance and only 2% took advantage of the benefit. The reason? Poor communication, complex administration and requiring workers to pay tuition upfront and seek reimbursement after completion, something that is out of reach financially for most workers.

Traditional approaches to supporting the educational needs and aspirations of the emerging workforce may not be enough to close the education gap. Some more modernized programs seek to address the cash flow challenge of the traditional model by offering company-funded assistance instead of reimbursement. In addition to addressing the cash flow challenge, companies will need to create conditions that allow workers to take advantage of the financial support offered by traditional programs. This includes developing new, more flexible work arrangements that help employees integrate their learning journey into their personal lives. This is especially important for Latino workers, for whom family obligations are often primary. Employees may also need the help of dedicated resources to help them navigate the learning journey, so that the skills they are acquiring can be translated into jobs valued by both workers and employers.

Creating a work environment where learning is a core expectation, supported by the flexibility and financial resources needed for workers to succeed, will be key to creating talent strategies tailored to the changing American workforce.

** Learn More About The Latino Worker Project Here (https://www.hrpolicy.org/initiatives/council-on-inclusion-and-diversity/the-latino-worker-project/)

Thank You

Thank you for taking the time to read our updates. If you have any news to share, comments to make, or corrections for us, feel free to ** email us (mailto:info@latinos.vote)
anytime.

Best,

The ** The Latino Vote (https://latinos.vote/)
Team

body:
Social Security AND Medicare at risk
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teaf5a9c0-6bce-4891-8c42-07e602dd2483/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Last night, Kevin McCarthy announced on Fox News his intention to launch a commission to directly assault our Social Security & Medicare, with the intent to cut both****. ** _We warned you that the MAGA Republican Freedom Caucus wanted to blow up the debt ceiling and pay for it by stealing our Social Security. Now even though the debt ceiling bill has passed, Kevin McCarthy is still going to come after Social Security and Medicare._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T239409aa-757e-4621-ac1b-925a5ce83ac7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_This is not a drill! _** [**_Can you please join us in rushing Social Security Works $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to fight McCarthy's Social Security & Medicare ambush? The time to stop him is now, we may not get a chance later._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td8355b38-363d-492f-810a-842cc176bb19/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbeb8feae-53d2-49c1-97a5-ceed31e5b0e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Friend,
Tonight, I will be doing a voter town hall with Sean Hannity in Iowa – home of the FIRST CAUCUS of the Republican primary.
Most politicians usually hide from voters...
_...Lucky for you, I’m not a politician – so this might be my favorite part of the job._
To honor the GREAT TRADITION of America’s town halls, I’m also asking voters like YOU to take my Town Hall Survey to tell me if there’s a particular issue you want me to address tonight.
_As I always say, I am YOUR voice, and I want to be sure I’m representing you the best I can._
[**So please, take my survey *NO LATER THAN* 3:00 P.M. ET to tell me if there’s a particular issue YOU want me to address at tonight’s town hall.**](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGLnEAQhX9Ne1PaKm314CGbZiAM7C1syGXo6SpnarFbV9vI5tcHh9lcv_co3ke5MI8yfPaqeVEAd6FVASj8pgDO1cuvV3N-O9v8DG8ht6au9iOF7wogfc78v_q8UnBwMh60sRn14FvwPuO-NG1tsEbTZvfeUOc6zdeWkbV3RK4auBqocUhAQJn0oAG10WVpNGhTNFxyif6qh7Y2V6xUpXeJBU3RjfSeli3MhZ9CNvb3lOb1Memk4LSy3xYudokL09E4mPvDuQu8iHf5-yQx5cMWaXGySrzlfgpBUmJWcIp-NFhzXWrjO98ah6XC05bCJTDJFhTap6854Dpti2eF1svFPZl3YXZyiwrtl9NXMsXEMSm0HZRagbnEUUihTd29TfvP-e_wgI-PoH39HT5-2I-asqWneZdxlNU0qtK3Y8Hh9i8AAP__bJCOmA)

**Mar-a-Lago, FL—** In a new video, President Donald J. Trump pledged to honor America’s founding in 1776 with “Salute to America 250,” a one-year celebration of 250 years of American independence with Iowa at the center of the action.
“Three years from now, the United States will celebrate the biggest and most important milestone in our country’s history -- 250 years of American Independence,” President Trump said. “That’s why as a nation, we should be preparing for the most spectacular birthday party. We want to make it the best of all time.” ****
