clean_body: July 2016 was a turning point for me – that’s why I’m running for Congress. = NOTE: This is a longer email about why I’m running for Congress as a Democrat in TX-32. If you don’t have time to read this message, here’s a link you can use to contribute now:= July 7, 2016, was a night that changed my life. Initially, it was not my shift to work, but a change in the schedule made me the on-call trauma surgeon that evening. A few miles from my trauma center, hundreds of Dallas residents had gathered to peacefully protest the recent deaths of Black men at the hands of law enforcement officers. What should have been a night of unity for our community turned into tragedy when a sniper targeted law enforcement officers providing security for the event. Seven wounded officers were transported to my trauma center – three in critical condition. The hours that followed were the hardest of my career. Crisis moments are routine in a trauma center, but that particular night created a complexity of emotions I had never before experienced as a trauma surgeon. Our nation was already mourning from a mass shooting in Orlando, then more violence brought that anguish to more families. Our nation was in crisis– a crisis that I was only beginning to understand and one that spurred my decision to pursue change and healing beyond my profession of medicine. I was unable to save three of the officers brought to our trauma center that night. It is impossible for me to put into words the full weight of the grief, anger, and pain I felt. I was at a crossroads but I chose not to remain resigned to this reality of violence and death. I chose to fight back. Peter – I have told too many families that they would not see their loved ones alive again as a result of preventable violence. That July 7th, I realized I had the ability to affect change and save lives outside of the walls of the hospital. That was my call to action. The mayor asked me to Chair the Dallas Citizens Police Review Board to help bridge the gap in trust between our communities and law enforcement. The County Judge asked me to serve as his Special Advisor for Health Equity during the pandemic. Inspired by our success, I went on to work for Speaker Nancy Pelosi and Senator Chris Murphy advising on groundbreaking legislation to promote gun safety, reduce healthcare costs, and bolster our healthcare workforce. From these experiences, I learned the power our lawmakers hold to create life-saving change when we choose action over apathy. Gun safety, access to affordable healthcare, equitable community resources – these are all factors that we can directly address to save lives. But right now, we have too many leaders in Congress who lack the courage to stand up to special interests and big money and take action. That, too, we can change. Throughout my career on the frontlines of medicine, I’ve seen too much needless death and suffering. Treating my patients, listening to their stories, and feeling their pain, is my motivation for this journey. My unique perspective on the problems our communities face is what Washington needs, and I’m ready to bring a crucially needed voice to Congress. = | = Together, we can create life-saving change. Onward, = Dr. Brian Williams Dr. Brian Williams is an Air Force Academy graduate, a Harvard-trained surgeon, a former congressional health policy advisor, and a nationally recognized leader at the intersection of public policy and structural racism, gun violence, and health equity. Dr. Williams is ready to bring his years of experience to Congress to fix our broken systems and save lives. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: The radical left is running roughshod over our rights
body:
If you're sick and tired of the radical Left running roughshod over our rights...

| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, If you're sick and tired of the radical Left running roughshod over our rights... If you've had it with the do-nothings in Washington who've let these radicals take over our government, intelligence community, schools, media, and corporations... I'm right there with you. My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I'm an attorney and a conservative. And since the do-nothings in Washington won't lift a finger to stop the radicals who are destroying our country... ...I'm helping patriots just like you take matters into their own hands by...
---
...dragging these freedom-robbing radicals into court, ...bringing them to justice, ...and making them pay.
---
In a minute, I'll tell you more about some of the cases my non-profit the _Center for American Liberty_ and I have taken on and won to defend freedom and shut down the Left. [**But first, I have to tell you the urgent reason I 'm writing you today and why I'm asking you to make a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2d88be6aa9b148a49ecb9d594fdb7b7f&_e=MjSKsgrMsidxF_fzPKLiIngo5_tqofIEaYtvZI3HGmPNX6JqdenqthDNK8cKO88Q_shYhZjom4HJAyeyj_5eJOudekER2F_hPfGAdsvVQH3uPfIis160Mf2lbeDNI_BwaXedTgbqeiH2wiw837k_4xmwqd1efI14dMxG5Ac7PkCSAXLNirln9yYv_WQ07oEgWyL2rc0KU0c90u-khB1ci9XeSMHaDTZcq0eNxX8oVQUTB_4lDjx4Hczdllf2zlu9CnXv0qqfQpQAYMsK-iX82oDM0Pq2hY4UoCE401j7HkEYRrtx8h_S0WOEYescrVE_Syqjd_hFd0Q6bd3KPc_6cXfGsu2x41g7zqEDFDgTi-T6n8fDDMMZ3TMGw628KGstuaufFAFkmIvLHcNUUXAXMA%3D%3D) And even though we've never met, I'm asking you to join the fight for parental rights with me. Our client is a mother who's risking everything to stand up to the out-of-control radicals in California schools. And if she wins, what a victory it'll be for all of us who are sick and tired of these elitist "educators" lecturing us... and hijacking our children and grandchildren! This landmark case was announced on **Jesse Watters Primetime** but in case you missed it, let me recap... **Aurora Regino 's daughter was in the 5th grade in California's Chico Unified School District when a school guidance counselor took it upon herself to "assess" that Aurora's daughter was a "boy." ** Aurora's daughter was given a new name, new pronouns, and a whole new identity to be used secretly at school. **_There wasn 't a single phone call home._** On the contrary, the guidance counselor manipulated Aurora's daughter into keeping everything that was going on a secret from her own mother. If you're the conservative I think you are, you see the real and present danger here. **If we lose this case, for the first time in American history, schools across the country will have a green light to overturn a parent 's authority and values.** **And radicals will be 100% free to use government schools -- the schools you 're forced to pay for -- as re-education centers for every one of their twisted and anti-American ideas that go against what you and I believe. ** Aurora Regino is suing California's Chico Unified School District because PARENTS have a fundamental right under the Fourteenth Amendment of the United States Constitution... ...to direct the upbringing of their children. Radicals at the California Department of Education think they can get away with what they're doing because they adopted "guidelines" that PROHIBIT schools from notifying parents of gender transitions until the _student_ decides its ok! I can tell you, as long as I'm involved, no California Dept. of Ed "guideline" is going to tell parents how to raise their children! Aurora's daughter was 11-years-old when her guidance counselor convinced her she was a "boy." By law, she wasn't old enough to get a tattoo or get her learner's permit to drive. But the woke radicals at the California Department of Education say 11-year-olds can make life-altering decisions about their gender. And parents need to be kept in the dark. I don't know what's more insane... ...that we're talking about girls being boys or that schools think they should have more control over children than parents do! Our case can stop this madness. Our case MUST stop this madness. But on her own, Aurora Regino would never have the resources to battle the leftist giants in California. **Battles like this are why I started the _Center for American Liberty_.**
---
**> > We bring together attorneys who want to fight for what's right...** **> > People like Aurora Regino who otherwise would have no choice but to let these elitist radicals steamroll right over her and her daughter...** **> > And patriots like you who offer whatever financial support you can to fund these freedom-saving cases. **
---
| | And our unique strategy is taking down the Left. The _Center for American Liberty_ has already won THREE Supreme Court cases... we've had multiple victories for religious freedom... ...and right now, in addition to Aurora Regino's case concerning parental rights.... ...we're fighting to stop government censorship of conservatives... to get justice for journalist Andy Ngo who was beaten by Antifa thugs while liberal politicians did nothing... ...and we just launched a historic case suing activist doctors who mutilate children with barbaric "transgender" surgeries. The _Center for American Liberty_ is honored to be fighting in the courts to protect your freedom to say what you want, to live according to the dictates of your conscience, and to pass on your values to the next generation. [**Will you help us by making an urgent donation of $35, $50, $100 or more today?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2d88be6aa9b148a49ecb9d594fdb7b7f&_e=MjSKsgrMsidxF_fzPKLiIngo5_tqofIEaYtvZI3HGmPNX6JqdenqthDNK8cKO88Q_shYhZjom4HJAyeyj_5eJOudekER2F_hPfGAdsvVQH3uPfIis160Mf2lbeDNI_BwaXedTgbqeiH2wiw837k_4xmwqd1efI14dMxG5Ac7PkCSAXLNirln9yYv_WQ07oEgWyL2rc0KU0c90u-khB1ci9XeSMHaDTZcq0eNxX8oVQUTB_4lDjx4Hczdllf2zlu9K3BZJMI0fYYDyi4m_J4sARHla_sXzVWrkIDGvZVXcy5IIkeRf-Xg5hpFry2AEYuG0UDHnFZwRzjtYyNU2rCDtIeSNh9xRSf5acG2yET1XuYEpOCdw-fW2jtqfd1ljHHfSqTPxRUiNwrBulsLvxU95Q%3D%3D) Your generous gift is your direct way to help Aurora Regino -- and all the other patriots whose cases we're working on right now. But I can't wait two weeks, three weeks, or a month to know what resources we have to use. The Left is gathering its army to defeat us. And the giant ACLU has already tried to throw its might behind the radicals at the Chico Unified School District. [**So please, will you make a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $75, $100, $200 $500, or more? Contributions of ANY size are so appreciated.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2d88be6aa9b148a49ecb9d594fdb7b7f&_e=MjSKsgrMsidxF_fzPKLiIngo5_tqofIEaYtvZI3HGmPNX6JqdenqthDNK8cKO88Q_shYhZjom4HJAyeyj_5eJOudekER2F_hPfGAdsvVQH3uPfIis160Mf2lbeDNI_BwaXedTgbqeiH2wiw837k_4xmwqd1efI14dMxG5Ac7PkCSAXLNirln9yYv_WQ07oEgWyL2rc0KU0c90u-khB1ci9XeSMHaDTZcq0eNxX8oVQUTB_4lDjx4Hczdllf2zlu9DroggsAclT8g_ZURCKi_zoOkdOvfLNOPY8x28PNN32_7tQYtHSyWJu6wLu9JsjoiFZ6sTaIAUnW8mK5FlPFfy_aNA9SuwQmEdH2AyhJOLKn54b6aj5f6vBPZYaDK-Pn4s_D65-XvKJBmuDzuEUj6JA%3D%3D) But because the stakes are so high in this case, I have to mention -- I'm looking for 10 patriots who are able to rush back $1,000 each in the next 48 hours to fund this case as we prepare for oral arguments. Whether you can help with $35, $1,000 or any amount higher or lower, your gift will go far in this battle to beat back the Left. Thank you, my fellow patriot. Some days it seems like the radicals will never stop advancing -- but I know we can bring them to a screeching halt in the courts. Thank you for doing your part.
---
| | Thank you and God Bless,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon
---
Founder & CEO

Aurora Regino is suing California's Chico Unified School District because PARENTS have a fundamental right under the Fourteenth Amendment of the United States Constitution... ...to direct the upbringing of their children. Radicals at the California Department of Education think they can get away with what they're doing because they adopted "guidelines" that PROHIBIT schools from notifying parents of gender transitions until the student decides its ok! I can tell you, as long as I'm involved, no California Dept. of Ed "guideline" is going to tell parents how to raise their children! Aurora's daughter was 11-years-old when her guidance counselor convinced her she was a "boy." By law, she wasn't old enough to get a tattoo or get her learner's permit to drive. But the woke radicals at the California Department of Education say 11-year-olds can make life-altering decisions about their gender. And parents need to be kept in the dark. I don't know what's more insane... ...that we're talking about girls being boys or that schools think they should have more control over children than parents do! Our case can stop this madness. Our case MUST stop this madness. But on her own, Aurora Regino would never have the resources to battle the leftist giants in California. Battles like this are why I started the Center for American Liberty. > We bring together attorneys who want to fight for what's right... > > People like Aurora Regino who otherwise would have no choice but to let these elitist radicals steamroll right over her and her daughter... > > And patriots like you who offer whatever financial support you can to fund these freedom-saving cases. | | And our unique strategy is taking down the Left. The Center for American Liberty has already won THREE Supreme Court cases... we've had multiple victories for religious freedom... ...and right now, in addition to Aurora Regino's case concerning parental rights.... ...we're fighting to stop government censorship of conservatives... to get justice for journalist Andy Ngo who was beaten by Antifa thugs while liberal politicians did nothing... ...and we just launched a historic case suing activist doctors who mutilate children with barbaric "transgender" surgeries. The Center for American Liberty is honored to be fighting in the courts to protect your freedom to say what you want, to live according to the dictates of your conscience, and to pass on your values to the next generation. Your generous gift is your direct way to help Aurora Regino -- and all the other patriots whose cases we're working on right now. But I can't wait two weeks, three weeks, or a month to know what resources we have to use. The Left is gathering its army to defeat us. And the giant ACLU has already tried to throw its might behind the radicals at the Chico Unified School District. But because the stakes are so high in this case, I have to mention -- I'm looking for 10 patriots who are able to rush back $1,000 each in the next 48 hours to fund this case as we prepare for oral arguments. Whether you can help with $35, $1,000 or any amount higher or lower, your gift will go far in this battle to beat back the Left. Thank you, my fellow patriot. Some days it seems like the radicals will never stop advancing -- but I know we can bring them to a screeching halt in the courts. Thank you for doing your part. | | Thank you and God Bless, Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO | | | P.S. Time is critical. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 | Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Peter,

I wanted to thank you for the support you showed our campaign throughout May. We had a great fundraising month, and I’m so appreciative of this entire grassroots team for standing with us as we keep building up our campaign ahead of 2024.

Your support is so critical because Republicans have made it clear that they’re targeting our district to try and expand their slim House majority. They already added me to their list of top targets and just launched their first attack against our campaign.

[We won last year thanks to the strength of this grassroots team, and I know it’s that strength that’ll carry us to victory again in 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64173034/409250947/-1979257449?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20230601_TY_eomTY.1.3_0_6MO_sethmagaziner_NA_NA_TY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmU0ZjY5ZC1hYTAwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=datLYsQ7szPJ9NJkUL7OXzeEbrPLIgRPSZAyXlfdiDo=)

Thank you for standing with me in this fight. It’s supporters like you who are the most important members of our team.

Onward,
Seth

_P.S. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, I wanted to thank you for the support you showed our campaign throughout May. We had a great fundraising month, and I’m so appreciative of this entire grassroots team for standing with us as we keep building up our campaign ahead of 2024. Your support is so critical because Republicans have made it clear that they’re targeting our district to try and expand their slim House majority. They already added me to their list of top targets and just launched their first attack against our campaign. = Thank you for standing with me in this fight. It’s supporters like you who are the most important members of our team. Onward, Seth P.S. name: Dan Goldman
subject: Today is the one year anniversary of my campaign for NY-10.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
So much has happened in this past year. |
#
---
Peter, It’s hard to believe, but one year ago today, I announced my campaign for Congress. Together, we have come a long way. I ran because it had become dangerously clear that the attack on the Capitol on January 6th was the beginning, not the end, of Republican attacks on our democracy and our free and fair elections — and that the future of our republic would depend on leaders who’d stand up to extremists to uphold the will of the people. **And thanks to your support, that’s exactly what we’ve done.** When Rep. George Santos colluded with Republican leadership to defraud voters of New York’s 3rd congressional district and secure a GOP House Majority, I immediately got to work holding him accountable. As the Republican-led attack on the right to vote has escalated across the country, I introduced the _Early Voting Act_ to expand access to the ballot box and ensure every American can participate in our democratic process. And as MAGA Republicans have continued to abuse their power to serve as Donald Trump’s taxpayer-funded criminal defense counsel and pursue politically-motivated, sham investigations into Democrats and their families — I’ve stepped up to call out their lies and hypocrisy in front of the American people. Peter, we’ve done all of this while putting the incredible and diverse communities of New York’s 10th Congressional District first — fighting for much-needed repairs and improvements for NYCHA residents; pressing for infrastructure and climate mitigation funding for impacted communities in Manhattan and Brooklyn; and ensuring all New York families and children can thrive with universal access to healthcare, school lunches, paid family and sick leave, and more. **Make no mistake, we still have a great deal of work to do.** Republicans are continuing to restrict and criminalize access to fundamental reproductive healthcare in the post-_Dobbs_ era we’re now living in. The gun violence epidemic is continuing unabated and leaving more death, agony, and grief in its wake. And the American people are quickly losing faith in our Supreme Court as it fails to hold its justices accountable following bombshell reporting alleging massive conflicts of interest. **My message to you today, Peter, is that we’re just getting started.** I’m going to continue fighting relentlessly for the future of our democracy and for a fair and equitable New York for everyone. And with the 2024 election around the corner, I’m going all-in to win back New York for Democrats, flip the House majority, and defend the White House from the eventual far-right GOP nominee. I’m deeply grateful for grassroots supporters like you who helped me get here and who have continued to power our work day in and day out. I’m proud of what this team has accomplished together, and I’m excited for all we have yet to achieve. Yours in this fight, Dan | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64173223/409251307/916043921?refcode=AU_DSG_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20230601_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGJkMmIwZS1hYjAwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jFC1wfLuRES5TOvwa0G592brJlVqp-Mes6b_fv5WOuY=)

New York, NY 10008

body:
| | | I just wanted to make sure you saw this email from my team. Please help if you can? Thank you so much for your support. \- Ted

From: Team CruzTo: All Supporters Date: Wednesday, May 31, 2023Subject: RE: midnight deadline
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Fellow Conservative, Senator Cruz reached out 24 hours ago and asked you to help us meet our crucial end-of-May fundraising goal. We’re following up today to make sure you saw his email and let you know that we’re _still $2,100_ _ short_ of our target. Will you please pitch in a last-minute contribution to help us close the gap? **[Pitch in $5 before the deadline >>](http://trk.tedcruz.-6n7dEo54wzil6Ghjg)** [_**Pitch in $10 before the deadline >>**_](http://trk.tedcruz.) [_**Pitch in $25 before the deadline >>**_](http://trk.tedcruz.) [_**Pitch in $50 before the deadline >>**_](http://trk.tedcruz._N8o9ZGUQ) [_**Pitch in any amount before the deadline >>**_](http://trk.tedcruz.-Ybvlnw4K9WEYw) Senator Cruz is facing a tough reelection battle against far-left extremist Colin Allred who’s guaranteed to raise _**tens of millions of dollars from out-of-state liberals**_. And if we let the Biden Dems flip Texas blue, our chances of taking back the U.S. Senate will be as good as dead. [_**Rush back your best gift to fuel our efforts to DEFEAT Allred and DEFEND the Lone Star State from the Radical Left.**_](http://trk.tedcruz.) Our deadline is midnight tonight – and this is the last chance we’ll have to remind you. So please don’t wait to send your contribution! Thanks in advance for your support, Team Cruz

body:
|
---
| | Celebrating Pride, elections in Virginia, & so much more...→ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64173607/409252783/-1524463920?sourceid=1050143&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTk5ZDZkNi1hYzAwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e0PcejOjn5mH7LXOChFmHLqVhmT8fXtcGDxbkgnHJrU=&emci=0d99d6d6-ac00-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=1999d6d6-ac00-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) **Peter, happy June!**

We're entering summer with a _full slate_ of elections, endorsements, and PRIDE in our work to elect more Democratic pro-choice women. So grab your afternoon cup of coffee, sit back, and catch up on what EMILYs List has in store for June. **[Before we jump in: We're gearing up for a busy month of supporting some *incredible* Democratic pro-choice women. Can we count on you to stand with them? Donate now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64173614/409252790/-1524463920?sourceid=1050143&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTk5ZDZkNi1hYzAwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e0PcejOjn5mH7LXOChFmHLqVhmT8fXtcGDxbkgnHJrU=&emci=0d99d6d6-ac00-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=1999d6d6-ac00-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**

🗳️ **ELECTIONS:** EMILYs List is gearing up for a big month in state legislature elections! On June 20, it's Election Day in Virginia, with primaries for the state Senate and House of Delegates. These elections will be make-or-break in determining the future of abortion access in the South. That's why we've endorsed _22 pro-choice superstars_ , including women like Del. **Danica Roem (VA SD-30)** and **Lashrecse Aird (VA-SD13)**. Together, we can help pro-choice women save abortion access for _millions_.

🏳️🌈 **PRIDE MONTH:** June is also **Pride Month**! EMILYs List is proud to support exceptional LGBTQ+ candidates all across the country. We cannot have a truly representative government until we have true diversity at every level of office. Look for more ways to celebrate + support groundbreaking women with us all month long!

⭐ **ENDORSEMENTS:** We've already rolled out nearly 60 endorsements for incredible Democratic pro-choice women up & down the ballot this cycle and, as always, there are more to come! Whether at the state & local level or on the floor of the House and Senate, securing Democratic pro-choice wins at every level is mission-critical in the fight for reproductive rights. clean_body: | | | Celebrating Pride, elections in Virginia, & so much more...→ Peter, happy June! We're entering summer with a full slate of elections, endorsements, and PRIDE in our work to elect more Democratic pro-choice women. So grab your afternoon cup of coffee, sit back, and catch up on what EMILYs List has in store for June. 🗳️ ELECTIONS: EMILYs List is gearing up for a big month in state legislature elections! On June 20, it's Election Day in Virginia, with primaries for the state Senate and House of Delegates. These elections will be make-or-break in determining the future of abortion access in the South. That's why we've endorsed 22 pro-choice superstars , including women like Del. Danica Roem (VA SD-30) and Lashrecse Aird (VA-SD13). Together, we can help pro-choice women save abortion access for millions. 🏳️🌈 PRIDE MONTH: June is also Pride Month! EMILYs List is proud to support exceptional LGBTQ+ candidates all across the country. We cannot have a truly representative government until we have true diversity at every level of office. Look for more ways to celebrate + support groundbreaking women with us all month long! ⭐ ENDORSEMENTS: We've already rolled out nearly 60 endorsements for incredible Democratic pro-choice women up & down the ballot this cycle and, as always, there are more to come! Whether at the state & local level or on the floor of the House and Senate, securing Democratic pro-choice wins at every level is mission-critical in the fight for reproductive rights. Keep an eye on your inbox to stay up-to-date with our latest endorsements. **June is already shaping up to be a big month, Peter, and it's just getting started! Donate now to help EMILYs List support the Democratic pro-choice candidates protecting abortion access and making history year-round: Talk soon, the EMILYs List Digital team 💙 ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Madeleine Dean
subject: I’m so proud of PA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
That’s right – the new Democratic majority passed long-supported legislation that would make it illegal to discriminate against LGBTQIA+ people in housing, the workplace, and public services. Despite passing committee years ago, the Republican-controlled State House kept the bill from receiving a floor vote. **** First, I want to thank so many of you for supporting our team this week – please know how much your support means to me and our entire team.

It’s officially June – the month that we celebrate LGBTQIA+ Pride Month – and I want to take a moment to recognize the work of my friends in the Pennsylvania House of Representatives.
* _That’s right_ – the new Democratic majority passed long-supported legislation that would make it illegal to discriminate against LGBTQIA+ people in housing, the workplace, and public services. Despite passing committee years ago, the Republican-controlled State House kept the bill from receiving a floor vote.

Meanwhile, **national Republicans have made a clear target out of the LGBTQIA+ community.** Week in and week out, we see state legislatures across the country passing harmful ‘Don’t Say Gay’ laws, banning gender-affirming care and drag performances.

**It is up to us to stand firm in our support of our LGBTQIA+ friends and family.[Will you join me this Pride Month and instantly add your name to support the LGBTQIA+ community?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64173989/409254741/-1029699500?amount=25&refcode=06012023_md_pride_en_1&refcode2=31efc28b-ae00-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWVmYzI4Yi1hZTAwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6su250PxF6TWuYahc4OG7c5Wj1UAd-ItVDAt2rYqodE=)** | | [ **ADD YOUR NAME** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64173993/409254744/-1029699500?amount=25&refcode=06012023_md_pride_en_1&refcode2=31efc28b-ae00-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWVmYzI4Yi1hZTAwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6su250PxF6TWuYahc4OG7c5Wj1UAd-ItVDAt2rYqodE=)

Friend,
President Trump’s town hall with Sean Hannity airs at 9:00 P.M. ET TONIGHT.
Tonight’s town hall is all about listening and speaking to grassroots Republican primary voters like YOU.
So, before the President takes the stage to answer questions from voters and talk about his plans to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN, **we want to show him a special list of grassroots supporters who made a contribution to kick off June.**
The size of your contribution isn’t what matters, but rather to show the sheer number of patriots in our ranks as global special interests try to get away with BUYING the White House in 2024.
_**President Trump would love nothing more than to be able to point to the STRENGTH of our grassroots fundraising during tonight’s town hall.**_
_But, of course, if you can’t donate right now, don’t feel pressured to. President Trump’s goal is to make YOUR life great again. He would never want you to incur a cost that you can’t afford. Very soon, he’ll be back in the White House, and America will come ROARING BACK!_

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: A night that changes your DNA
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
July 2016 was a turning point for me – that’s why I’m running for Congress.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64174980/409257187/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230601ReengagementJuly_DBW_8_logo&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGQ5ZDJkOGItYWYwMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=L9jOPgHl_TjieeFGTG9EecPJcsLSoquK2tlkoUdfBqk=)
_**NOTE: This is a longer email about why I’m running for Congress as a Democrat in TX-32. If you don’t have time to read this message, here’s a link you can use to contribute now:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bw-fr](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64174981/409257188/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230601ReengagementJuly_DBW_8_l1&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGQ5ZDJkOGItYWYwMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=L9jOPgHl_TjieeFGTG9EecPJcsLSoquK2tlkoUdfBqk=)**_

July 7, 2016, was a night that changed my life.

Initially, it was not my shift to work, but a change in the schedule made me the on-call trauma surgeon that evening. A few miles from my trauma center, hundreds of Dallas residents had gathered to peacefully protest the recent deaths of Black men at the hands of law enforcement officers. What should have been a night of unity for our community turned into tragedy when a sniper targeted law enforcement officers providing security for the event. Seven wounded officers were transported to my trauma center – three in critical condition.

The hours that followed were the hardest of my career. Crisis moments are routine in a trauma center, but that particular night created a complexity of emotions I had never before experienced as a trauma surgeon. Our nation was already mourning from a mass shooting in Orlando, then more violence brought that anguish to more families. Our nation was in crisis– a crisis that I was only beginning to understand and one that spurred my decision to pursue change and healing beyond my profession of medicine.

I was unable to save three of the officers brought to our trauma center that night. It is impossible for me to put into words the full weight of the grief, anger, and pain I felt. I was at a crossroads but I chose not to remain resigned to this reality of violence and death. I chose to fight back.

Peter – I have told too many families that they would not see their loved ones alive again as a result of preventable violence. That July 7th, I realized I had the ability to affect change and save lives outside of the walls of the hospital. That was my call to action.

The mayor asked me to Chair the Dallas Citizens Police Review Board to help bridge the gap in trust between our communities and law enforcement. The County Judge asked me to serve as his Special Advisor for Health Equity during the pandemic. Inspired by our success, I went on to work for Speaker Nancy Pelosi and Senator Chris Murphy advising on groundbreaking legislation to promote gun safety, reduce healthcare costs, and bolster our healthcare workforce. From these experiences, I learned the power our lawmakers hold to create life-saving change when we choose action over apathy.

Gun safety, access to affordable healthcare, equitable community resources – these are all factors that we can directly address to save lives. But right now, we have too many leaders in Congress who lack the courage to stand up to special interests and big money and take action. That, too, we can change.

Throughout my career on the frontlines of medicine, I’ve seen too much needless death and suffering. Treating my patients, listening to their stories, and feeling their pain, is my motivation for this journey. My unique perspective on the problems our communities face is what Washington needs, and I’m ready to bring a crucially needed voice to Congress.

[Will you stand with me in this mission to become the newest Texas Democrat and first trauma surgeon in Congress by contributing to my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64174982/409257189/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230601ReengagementJuly_DBW_8_l2&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGQ5ZDJkOGItYWYwMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=L9jOPgHl_TjieeFGTG9EecPJcsLSoquK2tlkoUdfBqk=)
| [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64174983/409257190/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230601ReengagementJuly_DBW_8_b1&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGQ5ZDJkOGItYWYwMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=L9jOPgHl_TjieeFGTG9EecPJcsLSoquK2tlkoUdfBqk=)
---

Together, we can create life-saving change.

Onward,
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64174984/409257191/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230601ReengagementJuly_DBW_8_signoff&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGQ5ZDJkOGItYWYwMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=L9jOPgHl_TjieeFGTG9EecPJcsLSoquK2tlkoUdfBqk=)
Dr. Brian Williams
Dr. Brian Williams is an Air Force Academy graduate, a Harvard-trained surgeon, a former congressional health policy advisor, and a nationally recognized leader at the intersection of public policy and structural racism, gun violence, and health equity. Dr. Williams is ready to bring his years of experience to Congress to fix our broken systems and save lives.

You can support Dr. Williams’ campaign for Texas’ 32nd Congressional District by making a one-time contribution here:
---
[DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64174985/409257192/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230601ReengagementJuly_DBW_8_biobox&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGQ5ZDJkOGItYWYwMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=L9jOPgHl_TjieeFGTG9EecPJcsLSoquK2tlkoUdfBqk=)

name: Rand Paul
subject: Politicians will not save us
body:
The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f39e2491938c44c3865bf2d7c4f64480&_e=IydbssLt4HV8YC5SFjB6nWq2Bk9lQli0oC3GTJ7qE7aAz8eERgXcrOIglXYQaPZkNH43rHtUjxVeEdu5Db_LkrxagMHWv1U3Fn__JtPpnc8v91Au0Nhaok8jcG7WEk4GwgugDdLTOIudMBqWmOfmruxh1xnMc4lKvP3N012XJfhFSNvAUUAXrCrLjquhKTo3VcR3tpg8c-BISM7Qi-mbs8wwRhByceWUVUIkLyGvCZFOOBKZbR3hPvRDamNkgad_bUBOdXOefimcYCZAojhjwXpLcmrje03Q0cDjkmGBEI55wqFzffh4a9nU0u60RHo4)

Friend,

I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal freedoms it upholds. **Do you want to know something important I 've learned? **

Politicians will not save us.

The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. _Politics is downstream from culture_. Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution.

**Which is why I am supporting the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE):** FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility.

In fact, the Foundation for Economic Education has launched "FEE In the Classroom."

It is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teach young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

As thousands of young Americans come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom workshops, their most frequently asked question afterwards is : "_why haven 't I heard these ideas before_?"

You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before: _America 's public schools don't teach our nation's founding principles anymore_. But FEE is changing this--and they are doing it in classrooms and virtual classrooms across the country.

[_**I am PERSONALLY supporting FEE In the Classroom and am asking all of my supporters to contribute or even sponsor a FEE In the Classroom program. Please click here to contribute $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $10. **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f39e2491938c44c3865bf2d7c4f64480&_e=IydbssLt4HV8YC5SFjB6nWq2Bk9lQli0oC3GTJ7qE7aAz8eERgXcrOIglXYQaPZkNH43rHtUjxVeEdu5Db_LkrxagMHWv1U3Fn__JtPpnc8v91Au0Nhaok8jcG7WEk4GwgugDdLTOIudMBqWmOfmruxh1xnMc4lKvP3N012XJfgxlEl5ja_bGvJHTKFjNEPlSwViOfogQlZqsO2V6rAKMOU5EtZsD7EoDxKkUhDP_fvG5UkYv2iaVSHel0QK-4LLhcOm1MCA_pQiTkfLZQey_spkmtxV5MNcP8MHIf1JOlADUfvrpqzDaPb3Ri3KhCE5)

[_**Help more high school and college students learn about free markets, entrepreneurship, and our Founding Principles by supporting FEE In the Classroom!**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f39e2491938c44c3865bf2d7c4f64480&_e=IydbssLt4HV8YC5SFjB6nWq2Bk9lQli0oC3GTJ7qE7aAz8eERgXcrOIglXYQaPZkNH43rHtUjxVeEdu5Db_LkrxagMHWv1U3Fn__JtPpnc8v91Au0Nhaok8jcG7WEk4GwgugDdLTOIudMBqWmOfmruxh1xnMc4lKvP3N012XJfgBZER0iPwN9_5xKegYh_9_9VUrRaZ8IZCURQ56mS8s6BmZmEIVeFlqcgTpu8qrMDfKPRQG_oFp9w7iiRSb0HDZvn00xvkuefhIzfSz5gt6eqJavKDf8MILkGtugnJpYorD61W3WKhax0xdEmnZ7VeK)

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f39e2491938c44c3865bf2d7c4f64480&_e=IydbssLt4HV8YC5SFjB6nWq2Bk9lQli0oC3GTJ7qE7aAz8eERgXcrOIglXYQaPZkNH43rHtUjxVeEdu5Db_LkrxagMHWv1U3Fn__JtPpnc8v91Au0Nhaok8jcG7WEk4GwgugDdLTOIudMBqWmOfmruxh1xnMc4lKvP3N012XJfhNVL8I38xWBpWYgwPakwT4surO7RpK0B3EPZs9_6_4syfaDx80HmSSPPBbqsn9rmtHUFxtKeuk4HmxfnlYMsYg6poteEJPws3_pqG26sDEyeaSOKxda345_v0AfLBkYH3pLoV2e5X0Df5pAEa0_pT0)

**_Let me tell you more about FEE In the Classroom and why you should support this essential program and FEE 's efforts to defeat socialism in the classroom_.**

It's no secret the Radical Left, Cancel Culture, and big government have teamed up to indoctrinate our nation's youth into embracing socialism.

The sad truth is that free market capitalism, the history of our Founding Fathers, entrepreneurship, and are NOT being taught in high schools or college campuses across the country.

FEE's President, Zilvinas Silenas, knows this more than anyone... Zilvinas once lived under the Soviet Union's Communist rule in Lithuania. He's now made it his life's mission to educate young people about the dangers of socialism and how free markets and free people solve problems.

Trust me... if some of my colleagues in the U.S. Senate attended a FEE In the Classroom teaching, we would not be the same mess we are in today.

name: Rep. Eric Swalwell
subject: Paying America's bills
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com/ [https://ericswalwell.com/]
Dear friends,

Last night, I joined 314 of my colleagues in the House of Representatives in supporting the Bipartisan Budget Agreement, put forth by President Biden and House Republican leaders.

I’ll be honest, this was not a perfect deal. But by refusing to raise the debt limit as Congress has done 78 times before, Republicans continued to put our economy at risk, a problem that Democrats were forced to solve.

If you owe money, you need to pay it. And it is Congress’ responsibility to pay our past bills that have come due, while reducing our future deficit, lowering costs, and creating better-paying jobs. Republicans were willing to dine and ditch on the American economy — leaving Social Security and Medicare recipients, and our veterans with the bill. I was not.

Once again, Democrats stepped up for the good of the nation to pass legislation to avert a catastrophic default. For weeks, Speaker McCarthy trashed Democrats and President Biden. But, when the rubber met the road, McCarthy was not able to deliver his end of the deal without relying heavily on Democratic votes.

In doing so, Democrats pushed back on extreme Republican demands to gut Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, veterans’ health care, historic infrastructure investments, and climate protections.

With this vote, the American people saw a sharp contrast in governing styles. Democrats delivered competence while Republicans brought chaos. I promise to continue fighting for hardworking families and ensure a brighter future for all Americans.

Sincerely,

Rep. Eric Swalwell
ericswalwell.com [ericswalwell.com]

Press here to sign up in just two clicks >> [http://go.txting.io/shfylh] Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. name: Katie Porter
subject: Quick update: debt ceiling vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Here's why I voted against it.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=23996%2E3422442%2ECed-64)
Derek, first off, thanks so much for helping us hit our May fundraising goal. Because of grassroots supporters we’re entering the final month of the fundraising quarter in a strong position.
That was welcome news as I boarded an early morning flight from DC to LAX following last night’s vote on the debt ceiling. **I voted no, and I want to quickly explain why:**
The vote wrongly pitted important things against each other: Preventing default and protecting our environment. Both of these things are non-negotiables in my eyes, **but this legislation was filled with giveaways for Big Oil companies.** We can’t give in to polluters whose lobbyists continue to have an outsized influence over our legislation.
The legislation passed in the House with a mix of support from Democrats and Republicans. It will raise the federal debt limit for two years, but Republicans demanded a host of policy changes and spending caps in exchange, and these will have serious consequences for working people, families, and our environment.
I'll always vote to put Californians ahead of giant corporations. Thanks for reading, and thank you for your support!
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. clean_body: Here's why I voted against it. Derek, first off, thanks so much for helping us hit our May fundraising goal. Because of grassroots supporters we’re entering the final month of the fundraising quarter in a strong position. That was welcome news as I boarded an early morning flight from DC to LAX following last night’s vote on the debt ceiling. I voted no, and I want to quickly explain why: The vote wrongly pitted important things against each other: Preventing default and protecting our environment. Both of these things are non-negotiables in my eyes, but this legislation was filled with giveaways for Big Oil companies. We can’t give in to polluters whose lobbyists continue to have an outsized influence over our legislation. The legislation passed in the House with a mix of support from Democrats and Republicans. It will raise the federal debt limit for two years, but Republicans demanded a host of policy changes and spending caps in exchange, and these will have serious consequences for working people, families, and our environment. I'll always vote to put Californians ahead of giant corporations. Thanks for reading, and thank you for your support! Katie Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Why I voted NO
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
MAGA Republicans held the American people hostage in order to exact their political and personal interests at the expense of working people.
#
Peter, last night, I voted NO against the "Fiscal Responsibility Act" and I'm here to tell you why.
During the entire duration of the debt ceiling negotiations, MAGA Republicans held the American people hostage in order to exact their political and personal interests at the expense of working people. **This is not a criticism, it's a fact.**
**When we are elected to office, we take on a moral and ethical obligation to fight for our constituents and their values. That's why I am more than invested in holding bad actors accountable and supporting real solutions that match the urgency of the moment's we're facing daily.**
[**If you're with me, please consider chipping in a donation of any amount to support our movement as we work to amplify legislation that supports us all — not just to the wealthy few.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42306?source=em20230601-2550&t=1&akid=2550%2E420207%2ExlqjzT)
**While the Biden Administration was able to walk back many of the extreme GOP's worst ideas, we should have never even been in this situation to begin with. Due to Republicans' inability to show up for working people and their need to protect the wealthiest individuals and corporations at the expense of the people:**
* Working people and poor people will now be forced to resume crippling student debt payments,
* predominantly Black and Brown women will be kicked off food assistance as they enter their senior years,
* and people everywhere will be forced to live with more environmental injustice.

This was a manufactured crisis created by Republicans that will have very dangerous consequences for our future. It proved to us all that Republicans are willing to ignore the rule of law, ignore our obligations to be our debts, and ignore the needs of our constituents if it fits their political ends.
I know that this is not the way that Congress should do business. And I am determined to rebuild our democracy to be one that values compassion, care, and inclusivity to ensure everyone has a chance to thrive, not just survive. [**If you're with me, please contribute to our movement today to keep up our momentum and continue fighting for our future.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42306?source=em20230601-2550&t=2&akid=2550%2E420207%2ExlqjzT)
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42306?refcode=em20230601-2550&t=21&akid=2550%2E420207%2ExlqjzT)**
Together,
Pramila Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230601-2550-footer&t=22&refcode2=2550_420207_xlqjzT&akid=2550%2E420207%2ExlqjzT)**

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

# "In times of market downturn and economic instability, I turn to the experts at Bishop Gold Group”
---
In the Joe Biden economy, the stock market and inflation have become serious concerns. I’ve begun working with Bishop Gold Group to put my money in a consistent asset, gold and silver.
Bishop Gold Group are trusted experts in the precious metals space, I urge you to call them and find out how they can help you diversify your assets.
If you go to the link: [bishopgoldgroup.com/Sean](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=2b9388b81d&e=f6564bbe3b), they’ll know I sent you.

name: Rand Paul
subject: Politicians will not save us
body:
The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=370e2e1ba9714ad5919d7adc71718e80&_e=NiL0DC7RxCuGOaIy34Gk9BfehQI9mfDE5AqenVwFonbTQjfEuDBXuEUKbYczM9_2ChL7s7bHJ2k4PKkYL4UaAf6NerASYj422dPMoUleg2sCnKlIBomxHeF4bwSdp0qJyzrBDO4sHNh6AF3ziprvpJnGR9bZ5AhAEf7s8nplnjzfQNxWRSEPzeolnUPz7c31Y123jh6rt-NgfW1-PsEUhNXorHkrhu65H49Jr_QnxTrf7ZGC7XCvcrsrG_sdSFV1qhvOecS5bt40e4DMQbT8Z5Ha1BPoSDibLRG8FD1Dc6_IMVyN5MKFPg83EbJ68_Y3)

Friend,

I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal freedoms it upholds. **Do you want to know something important I 've learned? **

Politicians will not save us.

The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. _Politics is downstream from culture_. Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution.

**Which is why I am supporting the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE):** FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility.

In fact, the Foundation for Economic Education has launched "FEE In the Classroom."

It is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teach young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

As thousands of young Americans come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom workshops, their most frequently asked question afterwards is : "_why haven 't I heard these ideas before_?"

You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before: _America 's public schools don't teach our nation's founding principles anymore_. But FEE is changing this--and they are doing it in classrooms and virtual classrooms across the country.

[_**I am PERSONALLY supporting FEE In the Classroom and am asking all of my supporters to contribute or even sponsor a FEE In the Classroom program. Please click here to contribute $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $10. **_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=370e2e1ba9714ad5919d7adc71718e80&_e=NiL0DC7RxCuGOaIy34Gk9BfehQI9mfDE5AqenVwFonbTQjfEuDBXuEUKbYczM9_2ChL7s7bHJ2k4PKkYL4UaAf6NerASYj422dPMoUleg2sCnKlIBomxHeF4bwSdp0qJyzrBDO4sHNh6AF3ziprvpJnGR9bZ5AhAEf7s8nplnjyZa92s9IqzKcCRoV23SWGAHCBwsOBePFZWRXAVHbRLXfM1ME02MKtGMswrfmRrQEfDcG1-WkDXDmmNLDjQ88XCDnuTWJC05y3YRKNby-UCxv5JiSnyYbLzLEPcgNhPKpkNrP15yTQrjk-mKNQPKLLN)

[_**Help more high school and college students learn about free markets, entrepreneurship, and our Founding Principles by supporting FEE In the Classroom!**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=370e2e1ba9714ad5919d7adc71718e80&_e=NiL0DC7RxCuGOaIy34Gk9BfehQI9mfDE5AqenVwFonbTQjfEuDBXuEUKbYczM9_2ChL7s7bHJ2k4PKkYL4UaAf6NerASYj422dPMoUleg2sCnKlIBomxHeF4bwSdp0qJyzrBDO4sHNh6AF3ziprvpJnGR9bZ5AhAEf7s8nplnjxfF53-iLMyGiNKUkd7i-smGZ3HM0BLh1Qr2tMu0IY_cL14t5oOaP-ThK6cNzvsQUKw4MRf8T8DsbCIEk-1GdLvrK_NgRUtwaPFwCXDTsZnryvi5O380NhC9n5jXQh3OcIdaTpDoUzz2BqdEIhKPF9M)

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=370e2e1ba9714ad5919d7adc71718e80&_e=NiL0DC7RxCuGOaIy34Gk9BfehQI9mfDE5AqenVwFonbTQjfEuDBXuEUKbYczM9_2ChL7s7bHJ2k4PKkYL4UaAf6NerASYj422dPMoUleg2sCnKlIBomxHeF4bwSdp0qJyzrBDO4sHNh6AF3ziprvpJnGR9bZ5AhAEf7s8nplnjy2turvM6DNug56I0TlBQIC_t0wTTuqVGBw6lhYzWvd4ZTFDpigGZbiquAlsqIr-In6qNDVpQKCBaxpVNDtGeP-PtzPlJOpJYkfi_SPHgHSnJ9ij3CKFJ0dUM8YrbvAM_0lcG_crbkQmCKJZno_MyXh)

**_Let me tell you more about FEE In the Classroom and why you should support this essential program and FEE 's efforts to defeat socialism in the classroom_.**

It's no secret the Radical Left, Cancel Culture, and big government have teamed up to indoctrinate our nation's youth into embracing socialism.

The sad truth is that free market capitalism, the history of our Founding Fathers, entrepreneurship, and are NOT being taught in high schools or college campuses across the country.

FEE's President, Zilvinas Silenas, knows this more than anyone... Zilvinas once lived under the Soviet Union's Communist rule in Lithuania. He's now made it his life's mission to educate young people about the dangers of socialism and how free markets and free people solve problems.

Trust me... if some of my colleagues in the U.S. Senate attended a FEE In the Classroom teaching, we would not be the same mess we are in today.

**Here is our goal:** I am trying to help FEE raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours to help fund FEE In the Classroom workshops for over 1,000 students. I hope you will consider making a donation of ANY size by using one of the links below:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=370e2e1ba9714ad5919d7adc71718e80&_e=NiL0DC7RxCuGOaIy34Gk9BfehQI9mfDE5AqenVwFonbTQjfEuDBXuEUKbYczM9_2ChL7s7bHJ2k4PKkYL4UaAf6NerASYj422dPMoUleg2sCnKlIBomxHeF4bwSdp0qJyzrBDO4sHNh6AF3ziprvpJQYvODKXtIpLIlC07EnCrUXQGhA-KEe5hq5ESf51fIrz9KymFSxQwvTppamqCS8BK8xLZHZzYxy8pJ4cGS_bPTDXnBqtcUHMuiLso7QKv1ZteH1ivghVy_jUO4e6J8qh4-zPLDrUXN5aPGyT09QM5x4-0-CY0V16Kjzf9Azaqo94mMF4gY6gAUvgM_US1xufw%3D%3D)

Friend, I'm sure you share my frustration with the direction of our country. We cannot count on our government for fiscal restraint, nor our schools or universities for any fair argument for free-market ideas.

[_**Today I invite you to join me, and thousands of other committed Americans, in supporting FEE and contributing to the economic education of the young men and women who will lead our nation tomorrow.**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=370e2e1ba9714ad5919d7adc71718e80&_e=NiL0DC7RxCuGOaIy34Gk9BfehQI9mfDE5AqenVwFonbTQjfEuDBXuEUKbYczM9_2ChL7s7bHJ2k4PKkYL4UaAf6NerASYj422dPMoUleg2sCnKlIBomxHeF4bwSdp0qJyzrBDO4sHNh6AF3ziprvpJnGR9bZ5AhAEf7s8nplnjzRqs7vfHIYeaiZoRfEzsDLL9y_2wobqG_nXGetYoT72mosrSCdi2cyeVmlzZy-_9kXyol7HiR-KvsBwJ2PcIBB0ibzuvEV7lVzWtc9_00aHFo8nh3_kGo8Q_5jHVn_vkWWio-ukAGzvfhsf_4dbdFl)

I hope I can count on your support and see your name on the list of FEE's newest supporters.

Thank you for everything,

Senator Rand Paul

Defend the Constitution

clean_body: The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. Friend, I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal freedoms it upholds. Do you want to know something important I 've learned? Politicians will not save us. The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. Politics is downstream from culture. Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution. Which is why I am supporting the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE): FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility. In fact, the Foundation for Economic Education has launched "FEE In the Classroom." It is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teach young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government. As thousands of young Americans come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom workshops, their most frequently asked question afterwards is : "why haven 't I heard these ideas before?" You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before: America 's public schools don't teach our nation's founding principles anymore. But FEE is changing this--and they are doing it in classrooms and virtual classrooms across the country. Let me tell you more about FEE In the Classroom and why you should support this essential program and FEE 's efforts to defeat socialism in the classroom. It's no secret the Radical Left, Cancel Culture, and big government have teamed up to indoctrinate our nation's youth into embracing socialism. The sad truth is that free market capitalism, the history of our Founding Fathers, entrepreneurship, and are NOT being taught in high schools or college campuses across the country. FEE's President, Zilvinas Silenas, knows this more than anyone... Zilvinas once lived under the Soviet Union's Communist rule in Lithuania. He's now made it his life's mission to educate young people about the dangers of socialism and how free markets and free people solve problems. Trust me... if some of my colleagues in the U.S. Senate attended a FEE In the Classroom teaching, we would not be the same mess we are in today. Here is our goal: I am trying to help FEE raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours to help fund FEE In the Classroom workshops for over 1,000 students. I hope you will consider making a donation of ANY size by using one of the links below: Friend, I'm sure you share my frustration with the direction of our country. We cannot count on our government for fiscal restraint, nor our schools or universities for any fair argument for free-market ideas. I hope I can count on your support and see your name on the list of FEE's newest supporters. Thank you for everything, Senator Rand Paul Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

body:

Peter Willis,

President Biden's debt ceiling deal with a
group of fascist Republicans willing to hold our economy at gunpoint would
fast-track Joe Manchin's dirty deal -- even though it's incredibly
unpopular with everybody except the energy companies who will profit.

The deal also cruelly attacks seniors and our vulnerable neighbors by
making it harder to get food and much more.

Senators Tim Kaine and Jeff Merkley introduced essential amendments to the
deal that would stop Manchin's Dirty Deal and remove other un-American
measures that will hurt our environment and make our neighbors suffer.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8698?t=1010&akid=4338%2E5885482%2EYxtols ]The Senate vote is coming soon, and your Senators need to hear from you
directly. Click here to call and tell them to vote NO on any deal that
doesn’t include the Merkley and Kaine amendments!

Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, Ed Markey and Jeff Merkley are all
speaking out against ramming through a flawed deal without fixing it.

The precedent of allowing economic terrorists to inflict pain on ordinary
Americans by threatening default is very troubling, and we take it as
further confirmation of our disturbing slide into fascism.

That's why we need to stand against these attempts by corporations to use
economic hostage-taking to extract policies that harm our people and have
no popular support. We cannot reward this behavior.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8698?t=1011&akid=4338%2E5885482%2EYxtols ]Call your Senators and tell them to support the Merkley and Kaine
amendments and vote NO on anything but a clean debt ceiling deal.

When we organize, we win.

name: Helen Gym (via Working Families Party)
subject: Thank you for a historic run
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
I wouldn’t have come this far without each and every one of you. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for being a part of this campaign. | | | Peter, **Thank you.** Because of all your support, we ran a bold, visionary campaign for a Mayor’s office that delivers for the people. While we fell short on Election Day, I couldn't be more grateful for and humbled by your encouragement and your generosity. Thanks to you, hundreds of volunteers poured in hundreds of hours knocking on hundreds of thousands of doors. Thousands of supporters gave what they could when they could and made us a truly grassroots-driven campaign. And when the billionaires attacked us, we stuck to our values and knocked more doors, made more calls, and left it all on the field. What we built together was unimaginable eight years ago. Back then, I came onto City Council powered by an emerging movement of grassroots organizations coming together to forever change and influence electoral politics in the city. This campaign was always bigger than an election. It was always about bringing people together around the things that matter most: A safe city for all. The right to fully funded public schools. Dignity at work. Housing as a human right. And a resilient climate forward city. **Our work is not over.** The crises remain, and there is much to do. I know I’ll see you in that work ahead. I wouldn’t have come this far without each and every one of you. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for being a part of this campaign. I’m so humbled by your support, your notes of encouragement, and your passion for a better Philadelphia. I will carry your dedication with me as I continue to work for a more just and equitable city for all of us. With gratitude, Helen [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0z7LbPfEzyUQoTxoFfOCLCVbR0YoP-dpRE5F5UEI-u5cmOklg8WXeoLKVRwR4iDBdnxlGADSjV8-EehFKHdZelMNR_d_RIUHz1R6h2GC2Y5_PxiQtShs0PtYmEkz-2zdqVfILT6zaHc5SSov-NFGbRJfOVE6DuhYg5hlEeLnkURkesfQzY4d5XHERdA4ENcOz8--mODrTHn3q3qoua2pSiG8Vh8Iz9CEBPtlLLAFKrTDKZI9OTPa06yFkXJ51QmCLyy24mdyjFr0vsL1IaZbL58/3wo/MJx9ODjXQIOgeCEjRHl9XQ/h0/sf6hqYJJuLJ7FkCbaqyebuU_xyCb2pxaxh_qI0glg9A)[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhpI1kLPEGRW4KnFarPJtxfN9U9y0YeH5CaLF3DG4soQcpqgimuoLqdPFUzrtd2NJ5ViAXghqRQFecxwYyxvhn-ETnLCq83uvEYfrIXyOXw4FlDDvFcXSNx-9xygia5solqrV9dmeAIL16J-PrSbnwead-eVLLzrDsXzOR5eUbXTvXBLsWWgV4gXPpagvBPQ53bfZdGRuR5MtGdfNg1RgTLnL6QxQdmsIFOJwJXnvtHES9Y7VRcjPYJAhXZ8z6n6wpg/3wo/MJx9ODjXQIOgeCEjRHl9XQ/h1/t6zqxVZy9ac1VW-_KITjiSBnlSZA0w-5gRyclxd1Zy4)[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDE-osrDsyUs4KS0eRiq-k7Q-xOI-kLyL5jO9OnnCBTuKu-KP3TUHhYxFBFLTzPeUJGBEQpzbjaY-hb2pDvjnbUJlMtOu7_2df4P6pFBo3LVOdVQf8XE8G-5bHamJlBHV_9yg86PPwhblc-axgTdFNQdjn5OzEN7UQGtQhnEhET-JCP9DYcbkt1HLBGTAFZm31LUfHE5_MoIrMB2ZGgmbMfp6QlhoYmJvtUZN6G37I9SoN8F8YD0bnIuLA3ts9aXgoylxMfo4zHjNGbBPtVuuilA/3wo/MJx9ODjXQIOgeCEjRHl9XQ/h2/c7dUlSH17XEg5XGKfnBo6jibOrvBY6glVDgEtuJfWfo) Thoughts? name: Virginia Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: 5 seats from flipping »
body:
Our ability to block Gov. Youngkin’s far-right agenda and pass meaningful legislation hinges on electing strong Dems to lead the VA House. We only need to flip a few seats to retake control. | | |
---
| | **Did you see what’s happening in Virginia?** Since taking office, Republican Gov. Glenn Youngkin has created barriers to the ballot box, pushed an extreme abortion ban that threatens doctors with jail time, and proposed a budget that gives the ultra-wealthy massive tax handouts. _It’s absurd!_ _But there’s good news:_ This November, we have a chance to reclaim the Virginia House, defend our Senate majority, and deny Glenn Youngkin any opportunity to jam through his extreme agenda.**The DLCC is the only Democratic party committee committed to getting it done, and our efforts are ramping up quickly. So we’re coming to you directly:** [Losing in Virginia means handing extremists the power to enact their radical vision. When you pitch in $7, your donation immediately powers our work to defeat far-right Republicans in Virginia and nationwide. name: Rachel Patterson, Evergreen Action
subject: Sign on to support cleaner car standards
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN COLLABORATIVE
body:
This is your chance to help clean up our air
| | | | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3139?t=2&akid=13350%2E53494%2Erv9Fla)
---
|
---
| | **Tell EPA: It's Time for Cleaner Car Standards** Cars produce more climate pollution than all other forms of transportation combined. Car pollution is also linked to serious health problems that disproportionately impact communities of color.
**EPA has the chance to change all this.**[**But they need to hear from you, Friend.**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-support-strong-clean-car-standards?source=ema_2023_06_01_clean_car_rules&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_06_01&t=3&akid=13350%2E53494%2Erv9Fla)
---
[TAKE ACTION](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-support-strong-clean-car-standards?source=ema_2023_06_01_clean_car_rules&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_06_01&t=5&akid=13350%2E53494%2Erv9Fla)
---
| | Friend, Transportation is the most climate-polluting sector in the U.S. economy—with gas-guzzling cars accounting for the lion's share of that pollution. And the pollution spewing out of car exhaust pipes isn't just exacerbating climate change. It's also linked to a slew of health problems like asthma, heart and lung disease, and even cancer—**costing the U.S.****_thousands_****of lives each year.** The good news is that EPA has a tool that can turn things around by regulating pollution from cars and other light-duty vehicles. But we need to flood them with comments to make sure it's as strong as possible.
---
[**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-support-strong-clean-car-standards?source=ema_2023_06_01_clean_car_rules&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_06_01&t=7&akid=13350%2E53494%2Erv9Fla)
---
Powerful industry groups with deep pockets are pulling out all the stops to weaken these rules, lobbying the Biden administration and Congress to keep business as usual at the expense of our public health and climate. Now that EPA is accepting public comments on the new standards, **we have a real chance to fight back and ensure the strongest possible version of these rules make it into law.**[**Will you join us by adding your name?**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-support-strong-clean-car-standards?source=ema_2023_06_01_clean_car_rules&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_06_01&t=8&akid=13350%2E53494%2Erv9Fla)
---
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-support-strong-clean-car-standards?source=ema_2023_06_01_clean_car_rules&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_06_01&t=10&akid=13350%2E53494%2Erv9Fla)
---
Thanks for adding your voice today. Rachel PattersonDeputy Policy DirectorEvergreen Collaborative
---
|
---
**P.S. **Ambitious light-duty vehicle standards go hand-in-hand with environmental justice. That's because communities of color and low-income communities, who often live and work near highways or other heavily-trafficked areas, disproportionately bear the brunt of tailpipe pollution and its negative health impacts. **[Submit your comment now to clean up the air families and communities breathe.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-support-strong-clean-car-standards?source=ema_2023_06_01_clean_car_rules&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=100clean&utm_source=email2023_06_01&t=11&akid=13350%2E53494%2Erv9Fla)**
---

body:
Last night, after months of negotiating, the House of Representatives passed the debt ceiling deal struck between Speaker Kevin McCarthy and President Joe Biden. And Lauren Boebert didn’t even cast a vote.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64176348/409261715/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDFmOTc5MC1iNTAwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NLkP3JPQwyFVfYPFUtgodnaeO8yUXtkoptlQ84p-Fis=&emci=1ed802a9-8f00-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=041f9790-b500-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)

Hello,
When I say that my opponent, Lauren Boebert, doesn’t show up for the people of Colorado’s third congressional district, it’s not some figurative statement. Boebert literally doesn’t show up.
**Last night, after months of negotiating, the House of Representatives passed the debt ceiling deal struck between Speaker Kevin McCarthy and President Joe Biden._And Lauren Boebert didn’t even cast a vote._**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64176354/409261720/1610638071?refcode=em20230601pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=041f9790-b500-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDFmOTc5MC1iNTAwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NLkP3JPQwyFVfYPFUtgodnaeO8yUXtkoptlQ84p-Fis=)
Apparently, she was ‘running late.’
What _exactly_ was more important to Representative Boebert than showing up and doing her job? The people of our district deserve an answer.
Was she on yet another fringe podcast, spouting off about some wacky conspiracy theory? Did she lose track of time while asking her corporate PAC donors how she should vote? Or was she just – once again – too busy being focused on Lauren Boebert?
**We came so close to defeating Lauren Boebert last year. After all of the ballots were counted and re-counted, I lost by just 546 votes in what was the closest race in the entire country.**
Now, I’m running again, because it’s time the people of Western and Southern Colorado have a representative who actually shows up and makes the time to represent them.
Lauren Boebert and her Super PACs have already started attacking me with nonsense lies, and I’m sure they’re going to try to make things nasty once again. **We can counter their lies, hold Boebert accountable, and _win_ – but I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to be able to do it:**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more to my campaign right now – whatever amount you can afford today – and help me finally defeat Lauren Boebert once and for all next November?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64176355/409261734/1610638071?refcode=em20230601pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=041f9790-b500-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDFmOTc5MC1iNTAwLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NLkP3JPQwyFVfYPFUtgodnaeO8yUXtkoptlQ84p-Fis=)

There’s only one thing worse than a member of the U.S. House who is more focused on herself than the district.
And that’s a member of the U.S. House who is more focused on herself than the district... and doesn’t bother to show up to vote.
Together, we _will_ send Lauren Boebert packing in 2024.

Peter,

Earlier this week, my team and I reached out to you about our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline.

Thanks to the support of this incredible grassroots team – I'm excited to share that we reached our end-of-month fundraising goal!

**So I'm reaching out personally to thank you, Peter.**

I know we have many tough fights ahead of us, but together, I know we can protect this seat and retake the House majority in 2024.

Thank you again,

Kim
Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64177662/409268915/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjUyODM0YWYtYjgwMC1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bXnlGcnThC3MfPMLecHm7I2TobaR6OzH9OwYVkRaWXc=) Thank you, friend!

**Because of your support, our campaign reached our May fundraising goal. I couldn’t be more grateful for your help.**

I’m so proud of the grassroots campaign we’re running. While other campaigns rely on money from special interests, our campaign is powered by the people, for the people, and I wouldn’t have it any other way.

Meeting our goal means we’re heading into June in a strong position. This is especially important because, at the end of the month, we’ll be up against our next quarterly reporting deadline, the second of our campaign.

You might remember from last quarter that every three months, our campaign is required to publicly report how much we’ve been able to raise to the Federal Election Commission (FEC).

Once our numbers go public, our opponents will use them to size us up and make judgments about where we stand – and strategize about how best to beat us.

**With your incredible support, we’re starting this month off on the right foot.** Your faith in this movement means the world to me, and I look forward to continuing the fight alongside you.

Thanks again,
Laura

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Can we get your input, Peter?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Hi Peter,

As you know, our mission is to transform the Democratic Party by electing
progressive changemakers who champion a justice-centered platform that
delivers for working-class Americans.

And that platform is powered by you — it's of and by the people. That's
why we need your input on the most pressing issues we're facing.
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/survey/jdem-priorities-2023-survey-june?source=em20230601-29230&t=1001&akid=29230%2E1203867%2EPurgHh ]Peter, will
you take a few seconds to complete our June issues survey?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/survey/jdem-priorities-2023-survey-june?source=em20230601-29230&t=1002&akid=29230%2E1203867%2EPurgHh ]Take the Survey »

We hold Democrats accountable to a grassroots platform that hits at the
most critical issues facing regular, everyday people. Our issue platform
challenges the political status quo and translates to concrete and
equitable policies like the Green New Deal and Medicare for All.

Your input matters to us. Hearing which issues you most care about will
help us make critical decisions as we build a path towards electing more
Justice Democrats like Jamaal Bowman, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and Summer
Lee.

Thanks so much for your input,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you're struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1003&akid=29230%2E1203867%2EPurgHh ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1004&akid=29230%2E1203867%2EPurgHh ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230601-29230-footer&t=1005&refcode2=29230_1203867_PurgHh&akid=29230%2E1203867%2EPurgHh

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=29230%2E1203867%2EPurgHh

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

we've been through so much together

Thanks to you and thousands of other committed patriots, I survived a bruising campaign battle with the Left.
