body:
If we give all of our support to the right candidate, we can beat Sherrod Brown and take back the Senate majority – Bernie Moreno is that candidate. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=3911723b67b142298c8eecba5519b6eb&_t=5DIrvFF-LsQ-_6eR7MW8mRDbfP3eWiTTfwJRiDpKfL04Xqlk2ey--nC6-v9CMMQqTkytyPfcdCO2Fuol-zmkarDjMqGKCkEncNYgxOSB88s%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=3911723b67b142298c8eecba5519b6eb&_t=5DIrvFF-LsQ-_6eR7MW8mRDbfP3eWiTTfwJRiDpKfL04Xqlk2ey--nC6-v9CMMQqTkytyPfcdCO2Fuol-zmkarDjMqGKCkEncNYgxOSB88s%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3911723b67b142298c8eecba5519b6eb&_e=sWVhd6WlzT4lKurtbdLa-lV80h9iYufnO_Xo92dG9SlNgbOiOxLI92saR3aXGl6Vw4pgkw3mlVPcde043qhRYdG6Zm4DYX99r-1iyx97UOT3j8gP31ImF0t2JnIDDePlpy_goiCIxKpkI8RxKCh2n_h6CTzOMlOczvs6VxdBpM_g5mIGjlLLdAIu4XSk4avK_C0Iw4Z1KSx8HHIRyeygRyRcQ0LcclwlXDFr-w3rMSwf3jsTr0IkXpyQNfd_NezBBiGelVzCJj_US0gBk9kE8yYKMqrpWpLPXkTZy-oudTHuuHnTO4dDzpmlNnP2MuWF0kEbEDxnDOZFc0pz9rnnAPRWp4uINob2-xrJv0conkCvS-QftJUTDL-xmNaHMJ-2FWxEI6ATe2qe-mzBS1oh2g%3D%3D)

---
Fellow conservative – It's Senator JD Vance, and we need to talk about Ohio and the Senate.

It makes no sense that a red state like Ohio would have a failed leftist insider like Sherrod Brown as a Senator.

Ohio needs outsiders – folks like me and my friend, **Bernie Moreno** – to help take back the Senate majority and undo the damage of the Biden Administration.

**That’s why I’m proud to endorse Bernie Moreno to win Ohio’s other Senate seat in 2024.**

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3911723b67b142298c8eecba5519b6eb&_e=sWVhd6WlzT4lKurtbdLa-lV80h9iYufnO_Xo92dG9SlNgbOiOxLI92saR3aXGl6Vw4pgkw3mlVPcde043qhRYdG6Zm4DYX99r-1iyx97UOT3j8gP31ImF0t2JnIDDePlpy_goiCIxKpkI8RxKCh2n_h6CTzOMlOczvs6VxdBpM_g5mIGjlLLdAIu4XSk4avK_C0Iw4Z1KSx8HHIRyeygRyRcQ0LcclwlXDFr-w3rMSwf3jsTr0IkXpyQNfd_NezBeuAgWlX0eR-U19y5g0qtFlY7uwHbncFVjGa0gZCDIHIe-DwuNdHSEt6B0_7Eq5JqpiIWinRLnmR1_8ZC7eXCHQGu_dvhxQzxMQPMZN1EaFtb8I4-Qwo1-fDq-2qncrMSQiGQjdJNrdxgHAhm_jpNMQ%3D%3D)
Bernie immigrated to the U.S. from Colombia at the age of five. His family believed so strongly in the American dream that they picked up their lives and moved here to start again.

He’s a businessman who has created thousands of jobs in Ohio. He’s an outsider, not a career politician – which means he doesn’t count on millions of dollars in special interest money; he needs the support of grassroots conservatives like you, fellow conservative.

[**Will you join me in supporting Bernie Moreno to flip Ohio’s other Senate seat and win back a GOP Senate majority by contributing to his campaign?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3911723b67b142298c8eecba5519b6eb&_e=sWVhd6WlzT4lKurtbdLa-lV80h9iYufnO_Xo92dG9SlNgbOiOxLI92saR3aXGl6Vw4pgkw3mlVPcde043qhRYdG6Zm4DYX99r-1iyx97UOT3j8gP31ImF0t2JnIDDePlpy_goiCIxKpkI8RxKCh2n_h6CTzOMlOczvs6VxdBpM_g5mIGjlLLdAIu4XSk4avK_C0Iw4Z1KSx8HHIRyeygRyRcQ0LcclwlXDFr-w3rMSwf3jsTr0IkXpyQNfd_NezB2YmTSaOFpaAq4OWjdzgPxhJKSM3CB26ND4zpiLjtH5Hh0FAVe5E__jgXKb2O7cRRbNYy2RzZSvX1YvyStObkcAyYUlt1wM9vZx6bGWghMz3ytoGLCFXioBOb965k6nzpQ8nnoq42Ie9ZdUrbXMqt-w%3D%3D)

[ ** JOIN SEN. VANCE ➞ SUPPORT BERNIE MORENO **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3911723b67b142298c8eecba5519b6eb&_e=sWVhd6WlzT4lKurtbdLa-lV80h9iYufnO_Xo92dG9SlNgbOiOxLI92saR3aXGl6Vw4pgkw3mlVPcde043qhRYdG6Zm4DYX99r-1iyx97UOT3j8gP31ImF0t2JnIDDePlpy_goiCIxKpkI8RxKCh2n_h6CTzOMlOczvs6VxdBpM_g5mIGjlLLdAIu4XSk4avK_C0Iw4Z1KSx8HHIRyeygRyRcQ0LcclwlXDFr-w3rMSwf3jsTr0IkXpyQNfd_NezBnRUxucOBRfztH8hOECIVZ0JESaN8ZYFNTpNXIbQBPiVlzWOk0UkLSG9_fhOJz2ARPLM3dyt4fQTl9QkvMOK-vg9pwbUggYIlsGP2Y5p55geyUhNRgN362epfXzTDEH4LfEdrov0wqeXHYmdDvAHakQ%3D%3D)
Bernie has lived the American Dream and will do whatever it takes to keep it alive. He's fighting against toxic leftist ideology, the Chinese Communist Party, and Mexican drug cartels – whatever it takes to protect our nation.

He's ready to give back to the country that has allowed him so much happiness, freedom, and success.

I'm proud to put my support behind Bernie Moreno, and I'm hoping you will too. [**Will you please join me in helping Bernie flip this seat red by making an investment in his campaign today?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3911723b67b142298c8eecba5519b6eb&_e=sWVhd6WlzT4lKurtbdLa-lV80h9iYufnO_Xo92dG9SlNgbOiOxLI92saR3aXGl6Vw4pgkw3mlVPcde043qhRYdG6Zm4DYX99r-1iyx97UOT3j8gP31ImF0t2JnIDDePlpy_goiCIxKpkI8RxKCh2n_h6CTzOMlOczvs6VxdBpM_g5mIGjlLLdAIu4XSk4avK_C0Iw4Z1KSx8HHIRyeygRyRcQ0LcclwlXDFr-w3rMSwf3jsTr0IkXpyQNfd_NezB0LIdyE_ZzsiGTpfzQgU73Uz_dKUWESylYX-9pyNSOsu8w4IuRVrssz5t40Y9j9p91MXpoZXT32ZsZxPxiBw5uNWUDh68WeJQiUJwoERYJzqQXDFXXHQfChDl4tPAuCEFa9rrybw3hrCW_hpcyFyV0A%3D%3D)

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

Peter,

I wanted to reach out and thank you for your incredible support through the first two weeks since our campaign launch. Thanks to you, we exceeded our launch fundraising goal, and our campaign to flip CA-41 is heading into the summer months in a position of strength.

Before kicking off my second campaign to unseat Ken Calvert, I wasn't sure what to expect. Running for Congress is no easy feat -- especially against an entrenched incumbent. But after seeing the outpouring of support, I knew this decision was the right one.

These past two weeks were a reminder that the people of CA-41 understand what's at stake for our country. From Corona to Lake Elsinore to Menifee, and out east in the Desert communities of Palm Springs, Rancho Mirage, Palm Desert, and more, it’s clear folks are not willing to stand on the sidelines while our values and livelihoods come under threat. Something special is happening in our community, and it's much bigger than just my campaign.

**We're one step closer to meaningful change, and YOU are making this possible. So on behalf of the entire campaign team -- thank you for your continued support!**

Yours,

clean_body: | = Peter, I wanted to reach out and thank you for your incredible support through the first two weeks since our campaign launch. Thanks to you, we exceeded our launch fundraising goal, and our campaign to flip CA-41 is heading into the summer months in a position of strength. Before kicking off my second campaign to unseat Ken Calvert, I wasn't sure what to expect. Running for Congress is no easy feat -- especially against an entrenched incumbent. But after seeing the outpouring of support, I knew this decision was the right one. These past two weeks were a reminder that the people of CA-41 understand what's at stake for our country. From Corona to Lake Elsinore to Menifee, and out east in the Desert communities of Palm Springs, Rancho Mirage, Palm Desert, and more, it’s clear folks are not willing to stand on the sidelines while our values and livelihoods come under threat. Something special is happening in our community, and it's much bigger than just my campaign. We're one step closer to meaningful change, and YOU are making this possible. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Today’s Jeopardy! Question . . .
body:
In 1999, what contestant appeared on Jeopardy!, winning two games for a grand total of $27,000? | | | | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2Fn49jkHk6cQtQB90t3jEzSw%2FQCgY7n0sbOceD9fATu17hg/1/0100018878b5acc5-a0801071-20fa-4f6b-8796-ecc133c805d4-000000/gu3iFStHcY0voMbLvKiHyguRZt4=324) | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2Fn49jkHk6cQtQB90t3jEzSw%2FQCgY7n0sbOceD9fATu17hg/2/0100018878b5acc5-a0801071-20fa-4f6b-8796-ecc133c805d4-000000/DaCi3G6gCVotaDcFb9Mf91E3UmE=324) Dear Friend,

Following up on my coverage of the Soros-tied and Zuckerberg-funded gathering to influence our elections, I was able to track down David Becker, the head of CEIR (Center for Election and Innovation Research) and the founder of ERIC (Electronic Registration Information Center).

Becker's group hosted the recent secretive election conference in Washington, D.C. at the Spy Museum that was filled with crazed Leftists and Trump-hating Republicans. And what did they all have in common?

**The majority of them are elected officials who oversee our elections!**

And they were all brought there by David Becker, the co-founder and Executive Director of CEIR.

What did he have to say when I confronted him?

**[Watch here and be sure to donate to help cover the expenses of my investigative reporting.](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2Fn49jkHk6cQtQB90t3jEzSw%2FQCgY7n0sbOceD9fATu17hg/3/0100018878b5acc5-a0801071-20fa-4f6b-8796-ecc133c805d4-000000/KYtZboQM30NX96aCMTPynx6-OAk=324)**
**[](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2Fn49jkHk6cQtQB90t3jEzSw%2FQCgY7n0sbOceD9fATu17hg/4/0100018878b5acc5-a0801071-20fa-4f6b-8796-ecc133c805d4-000000/olwi8wq-9zUflmkz-TL6sTZIrzw=324)**
But before you go, while I'm no Alex Trebek, I have to ask you my Jeopardy! question:

In 1999, which contestant appeared on Jeopardy!, winning two games for a grand total of $27,000?

Cue music . . .

No clue?

Yeah, I didn't know this either, but it was David Becker, the co-founder of CEIR!

Becker, who appears to have a fixation with fame (you'll see that in my video) also appeared on "Who Wants to be a Millionaire!" in 2001 and won $125,000.

But, that's nothing compared to the $69.5 MILLION in "Zuckerbucks" that he received to influence our elections in 2020. And now, he's trying to do the same thing again in 2024!

**[Watch my latest LOOMERED video and be sure to donate so I can keep confronting corrupt election officials.](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2Fn49jkHk6cQtQB90t3jEzSw%2FQCgY7n0sbOceD9fATu17hg/5/0100018878b5acc5-a0801071-20fa-4f6b-8796-ecc133c805d4-000000/8vSxTmrTXEDqEZYzMJ5WfbvC2ys=324)**

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---

Lake Worth, FL 33460

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: America Is a Christian Nation
body:
Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f204956e4fca4144bf9f7e9a7e7400ea&_e=_7mKAV9bn3pNmtOZZWCURFfCd4xePOXFvOZFp1fqD_s3gzrTBJsOMsa8F6L-aqGVWV851gJwAjrLDW3iWEqVRw6LMpNdhBhfN767-tMr5fqHxgsdTVFaypa7CvBPUtKcv7ooiPOFuXfN-OGniYPI8SeR6JksS5eQ2GUQhFUCZtyO0vlyLai--W7SeIMCGE6_3u07cMXAJxr4Sved1D1KrtZpSno9Y_TSvGYengv99XLnbKqxKDQ8SIU-BPfbWDuC8G6DLIfYivLIctgosrdFtDg3uLHVW942OSAK-5CeS1KKvwG6m0kSZdlkvhonJnVn7zz0Xv9YmDb_XSgl098cOeseWjqnsVLVqyCzuuvm8J21z9ehNn2_3QJw9Uq2OArtlH4E5_yOpVd-0ypakW7zAw%3D%3D)
---
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I've written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you'll appreciate.
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f204956e4fca4144bf9f7e9a7e7400ea&_e=_7mKAV9bn3pNmtOZZWCURFfCd4xePOXFvOZFp1fqD_s3gzrTBJsOMsa8F6L-aqGVWV851gJwAjrLDW3iWEqVRw6LMpNdhBhfN767-tMr5fqHxgsdTVFaypa7CvBPUtKcv7ooiPOFuXfN-OGniYPI8SeR6JksS5eQ2GUQhFUCZtyO0vlyLai--W7SeIMCGE6_3u07cMXAJxr4Sved1D1KrtZpSno9Y_TSvGYengv99XLnbKqxKDQ8SIU-BPfbWDuCVSMfBL83uRjZwlLH9j8XZwI061BeWsL_5kAlTuLo3A7FkuAcD94apoV7btFAE7gRCkJPLNyKzXi5mgxnSVjnZEdZjLd2tSmkuXb2GmKDH7yFsZl6LfPMtxyQ0wHP4o_HXbs1gdqjSZS3TdCEukusHw%3D%3D)
---
| | I would love for you to read this book and discover the truth about our nation's Christian heritage. As a token of appreciation for any gift you can make to Pathway to Victory today, we'll send you a copy of the book. You can secure your copy by donating here: [https://ptv.org/donate/america-is-a-christian-nation-by-dr-robert-jeffress/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f204956e4fca4144bf9f7e9a7e7400ea&_e=_7mKAV9bn3pNmtOZZWCURFfCd4xePOXFvOZFp1fqD_s3gzrTBJsOMsa8F6L-aqGVWV851gJwAjrLDW3iWEqVRw6LMpNdhBhfN767-tMr5fqHxgsdTVFaypa7CvBPUtKcv7ooiPOFuXfN-OGniYPI8SeR6JksS5eQ2GUQhFUCZtyO0vlyLai--W7SeIMCGE6_3u07cMXAJxr4Sved1D1KrtZpSno9Y_TSvGYengv99XLnbKqxKDQ8SIU-BPfbWDuCEU-VLLWU2esLHJcfB0AafZMRLNou7tpfynf2lHv-p0YrlTdtFEDnKp6tQ83TaVjAnRggU0v9niGYlGHMtvNFZmc8uUo5BTvXiKwfkHtu9AUmg7ax9DKTmAkVi_-41Ci2AZ_VlKHkwH3NWyxHe_gTfw%3D%3D)

Your donation will be matched dollar-for-dollar thanks to a $500,000 matching challenge that ends on July 4th.

As believers, we must preserve America's unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. By understanding our nation's Christian roots, we can work to bring our country back to its founding principles. At the end of my book, I provide suggestions for how to do just that.

I hope you'll consider donating to _Pathway to Victory_ and receiving your copy of _America Is a Christian Nation_ so you can know without a doubt that the foundation of our country was solidly established in the principles of the Bible.

Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress

[**June 1, 1789:** The first law passed by the U.S. Congress after the ratification of the Constitution was “An Act to regulate the Time and Manner of administering certain Oaths,” which President George Washington signed into law. The law established an oath of office for members of Congress and other government officials.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8b4668f96ad646eca51361c9fef5951c&_e=0NqY3IMWQtACOv4qdL2tXpHwEXgJW5m4j7oX9eO-nF96qber9nM0HoDIn2m52gleoGylINu5RPVOlb5tutvEd0znxWhQpJLQecv8Fm5pp8JgANvVTq0CF0vhoaD4ORQF6jMcJXKnKCMSWBacN9_UqgpX9oNIINudfwvUIRn8_HZ0tGTcQTDUVsnz75FOUI982F2e8lE8Xqn281NRhSsjneyo8YWvlUmKeX-JGFJKQD-jKJGdvS1wcxeOt1y1znpag1u8GVccpMRRCxj69Wx8TA%3D%3D) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8b4668f96ad646eca51361c9fef5951c&_e=0NqY3IMWQtACOv4qdL2tXpHwEXgJW5m4j7oX9eO-nF96qber9nM0HoDIn2m52gleoGylINu5RPVOlb5tutvEd0znxWhQpJLQecv8Fm5pp8JgANvVTq0CF0vhoaD4ORQFQO_TJJnv8pRz7NNDe4Ijx68f1kkGAW-TSaCLV2x4BZ7wyvuSoUChiMQge6_P2d1xrCVfFSIA0WsEMaTR_vEYtE6G666hSyxoWBOvT1nk618uwVgez5bQ9qQtY6-rZKgUzXAQFjaHuevP-6YgPuH3_Q%3D%3D)**

[**June 1, 1792:** Kentucky became the first state admitted to the Union west of the Appalachian Mountains. It had temporarily been considered a Virginia county but was eventually granted statehood. Many settlers arrived in the area by route of the Wilderness Road through the Cumberland Gap.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8b4668f96ad646eca51361c9fef5951c&_e=0NqY3IMWQtACOv4qdL2tXpHwEXgJW5m4j7oX9eO-nF8Omwf1VS6rFzK_tZVhtAgwxy0f1cs6gB6l6MbKzXi3WljJvBCRhPi9j6ZVLHgzch5Kn7Y1RBBlAtPSnA2pdjOFPz0Fvs50_NpVPNv-JMk0VRawcdRkGHqGl7DbPNKJvngpvXaJM0hs6fNKVBl2xYQ2RH6JU_alb4saxrNxr6AsLLFRyVzIkFhpYoL9X_l54YossJru3DJU2JVjArmWbDiTfjH8es_PPvo-kssM88tSyw%3D%3D) **Source -[history.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8b4668f96ad646eca51361c9fef5951c&_e=0NqY3IMWQtACOv4qdL2tXpHwEXgJW5m4j7oX9eO-nF8Omwf1VS6rFzK_tZVhtAgwxy0f1cs6gB6l6MbKzXi3WljJvBCRhPi9j6ZVLHgzch5Kn7Y1RBBlAtPSnA2pdjOFxqdwWlHGrKIxAUZN_-G4K9pRv38cf-HFE32eR00OT-aQPyvgTdwNza-B3aQvv3UuS9uw3vOltsr4FyXOdiLuNnhBDPMKStAF8UNUY1Q8yI0GQs3GoJ52DyK1yneLN614jVLVBYJ8_YtLarPEivYNPA%3D%3D)**

[**June 1, 1813:** During the War of 1812, Navy Captain James Lawrence was fatally wounded, and he uttered his final command, “Don’t give up the ship.” The phrase was cemented in history when his friend Commodore Oliver Hazard Perry had it sewn onto a flag which he flew above his ship in the ensuing maritime battle. The Navy has made this a rallying cry, song, and motto.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8b4668f96ad646eca51361c9fef5951c&_e=0NqY3IMWQtACOv4qdL2tXpHwEXgJW5m4j7oX9eO-nF-6-Tji_4NAVgYlxjOSKBH-zwer2HMWli0HrExVxi0HVfBH1FwWJjNRmGdy6ng2jrhn5uXemxvhhmUJRvyCLHZH_2Qj9EdwQUiSPafHpr3SpI2bZuLPXwXhHcXXDlVRG3l7RDk8B2-0N7YzDa41nzDeG_hU5-8BngaJTfbQepBmtPndPRuLLEqhRhIaU1uQxxmowvqhVe1YSu_aY2wJFwVk) **Source -[navyonline.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8b4668f96ad646eca51361c9fef5951c&_e=0NqY3IMWQtACOv4qdL2tXpHwEXgJW5m4j7oX9eO-nF-6-Tji_4NAVgYlxjOSKBH-zwer2HMWli0HrExVxi0HVfBH1FwWJjNRmGdy6ng2jriLAl_SHER9ZApF4mwqP7FvdBFaVDuZGb_4AJ0bUEizzgDSvliDUjFhzYJ08fjTsblpo7D8Py6vDzdF30d7Rn0tQE5tSqIED5XWZ3ujgimpk9xvTftu1vSEnEYpkAst8EY0X_yra0nSGZMpTI6ONtuB)**

Hi, Did you see that the U.S. House passed the debt ceiling agreement? It is far from over, and D.C. politicians continue to play partisan games with our country's finances as the default deadline nears. It's ridiculous that it took averting a national crisis, like defaulting on our loans, for both sides to finally work together. In Maryland, former Governor Larry Hogan was able to work with the Democratic majorities to turn a state budget deficit into a surplus and keep spending within their means. Compromise and common ground isn't hard to find with the right leadership. _**If it can happen in DEEP BLUE Maryland... it can happen in D.C.**_ We can do so much better than the current dysfunction in Washington. We can't let the extremes of both sides hold our country hostage. **👉 **[**Please keep up with Governor Hogan and _ An America United _on social media if you agree that it's time to work together and deliver results.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=6bb6b025aa5b48e090dd97b72cb495c6&_e=wk8XteOYc-LneAd0jrieq7IAPSM_-tHtYxasNzecObY8qCd4jlssatMdQGCnaS7Rzg4sgqD_Q0m-saViflq-jlaceFRSTlzAyZw67pCAEwiHjeUfKju0Aqvqk_KHBrP4RIF-es7vSac9A4gsX8KnS9qwFjxTAeCIIndUySOLKI3ndBBBujoxVGAwq5-F99eCtEmpVdF1LWu1ub6hwpwXFQ%3D%3D) Thank you, **Mike S.
**_Digital Director - An America United_

clean_body: | | | Hi, Did you see that the U.S. House passed the debt ceiling agreement? It is far from over, and D.C. politicians continue to play partisan games with our country's finances as the default deadline nears. It's ridiculous that it took averting a national crisis, like defaulting on our loans, for both sides to finally work together. In Maryland, former Governor Larry Hogan was able to work with the Democratic majorities to turn a state budget deficit into a surplus and keep spending within their means. Compromise and common ground isn't hard to find with the right leadership. If it can happen in DEEP BLUE Maryland... it can happen in D.C. We can do so much better than the current dysfunction in Washington. We can't let the extremes of both sides hold our country hostage. 👉 Thank you, Mike S. Digital Director - An America United | | | | | | | | | | Join An America United on social media! | | ---|--- | | | | Contributions to An America United are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

Sorry for the noise 😬

---
| | | | | |
Friend,

Don't panic. The thunderous noise you heard last night was just the applause from Governor DeSantis' campaign event in Cedar Rapids, Iowa.

Whether you live 5 or 500 miles away, Governor DeSantis knows you've felt the effects of an economy careening towards bankruptcy and a border so porous it's offering illegal aliens seemingly unfettered access to our country.

But if you tuned in last night, you'd know that those days are numbered. Under his leadership, **Governor DeSantis has pledged to start making changes on DAY 1. **

If you missed last night's event, don't panic over that either:

The days of ineffective government and a bureaucracy that our Founding Fathers wouldn't even recognize will be coming to a swift end on January 20th, 2025, Friend, and we can't wait.

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4c21ec9a76db49e6a72d71c534a34bd5&_e=3dYQQuy6E3OX90hYyWZCXsPBnSUwzZvegAm1wkwjbd1xnaO8Nwmol1UDZni1HHQeHDEd4GUKHsLHvCSiIyWGQpJetE89xlkTCpaKEn2AhzvLRQI5Miph_E3x7QglpwfOvf_0-xZ0NIYhEKMW0sl461qfa2o9Jm2fRYIjCzIMH4Qgp7H36NziZ6CQs94vfepsWuKE2bXSsSMk-2wS_gqa5ATxKlM4ArhE9zo_06EFFEkkTgFNAb86vcnynyZctzKRpBRKUQf0kgfJgcb-eqQ3uDPTXygiFuzP-_xIWfH64X8KF9EvX56SSRbcqWvfhO7kfDAKBdujtdIsKpeGJ9N5IbuTv3gdAsSQH8e7Bk0BNRPrEWC-_4Ggu1pm9B-oCLc0hIaA13L1ok0AJRBYHBPZfVFRViBmPgX7ABET3yPyawwsNCA5BOlvF7NgozVJgz63)

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

You won’t want to miss it! [**Get your ticket here >>**](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=e75a892fb4&e=b87806bd09)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The truth about America’s Christian heritage
body:
Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=58b72204ea304907ab220d8136c4e029&_e=C-Ai_bmqh64jnH_BJDrsgEElnaDfL00WyqJfJoEtLzUgyEOS6kw9FYAhhlPTWq7HW2_cb3ckaXPTOTtvPdgl96OOc2hm0U6gd5VGTl89l9QrReXb1JP1bGx8CmqBw8bKQxxXlPWVmoi3WYWpEkrpzZnd6MoA6VC3mbCs5qjWVkH29ZjejNgoJNJuGcoDmIUk5tqz2vGUXCTzvi5tap6C7gWqVscFWR9CEngChrepZsOYCkOyj0w18X1D0dJGBqVlKIrJXvahCmw4ULoDao6X64wzyqSbkCm1Nilq5Sex4RaJSxK9PDUgEPCPdgXsWa4u3cNPPZsCR_ISv8umm74jOYBkhiSk5_410gNfQHTQjhIWMTFEwnLuTZ0HDI6hUIjzoHF8vsjU244Thi5PwdKjWQ%3D%3D)
---
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I've written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you'll appreciate.
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=58b72204ea304907ab220d8136c4e029&_e=C-Ai_bmqh64jnH_BJDrsgEElnaDfL00WyqJfJoEtLzUgyEOS6kw9FYAhhlPTWq7HW2_cb3ckaXPTOTtvPdgl96OOc2hm0U6gd5VGTl89l9QrReXb1JP1bGx8CmqBw8bKQxxXlPWVmoi3WYWpEkrpzZnd6MoA6VC3mbCs5qjWVkH29ZjejNgoJNJuGcoDmIUk5tqz2vGUXCTzvi5tap6C7gWqVscFWR9CEngChrepZsOYCkOyj0w18X1D0dJGBqVlQm0wdLsjAmB11YHPjuSzGFFHcfd5c2uITxg8JsjlRmVk-aKpYRzceXCYNJI04_Ym4wLHbtYotaAMCXnbbIUQwSL9MBkm1h9yXoeiqxo2NMlHJdgYYvcpII5l5BHD1Htp2zEJ2qnVl5kdEJDR4Jh-9A%3D%3D)
---
| | I would love for you to read this book and discover the truth about our nation's Christian heritage. As a token of appreciation for any gift you can make to Pathway to Victory today, we'll send you a copy of the book. You can secure your copy by donating here: [https://ptv.org/donate/america-is-a-christian-nation-by-dr-robert-jeffress/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=58b72204ea304907ab220d8136c4e029&_e=C-Ai_bmqh64jnH_BJDrsgEElnaDfL00WyqJfJoEtLzUgyEOS6kw9FYAhhlPTWq7HW2_cb3ckaXPTOTtvPdgl96OOc2hm0U6gd5VGTl89l9QrReXb1JP1bGx8CmqBw8bKQxxXlPWVmoi3WYWpEkrpzZnd6MoA6VC3mbCs5qjWVkH29ZjejNgoJNJuGcoDmIUk5tqz2vGUXCTzvi5tap6C7gWqVscFWR9CEngChrepZsOYCkOyj0w18X1D0dJGBqVl96zxcipIMBllUWnQwdJFYJsa1icwDNv3TfcfHKJXTlgi4yjOKjkBCEDkqXBXbIZu8UeAosNFaKXYBf1Kn3uHScYKwl-G5GuUj8tnWzRQBnczTHFQHZ5j-6c0Jl78KauvYPSeFUC3awQmFlAoqhCing%3D%3D)

clean_body: Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. | | | Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles. I've written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: America Is a Christian Nation. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you'll appreciate. | | I would love for you to read this book and discover the truth about our nation's Christian heritage. As a token of appreciation for any gift you can make to Pathway to Victory today, we'll send you a copy of the book. You can secure your copy by donating here: Your donation will be matched dollar-for-dollar thanks to a $500,000 matching challenge that ends on July 4th. As believers, we must preserve America's unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. By understanding our nation's Christian roots, we can work to bring our country back to its founding principles. At the end of my book, I provide suggestions for how to do just that. I hope you'll consider donating to Pathway to Victory and receiving your copy of America Is a Christian Nation so you can know without a doubt that the foundation of our country was solidly established in the principles of the Bible. Gratefully, Dr. Robert Jeffress Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

I wanted to share some good news and some bad news.

**The Bad News: We fell short of our fundraising goal for May.**

So when we miss our fundraising goals, fewer folks get registered to vote, fewer folks get access to polls, and our candidates lose out on the resources they need to compete. All of which means **_fewer Black Democrats are elected into office._**

In 2023 – when voting rights and reproductive rights are being **_gutted by state legislatures_** and Kevin McCarthy and the House GOP are **_actively trying to strip millions of Black Americans of their healthcare access_** – it’s more important than ever that we hit our goals and help our candidates.

**The Good News: We can make up the difference in June.**

At the end of June we’re facing down a **_HUGE FEC reporting deadline_**. The amount of money we have in the bank is going to determine how much we can get involved in races around the country, and up and down the ballot.

**We’re setting our June goal now, Peter – we need to raise _$80,000_ before the end of the month to help make up the difference from May.** I know that seems like a lot, but that is what it takes to invest early, invest intelligently, and ensure Black Democrats across the country can win.

[Will you be one of the first to chip in $25 or even $10 towards our June fundraising goal? We’re going to need your help to get this done. ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xKsysMWCjOH7z9zOi5HV3cBAQGC3T3h9QR7fW8ucx_b0F3jbQD4EnuN-kT2uvq5Ew_Y94trG1Z9uBvirlFjbpbvhgL6GSmFefNn2MxsaXJfroJ8eYm2LUE0pQsmsX9hfRNt_0a1BC-FCsnM1gHTkIMXtUIt9m7EF1oDLcd5efgZ2Yd19QAisMQ6rU3Tjqw29ZKPExUGgw2ZPuKEi2kV8smTPHUAunW603oQpLwZNKpw4gTaE75NIlUPTR8-ydKC2KWRFMzyg4cbLEV-DpGvX8G-h11mdUW6Qd6mu8IMw1nwIO3evc8hJ0sM_H5hIa47I3EM6ivug5ckuDn2VZYvEzhglNe8ycDNqxY3fH7iQMhPeaLllQWGMg3LXJk1Z3q5nWt8Rx37P_bsHlIU10Ycn93N1f90PpJ3sdHzofc8Ar8F-z3keDjIsxNzxnGme_XrM1g9AnboUELo2Ih1N4ZqYjb/3wo/qCQLCevuSrSdGLMmwCoF6w/h2/jvydw1IHv6txcwV-wY3davATgiweRPtQqlL3mWDU6Dk)
| [START JUNE STRONG](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xKsysMWCjOH7z9zOi5HV3cKgY26wnZoXg2TEM0e7KW7eEhyS8hLfAfHdlmcnGn5LFq9K5-FQNGBwyCjx3czpqOqVVBv6IMFKeYIaB8eMnvZzoLj9LbDetZ31VKVUYUVa3UtwjLXQmhuUmHy4lBvGq7XOObN7s03GG-RgHhG1I50S508FE3ytpLuWY1DlFO6IwLFG-vIUWPL1jBX6FRYdN7cwrcSD2wO4c608B7GMq_DdQLu430ZnNN7-lTOe9vyLBHzQksM_JYkMOUCA_1NWOwFrhxmmsoyHhLFA-1-MtnemtMd0sVCgaKEjfH7MGJ_lmFK9m8r2FmI239YxP50jBWNA7WTGjruvJwW27jeEWtfTOw4nFPY3GA61h4EF2scVliu5Dp4cMED_EEQIE6db_LPZrApPjl2bjjAqmsAvaAI_VymG8IXIzUOTiOvACFGO8Kv51aDQiahuDep5yHqBXh/3wo/qCQLCevuSrSdGLMmwCoF6w/h3/T6-UlUtFxg1ikqClaKCel4g0Od8FGJFE-lmYVoKHc9g)

Thank you again for your continued support of The Collective PAC. Donors like you are critical to achieving our mission, and I can’t wait to see what we accomplish this year with you on our team.

– Quentin

Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

name: DEADLINE TONIGHT (VPP)
subject: We need your help to defeat Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
sounding the alarm
| | **HERE’S THE BAD NEWS:** We’re still $3,518 short of our CRITICAL $15,000 Flip Texas Fund. The MAGA mob is laughing in our faces!

**BUT HERE’S THE WORST NEWS:** If we fall short, we’ll be defenseless in our fight to defeat far-right Republicans like Ted Cruz and save the Senate. _NO!_ [**_Ted Cruz knows his seat is vulnerable — so he’s pulling out all the stops to crush our momentum! name: Lindsey Scholten
subject: Update on the Republican-led walkout
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
| | | Peter, It’s been almost a month since the Republican-led Senate walkout began, threatening to derail many of our legislative priorities and leave billions of dollars of federal funding for implementation of the Inflation Reduction Act on the table. [**We can’t afford to miss this opportunity to fund climate action. Will you make an urgent donation to OLCV today and support our work holding these no show legislators accountable?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64180677/409277225/-1698714710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1ZDdlYTg0LWMyMDAtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tHH9TPUwZ07gdAPW3DCXsnc2BYpufjfimOVF8-g4TaQ=&emci=0c8c17c4-c000-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=85d7ea84-c200-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) Oregon has a once-in-a-generation opportunity right now to receive as much as **$8 billion** in federal funding created by the Inflation Reduction Act–critical funding that will help us reach our climate goals by reducing pollution and accelerating our transition to a clean energy economy. While other states are rushing to pass bills and create programs to invest federal dollars created by this unprecedented opportunity, Oregon Senate Republicans are walking away. We can’t let them get away with this. We are doing everything in our power to hold them accountable and let them know that Oregonians want them to get back to work. [**Will you help by making a donation today? Your contribution will help us keep the pressure up through the rest of the session.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64180678/409277226/-1698714710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1ZDdlYTg0LWMyMDAtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tHH9TPUwZ07gdAPW3DCXsnc2BYpufjfimOVF8-g4TaQ=&emci=0c8c17c4-c000-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=85d7ea84-c200-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) This session, we have worked tirelessly with our partners and climate champions in the Legislature to pass bills that will address our changing climate and protect the health of Oregonians. **One of our biggest priorities–the Resilient, Efficient Buildings package (SB 868-871)–hangs in the balance.** The bills in this package would help the people of Oregon access millions of dollars from the Inflation Reduction Act to transition their homes to clean energy, like heat pumps, for more efficient heating and cooling. This May we saw more days above 90 degrees than ever before and we are entering a summer that threatens to be one of the hottest on record. It’s more important than ever that Oregonians have the ability to effectively cool their homes using clean energy. We won’t sit idly by and watch as Republicans in the Legislature threaten to stop climate action once again. We are doing everything we can, every day, to hold them accountable–through social media campaigns, mobilizing grassroots supporters like you to contact Republican Senators and tell them to get back to work, and working with our coalition partners to keep our priority bills strong. By passing Measure 113 last November, Oregonians made it clear that they don’t support costly walkouts. Let’s not let these no show legislators get away with it again. [Please join us in solidarity by making an urgent donation to OLCV today to support our work.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64180679/409277227/-1698714710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1ZDdlYTg0LWMyMDAtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tHH9TPUwZ07gdAPW3DCXsnc2BYpufjfimOVF8-g4TaQ=&emci=0c8c17c4-c000-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=85d7ea84-c200-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) We can’t do this without you. With gratitude,
Lindsey Scholten
OLCV Interim Executive Director | |
---|---|---

body:

While he has repeatedly lied -- and will no doubt do the same again on _Fox_ tonight -- Donald Trump can’t change the facts about his record. He exploded the deficit with massive tax cuts for the wealthy. He repeatedly tried to cut Medicare and Social Security programs. He has pushed for a national abortion ban. And he incited a violent attack on the U.S. Capitol.

clean_body: We have to build a political movement that is capable of defeating Trump -- and that’ll take each and every Democrat doing their part now. | | | Peter, When Donald Trump joined CNN for a live town hall last month, he spent the hour repeatedly lying about the 2020 election, undermining our democracy, and calling the violent attack on our Capitol “a beautiful day.” It’d be disgusting if it weren’t so dangerous. Now, as the disgraced former president sits down with Fox News’ Sean Hannity today for a town hall, one thing will be certain: Trump is going to attempt to lie his way into the presidency again. There is too much at stake for us to let that happen. Rush a contribution of $25 or more to Joe Biden’s reelection campaign to help fight dangerous lies from MAGA Republicans like Donald Trump: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | While he has repeatedly lied -- and will no doubt do the same again on Fox tonight -- Donald Trump can’t change the facts about his record. He exploded the deficit with massive tax cuts for the wealthy. He repeatedly tried to cut Medicare and Social Security programs. He has pushed for a national abortion ban. And he incited a violent attack on the U.S. Capitol. We have to build a political movement that is capable of defeating MAGA Republicans like Trump -- and that’ll take each and every Democrat doing their part now. \-- Team Biden-Harris

name: Emily Busch
subject: Thank YOU!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey Peter – Happy June! | | | [](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=5c7d1b3a179d4db7bd93b610fab29be2&_e=E4msjsy47W797Th7WKDhVoePO2Avdsq26T-5OZBkxYY8Pim0swa5xrU42inB5yAYBTQfebQaU_DfAztdBKG_SMEZL2CNU22_5fMSJVTZjuBRiP5t4dYf_53JiMP9Zb75orT0YFy2-Mt16Fuxaqk-qgIhxE4zfpw0H-jt09UH5qdb-EZT24qRor65FyvGTWn8X_4Xo4bcGG4LWkjPCKWgAu5LVsRbDNBt-3VBJBGkamaCNDrT9RzXPQTqkBQGbEX2ErBJQs8LsecFAX6ZKnikIi2pVKrLyuPjjk_BZ_UZBtf27JZyrhUpj1waCOYfsG5nkLvPE8nDFsLDY5yR3OHZagLeCFzyAIi5VaE6nPw8QUpvCIBmwCJ6wvstHHUyj3ss46cBfgkjBUwbmwT-2lFk59PKC2cdeCZOQRfvmc1drG8%3D) Hey Peter – Happy June!First of all, I just wanted to express my sincere gratitude to each and every one of you for supporting me in my run for Congress. It’s not easy to just launch a campaign, and it was definitely not a decision made lightly. Our district deserves better leadership, and we all know it. I couldn’t be more thrilled to have you all on board with my campaign! It truly takes a village, and for that I am grateful for the little village we have created so far.Second, we are coming up on the first major deadline of the cycle at the end of this month. On June 30, we have to declare every single penny, nickel, dime, and dollar raised since we launched, and without a doubt the MIGOP and John James will be anxiously waiting to see where we stand.We have to remain stronger than ever this month so we can show John James just how vulnerable he is this year. **[Can you rush in a donation today to start our June off strong?](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=5c7d1b3a179d4db7bd93b610fab29be2&_e=E4msjsy47W797Th7WKDhVoePO2Avdsq26T-5OZBkxYY8Pim0swa5xrU42inB5yAYBTQfebQaU_DfAztdBKG_SMEZL2CNU22_5fMSJVTZjuBRiP5t4dYf_53JiMP9Zb75orT0YFy2-Mt16Fuxaqk-qgIhxE4zfpw0H-jt09UH5qdb-EZT24qRor65FyvGTWn8X_4Xo4bcGG4LWkjPCKWgAu5LVsRbDNBt-3VBJBGkamaCNDrT9RzXPQTqkBQGbEX2ErBJQs8LsecFAX6ZKnikIgDEQnhCO2F62VgGTIpOlJrUKDDBkGj8EsSqHgx-u_eKZoRFbPOAM3qavQsTyUPeLMy9JeCVZoGIfZToLzsE5BzEMMRPuvs-lTtnmQezC5qZvNFRbg3TsZULFgfjAYzBSTIkLNwgsADMODoHWSEfkok%3D)** I cannot wait to get to work with you guys this month, and I cannot wait to see what we can accomplish.All the best,
Emily PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS.

## Please attend a town hall!
The Indiana Black Legislative Caucus and I will be hosting a series of town halls across the state. We'll be reviewing session, discussing the most significant bills that passed, and answering any questions you may have about new legislation, the legislative process, or our communities. The dates and times are below, as well as linked. I hope you'll join us there!
* Indianapolis on June 3, 12-2 p.m. EST @ the Julia Carson Center
* Evansville, June 8, 11 a.m.-1 p.m. CT @ Evansville-Vanderburgh County Library
* South Bend, June 24 12-2 p.m. EST @ UAW Local
* Fort Wayne, July 29, 12-2 p.m. EST @ PFW's Walb Student Union Classic Ballroom
* Gary, August 5, 11 a.m.-1 p.m. CT @ IU Northwest's Bergland Auditorium
* Virtually via Zoom, August 9, 6-8 p.m. EST @ [this link](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDYsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vdXMwNndlYi56b29tLnVzL2ovNTY0MTM2OTU5Mz9wd2Q9YXpaelNubHZRMmt6YWt0UE0wbHZhMmRrTXl0bFFUMDkjc3VjY2VzcyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyMzA2MDEuNzc2MTY2MTEifQ.8xMYiURApB5dMSZc7d95iZbrYic5mWJFCCF5LAxKXvw/s/2950175210/br/204122003315-l)

name: Team AOC
subject: What to know about the debt ceiling bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
About last night.
#
Late last night, the House passed the so-called ‘Fiscal Responsibility Act,’ which includes conservative policies that Kevin McCarthy demanded in exchange for raising the nation’s debt ceiling.
**House Republicans hurt the hungry, our climate, and student loan borrowers — all in the name of so-called ‘fiscal responsibility’ — while absolutely refusing to close any tax loopholes for the rich.** Republicans also refused to walk back any of Donald Trump’s or President Bush’s tax cuts, which cost nearly $10 trillion and include tax breaks on yachts and private jets.1
Congress voted to increase the debt ceiling three times under President Trump without ever demanding any budget or policy concessions **because we know it is deeply dangerous for lawmakers to threaten to crash our economy.** If Congress doesn’t raise the debt ceiling, then we default on our debts — which would crash the stock market and immediately cost millions of jobs.
[Kevin McCarthy held the lives and savings of working people hostage. So Alexandria joined 46 other Democrats and voted NO on this debt ceiling deal. Alexandria stands up to hypocritical policies from Republicans that hurt everyday people. Will you stand with Alexandria and make a $3 contribution today?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230601.KWVWOe&refcode=em20230601-4420-P_FND_EXP_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4420%2E2526796%2EnoTchi)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230601.KWVWOe&refcode=em20230601-4420-P_FND_EXP_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4420%2E2526796%2EnoTchi)**
So what did Republicans ultimately get from this debt ceiling bill?
* **More work requirements for anti-poverty programs.** Research shows that ‘work requirements’ do not increase employment but do increase hunger. Most people on food stamps already are working — those who don’t work largely do not because of mental or physical illness. These requirements just add another layer of paperwork to an already difficult process. The bill specifically increases work requirements for 700,000 participants from 49 to 54 years old.2
* **Fewer environmental protections.** The bill makes it harder for communities to stop proposed fossil fuel pipelines and other pollution near their homes. The bill also allows the Mountain Valley Pipeline to move forward — a 300-mile pipeline for carrying fracked gas from West Virginia to Virginia.3
* **Student loan repayments will begin again.** Starting September 1, 45 million Americans with federal student loans will have to restart payments _even if_ the Supreme Court hasn’t ruled on Biden’s student debt forgiveness program. 90% of people eligible for the President’s student debt relief earn under $75,000 annually. Resuming payments without offering them relief would cause enormous hardship.

[Alexandria is in Congress to fight back against dangerous, extreme hypocrisy that has become all to common place in Washington. She’s fighting to recreate a system that actually works for the people it’s meant to represent. If you can, will you chip in $3 to power her fight? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230601.KWVWOe&refcode=em20230601-4420-P_FND_EXP_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4420%2E2526796%2EnoTchi)
**[Contribute $3 today →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230601.KWVWOe&refcode=em20230601-4420-P_FND_EXP_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4420%2E2526796%2EnoTchi)**
In solidarity,
Team AOC

1 - [**Center for American Progress:** Tax Cuts Are Primarily Responsible for the Increasing Debt Ratio](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/19098?t=23&akid=4420%2E2526796%2EnoTchi)
2 - [**NBC:** Anti-hunger advocates slam the expanded work requirements for SNAP participants in the Biden-McCarthy debt limit deal](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/19099?t=24&akid=4420%2E2526796%2EnoTchi)
3 - [**Grist:** Environmental groups slam ‘poison pills’ in debt ceiling bill](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/19100?t=25&akid=4420%2E2526796%2EnoTchi)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230601?refcode=em20230601-4420-P_FND_EXP_LEG&t=26&refcode2=4420_2526796_noTchi&akid=4420%2E2526796%2EnoTchi)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230601-4420-P_FND_EXP_LEG&t=27&akid=4420%2E2526796%2EnoTchi)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=28&akid=4420%2E2526796%2EnoTchi) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=29&akid=4420%2E2526796%2EnoTchi) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=30&akid=4420%2E2526796%2EnoTchi)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=32&akid=4420%2E2526796%2EnoTchi)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: The remaining 900 Southern Beaufort polar bears could be WIPED OUT by Arctic drilling
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1801140?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | _**Hungry, weak, and alone.**_ A vulnerable polar bear stumbles across the Arctic ice sheet, desperate to find a meal. There is not much land to walk on, a lot less than the week before. At this rate, where will she go to rest, reproduce, eat... **_survive?_** As she climbs onto the next ice patch in continuation of her search, the ice beneath her **CRACKS and CRUMBLES,** forcing her to **collapse and sink** into the water. _Severely malnourished and struggling to stay afloat, she simply doesn’t have the strength to paddle all the way back to land again..._ Friend, polar bears are clinging to survival as you read this. _**Can you imagine a world without these gentle giants?**_ Unfortunately, with the Arctic currently melting _TWICE as fast_ as the rest of the planet,_**it’s a likely reality that polar bears could soon be WIPED OUT.**_ In fact, experts predict that the Arctic region will be **completely ice-free within the next 31 years!** And now, with the Biden administration’s recent approval of new oil and gas drilling in the Arctic, Big Oil has full permission to INCREASE its **environmentally destructive activities** that could be what finally pushes endangered polar bears to _**EXTINCTION.**_ [**Friend, we can still salvage what’s left of the Arctic and save the remaining polar bears from corporate greed -- if we act quickly. Will you speak up NOW to STOP the fossil fuel industry from threatening endangered polar bears before it’s too late?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1801141?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1801142?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
When you picture the Arctic, spans of glistening ice and epic white glaciers are typically what come to mind -- **_not industrial machinery and oil drills._** But these unsightly manmade structures are TAKING OVER this fragile region, generating massive amounts of **harmful noise and air pollution** and dumping**toxic waste** into the water and atmosphere. _And if this new administrative rule is enacted, the destruction of fragile Arctic habitat will only get worse, Friend. _
The U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service has even confirmed that there’s _**95% probability**_ that the increased oil and gas activity under this new rule will cause _**“SERIOUS INJURY OR DEATH”**_ to endangered Southern Beaufort Sea polar bears -- already the **most imperiled** polar bear population in the world with __**ONLY 900**__ of these beloved animals left on the planet.
_**So if FWS is already aware of these risks, then where is the accountability, Friend?**_ How long will we allow the government to give **dirty energy handouts** to the fossil fuel industry at the expense of our Earth?**We urgently need _4,702_ more activists to sign our petition by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to pressure the agency to act. [ADD YOUR NAME NOW: Demand that the FWS reject the expansion of oil and gas drilling in the Arctic! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1801143?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1801142?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Friends of the Earth **

But these unsightly manmade structures are TAKING OVER this fragile region, generating massive amounts of harmful noise and air pollution and dumpingtoxic waste into the water and atmosphere. And if this new administrative rule is enacted, the destruction of fragile Arctic habitat will only get worse, Friend. The U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service has even confirmed that there’s 95% probability that the increased oil and gas activity under this new rule will cause “SERIOUS INJURY OR DEATH” to endangered Southern Beaufort Sea polar bears -- already the most imperiled polar bear population in the world with ONLY 900 of these beloved animals left on the planet. So if FWS is already aware of these risks, then where is the accountability, Friend? How long will we allow the government to give dirty energy handouts to the fossil fuel industry at the expense of our Earth?We urgently need 4,702 more activists to sign our petition by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to pressure the agency to act. == == Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

name: CaucusRoom
subject: All Signs Point to Yes!
body:
What You Need To Know Today! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-aldtjlk-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aldtjlk-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Good Morning and Happy Thursday! Another Republican is[ _jumping into the 2024 race_](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aldtjlk-trhiujldw-y/)!**
**Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aldtjlk-trhiujldw-j/) **All Signs Point to Yes** National Security Council spokesman**[John Kirby was left speechless when questioned by a reporter](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aldtjlk-trhiujldw-t/) **over whether President Biden is "corrupt." **CBP Chief Retires** The**[head of the U.S. Border Patrol is stepping down](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aldtjlk-trhiujldw-i/) **following major changes at the U.S.-Mexico border that came with the end of Title 42 pandemic restrictions. **How is This a Democracy?** Actor James Van Der Beek**[blasted the DNC for planning on foregoing primary debates](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aldtjlk-trhiujldw-d/) **between Biden and other presidential contenders for 2024.

**Bibbidy Bobbidi NO** Disneyland has **[hired a man in a dress](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aldtjlk-trhiujldw-h/)** to greet little girls as they enter the Disney-themed hair salon. _He looks ridiculous and clearly took this job away from a woman._ **Send Biden Back to the Basement** **[Ron DeSantis held his first official presidential campaign event in Iowa](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aldtjlk-trhiujldw-k/), t**elling voters in the early nominating state that the nation is "careening toward bankruptcy". **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aldtjlk-trhiujldw-u/)!**
* Yeah, **[No](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aldtjlk-trhiujldw-o/)**.
* The bible **[says it's true](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aldtjlk-trhiujldw-x/)**.
* My eyes are **[playing tricks on me](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aldtjlk-trhiujldw-m/).**
* AOC is**[big mad](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aldtjlk-trhiujldw-c/).**

[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aldtjlk-trhiujldw-q/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aldtjlk-trhiujldw-a/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aldtjlk-trhiujldw-f/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aldtjlk-trhiujldw-z/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
1100 Johnson Rd #18546Golden, CO 80402 You are receiving this email because you are a valued member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-aldtjlk-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-e) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-u-aldtjlk-trhiujldw-s/)

Thanks to the exceptional efforts of this grassroots team, we surpassed our ambitious May end-of-month fundraising goal.

Look, Republican attacks on our ballot initiative process are a stark reminder of why our fight must continue. Reaching every fundraising target we set fuels our mission to save citizen-led ballot initiatives, defend reproductive freedom, and flip Ohio BLUE.

Ohio is a state brimming with potential, ready to break free from the grasp of Republican politicians who have hindered our progress _for far too long_. As Ohio Democrats, we refuse to let these out-of-touch politicians determine our future.

That's why we remain steadfast in our commitment to championing and safeguarding individual freedoms for all Ohioans. And we can't achieve this vital work without you. Thank you again for all you do to support Ohio Democrats!

Together, we are building a movement that cannot be ignored,

Friend, President Biden has made his 2024 presidential run OFFICIAL!
But friend, here's the issue: With the Electoral College still in place, **Joe Biden could win the popular vote but lose the presidency.**

**Just like Hillary Clinton in 2016.**
None of us want to relive Election Night 2016. And we just can't afford to have history repeat itself, not with everything from reproductive freedom to voting rights to Social Security at stake.
**That's why we're calling for the Electoral College to be abolished, and we're inviting top Democrats like you to add your name to this movement, before it's too late. **

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=65759ed3fa7a4f26be893959b6a11d9a&_e=QAY6ZCW1XLkApkI9aJdH7_4JqqOlDE7TiMMq5MHy3QjRxuWADH6fHRqihwEWkCQEJcqW7cgPtMtFohJVGFhr7mCqIGzvKjh_1Gq2JEjwgGyD8n1SrtGHpCaeBFalRee6gSHovlzc3GPnBnV2gPWzRE2-7g_krcnd4e2orabla_sW8h9Gfbqp_GSL0e7ppEVKmFAOmd57EhKNlhSJnVcDFHiwpSPEMKd88pNj9ucyOtZfbQeLcP4kOuodbyi5PPtFG6dllHo-7jcc5mV9F8aGw2PDMIAETJiupHupGuggHs_Xg1pv0TZUpxrLw8R5Tl4EwjdDqpNgTAPchJxWeo6OSIS1J7Hs5Oa1TAofRnWB2X7PgO00sqGpRADICEMlxrBcJTPs31IJ1XRTSEBKvVUumQ%3D%3D)

Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general).
