clean_body: Sorry for the noise 😬 | | | | | | Friend, Don't panic. The thunderous noise you heard last night was just the applause from Governor DeSantis' campaign event in Cedar Rapids, Iowa. Whether you live 5 or 500 miles away, Governor DeSantis knows you've felt the effects of an economy careening towards bankruptcy and a border so porous it's offering illegal aliens seemingly unfettered access to our country. But if you tuned in last night, you'd know that those days are numbered. Under his leadership, Governor DeSantis has pledged to start making changes on DAY 1. If you missed last night's event, don't panic over that either: | | | On Team DeSantis, we make sure you get the message because we rely on you to spread it. The days of ineffective government and a bureaucracy that our Founding Fathers wouldn't even recognize will be coming to a swift end on January 20th, 2025, Friend, and we can't wait. Our movement is making waves across the nation. Governor DeSantis is asking for your support. Let's get this country back on track. Join Team DeSantis "by becoming a donor today." No gimmicks, no fake matches, and no lies. "Donate today and let's GET THE JOB DONE!" In Freedom, Team DeSantis Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. body:

I need your urgent help to expose the LA Dodgers baseball team for blatantly supporting an anti-Christian hate group. | | | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5f75ec141a284a0fbf4e77b1baff0f80&_e=-QftRJwGJozIeh-AxqiQEUQzhKbVe1wtm1bg6T0Tb_Y51JrovC3X07X2My7uOvmX6W9tsf-Unsx8ZgAmAurDzaBcqkTiRs5ub9KXOt5FWeRswIp6xJUhFnKXfJf5wJWlZMvpAPezeKwtFbrjV54E7HpEj1hxwDWZRv5niDqzopOtrFhzHFLJ9jm-n9esN514LVV86NfDbZ41j7Q98tMcpcq2uEgOT4pcs0ZzGLLxKTdXugNku0WDOYDWrJzfTC7LtlKSmlcxcNqIQeEa4yDX-4fHAnSq71YDvw5uJInkQWZkREs6dPqOQ3OlR2etikaD)
---
| | **I need your urgent help to expose the LA Dodgers baseball team for blatantly supporting an anti-Christian hate group.** The group calls itself the “Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence.” And their motto is “go forth and sin some more.” **The “sisters” are a bunch of men who dress up in sexually explicit and rainbow-colored “nun” clothing with one purpose: ** _To mock Christians. _ Then they perform stunts designed to be as shocking and offensive as possible.
* A “condom savior mass”
* An annual “Jesus in drag” competition
* Pole dancing on a cross
* And much more.

_They even tricked an archbishop into giving them communion, then defiled the Eucharist._ **And the Dodgers are choosing to honor this anti-Christian hate group with their “Community Hero Award” during so-called “Pride month.”**
---
[FIGHT BACK](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5f75ec141a284a0fbf4e77b1baff0f80&_e=-QftRJwGJozIeh-AxqiQEUQzhKbVe1wtm1bg6T0Tb_Y51JrovC3X07X2My7uOvmX6W9tsf-Unsx8ZgAmAurDzaBcqkTiRs5ub9KXOt5FWeRswIp6xJUhFnKXfJf5wJWlZMvpAPezeKwtFbrjV54E7KbHsi5yW1weA8j5PjXbVWjB-QVnvdBbLYcgzTzppnF6ICljeKgeo5jXe2yfz3vX3JRy_FZqYsBEeuMHfWwfPl63nqmJ_chOMvfe4b8k4l1zQHs-xmwTMmU4bWe0dQXZP8CSYf53lU9YlJKbQu9yWNTLzzz3G2eR1mrJqA8eXHIF)
---
It’s vile. It’s disgusting. It’s a blatant attack by a major American corporation on our Lord. _And faithful Christians like you and I must not tolerate this kind of hatred._ ** ****That’s why CatholicVote is raising $1 million to run ads on every Dodgers-linked radio station and TV channel to send a clear message:**** ****Any business that promotes anti-Catholic bigotry WILL suffer the consequences.**
---
[FLOOD THE AIRWAYS!](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5f75ec141a284a0fbf4e77b1baff0f80&_e=-QftRJwGJozIeh-AxqiQEUQzhKbVe1wtm1bg6T0Tb_Y51JrovC3X07X2My7uOvmX6W9tsf-Unsx8ZgAmAurDzaBcqkTiRs5ub9KXOt5FWeRswIp6xJUhFnKXfJf5wJWlZMvpAPezeKwtFbrjV54E7Lftqq4w_c-h2LbJ7Xi2UXWHn6o5KHz5gPla7lHkjB139VEN453G_ul3KHxELNNidbD-Se_pFk0JFXqg9oSWsPYeiU1AAqt3YoOMUxgcuXRjG3V7JKxcTVaOgIuzAIslCLI7Z4wOKLsil50b6N-XFDwY7ba9XtFP__iUxNa6u4ZR)
---
If you’ve been following the news closely, you may have read about CatholicVote’s campaign to ask the Dodgers to remove this anti-Catholic group of fake “sisters” from their celebration. Thanks to our public pressure campaign, thousands of CatholicVote supporters FLOODED Dodger stadium with phone calls. _Within minutes, we filled up their voicemail inboxes._ The Dodgers almost immediately disinvited the “sisters.” A HUGE thank-you to everyone who made those calls! I’m incredibly proud of our CatholicVote family for taking action right away. **But unfortunately****Patriot,****the story doesn’t end there.** As soon as the Dodgers disinvited the “sisters,” the leftwing LGBT movement went crazy. Other gay and transgender groups began to pressure and threaten the Dodgers for daring to cross the LGBT agenda. **Then, the Dodgers**** _re-invited_****the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence back and decided to honor them with the baseball team’s “Community Hero Award.”** They also offered their “sincerest apologies to the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence, members of the LGBTQ+ community and their friends and families.” And they made the decision without even consulting any faithful Christians – people like you and me. _The Christians who the “Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence” target with their hatred in the first place._ It’s shocking, but not surprising. Patriot, this is the state of American culture today. If anyone dares to call a “transgender” person by their biological name or pronoun, they risk being fired by woke corporations. **_But those same woke businesses heap honor on bigots who insult Christians, hate our biblical values, and mock our Lord and Savior._**
---
[DEFEND CHRIST!](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5f75ec141a284a0fbf4e77b1baff0f80&_e=-QftRJwGJozIeh-AxqiQEUQzhKbVe1wtm1bg6T0Tb_Y51JrovC3X07X2My7uOvmX6W9tsf-Unsx8ZgAmAurDzaBcqkTiRs5ub9KXOt5FWeRswIp6xJUhFnKXfJf5wJWlZMvpAPezeKwtFbrjV54E7JdHAlQrxuBC1rCQsROQOFG517IVsWy-XZx7VHkXQN5oEDsMkiHMEv4Ohogkyyqu-m3Jw2bmS13KUXq_SHwk5Z_nPNnEgJW8Jw6EX7QXtlCcq5rzrJtaY9s9yEAY__UBuYDsqymOXJt_RPoOJePrOeijPZaAXX3sEP7z0td_ON6f)
---
As Senator Marco Rubio said last night after the news broke, “Today our great country is controlled by socio-political ruling elites who don’t just tolerate anti-Christian bigotry, they encourage & celebrate it.” He’s spot on, Patriot. One thing is absolutely clear today: **_Hate has a home at Dodger stadium._** **And it’s our job to stand up for the majesty of our Lord and our Church.** For God and for country, Brian BurchPresident, CatholicVote

\------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ P.S. Like I mentioned earlier, we’ve set a goal to raise $1 million to run ads exposing the anti-Christian bigotry of the LA Dodgers and the “Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence.” [**Please click here to donate anything you can spare today.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5f75ec141a284a0fbf4e77b1baff0f80&_e=-QftRJwGJozIeh-AxqiQEUQzhKbVe1wtm1bg6T0Tb_Y51JrovC3X07X2My7uOvmX6W9tsf-Unsx8ZgAmAurDzaBcqkTiRs5ub9KXOt5FWeRswIp6xJUhFnKXfJf5wJWlZMvpAPezeKwtFbrjV54E7BPKKZ2IcSgL6oKGLnVUfRd5nsrJ4MwlPcuLhjQ1xpe1HfSxnSGhnm0T0t87ncJ_ugO1q-n4zp83FrEz-XM44bAtATarpkayH77Qk_8Vl0_S7dLQydpny6wXu1X9mo747oaLMacN_ENCtklMIdlWIGSOGF59PdLLEQuBGBo-O9gF) We didn’t have this in our budget, and we need to raise the money in the next few days. So no matter what you can afford to chip in – please don’t hesitate. The most important thing is time. Thank you in advance, and please keep our work in your prayers.
---

Seeing kids in the hospital with firearm injuries far too often, I’m asking you to help me do something about it. Will you chip in before our deadline to help us continue our advocacy?

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: What this month means to me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=354%2E35263%2EQe1tJw)
Happy Pride Month, Peter! June represents LGBTQ Pride Month, an opportunity to celebrate and honor our magnificent, diverse community. 54 years ago this month, an uprising at the Stonewall Inn in New York City kicked off our modern LGBTQ rights movement. The bravery of those Americans, led by Black and brown trans women, set us on a path of immeasurable progress. We’ve made huge strides since then, Peter. From the recognition of gay marriage by the Supreme Court in the 2015 decision _Obergefell v. Hodges_ to last year’s passage of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , we have fought tirelessly for the LGBTQ community to be treated and respected like every other American. But we still have a long way to go. Republican-led state legislatures across the country continue to pass harmful legislation, especially targeting transgender people and LGBTQ youth. For all the progress we’ve made, far too many political leaders still want to chip away at LGBTQ equality. This Pride Month is a meaningful opportunity for us to celebrate the legacy of those in the LGBTQ community who paved the way for us and to renew our commitment to continue fighting to achieve full equality for everyone in the LGBTQ community. Happy Pride Month, Peter! 🏳️🌈 — Tammy P.S. My finance team let me know that thanks to your support, we met our fundraising goal for May at the eleventh hour. Thank you so much for your help! | [DONATE](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20230601_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=354%2E35263%2EQe1tJw)

clean_body: | Happy Pride Month, Peter! June represents LGBTQ Pride Month, an opportunity to celebrate and honor our magnificent, diverse community. 54 years ago this month, an uprising at the Stonewall Inn in New York City kicked off our modern LGBTQ rights movement. The bravery of those Americans, led by Black and brown trans women, set us on a path of immeasurable progress. We’ve made huge strides since then, Peter. From the recognition of gay marriage by the Supreme Court in the 2015 decision Obergefell v. Hodges to last year’s passage of the Respect for Marriage Act , we have fought tirelessly for the LGBTQ community to be treated and respected like every other American. But we still have a long way to go. Republican-led state legislatures across the country continue to pass harmful legislation, especially targeting transgender people and LGBTQ youth. For all the progress we’ve made, far too many political leaders still want to chip away at LGBTQ equality. This Pride Month is a meaningful opportunity for us to celebrate the legacy of those in the LGBTQ community who paved the way for us and to renew our commitment to continue fighting to achieve full equality for everyone in the LGBTQ community. Happy Pride Month, Peter! 🏳️🌈 — Tammy P.S. My finance team let me know that thanks to your support, we met our fundraising goal for May at the eleventh hour. Thank you so much for your help! | P.O. # I'M RUNNING!
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | “Since my last run for Congress in 2022, I have heard from many working people in my community that they feel like they have nowhere to turn. Our friends and neighbors can’t get access to the healthcare they need, live in daily fear of eviction, and are drowning in student and medical debt while our current congressman is more concerned with going viral on the internet.

“I’m here to show the 42nd District that I understand that the district is larger and more diverse than one community, and it’s time we had a representative in Congress that understood you can’t pick and choose which zip codes you want to represent. Southeast Los Angeles is my home; it’s been my family's home for over forty years. I’m ready to fight for every street and neighborhood in it.”
---
| | |
---
| | I'm jumping back into the fight! As a lifelong resident of CA-42, I'm excited to launch our campaign for Congress.
I wanted to reach out personally because you're an important part of our team. Your support and dedication mean the world to me, and together, we're going to fight for our neighbors who have been left out of the political process.
We are running an unapologetic progressive campaign focused on issues like expanding workers’ rights, canceling all student loan debt, abolishing ICE, and enacting a Green New Deal and Medicare for All.Here's the deal: our campaign is all about shaking things up, challenging the status quo, and fighting for what truly matters.
But here's the thing: campaigns need resources. That's where you come in. By chipping in, no matter the amount, you'll be fueling the engine that drives our campaign.
Your contribution will help us reach more voters, connect with diverse communities, and get our message out there loud and clear.
Let's show the establishment what we're made of.
---

name: Josh Stein
subject: They just banned most abortion care in North Carolina.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
We HAVE to fight back.

| This is it, Peter.

_The General Assembly just pushed through an extremist bill severely restricting abortion care in North Carolina._

Make no mistake, while this legislation may not be a total ban, that is their goal — and if our extremist opponent is elected Governor, that is what they will enact. **Valerie Foushee encouraged me to reach out because she knows you are a strong supporter of women’s reproductive rights, and now is the moment we must all stand united. Peter, our fight just became more important than ever. I’m counting on you to help me defeat Mark Robinson and the anti-abortion GOP, by splitting a donation between Valerie Foushee and my campaign NOW.**

We will not accept cruel restrictions that serve only to endanger patients, hamper providers, and restrict choice.

We WILL NOT go back.

But Peter, the facts are clear: If we lose this critical governor’s race to MAGA extremist Mark Robinson and the legislature remains in the GOP’s grip, they will pass a law saying you can’t have an abortion in North Carolina _for any reason._

**That’s unacceptable. We cannot allow it.

clean_body: We HAVE to fight back. | This is it, Peter. The General Assembly just pushed through an extremist bill severely restricting abortion care in North Carolina. Make no mistake, while this legislation may not be a total ban, that is their goal — and if our extremist opponent is elected Governor, that is what they will enact. Valerie Foushee encouraged me to reach out because she knows you are a strong supporter of women’s reproductive rights, and now is the moment we must all stand united. Peter, our fight just became more important than ever. I’m counting on you to help me defeat Mark Robinson and the anti-abortion GOP, by splitting a donation between Valerie Foushee and my campaign NOW. = Access to reproductive health care is a fundamental right. We will not accept cruel restrictions that serve only to endanger patients, hamper providers, and restrict choice. We WILL NOT go back. But Peter, the facts are clear: If we lose this critical governor’s race to MAGA extremist Mark Robinson and the legislature remains in the GOP’s grip, they will pass a law saying you can’t have an abortion in North Carolina for any reason. That’s unacceptable. We cannot allow it. = | | | = | = | = | = | = I appreciate your strong support, Josh Stein * | | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States | | ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. name: Don Huffines
subject: Yes, Compression Is the Best Form of Tax Relief
body:
All Texas property owners, renters, and businesses deserve property tax relief.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-zjrkrtl-yuddtktydi-p/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjrkrtl-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## Yes, Compression Is the Best Form of Tax Relief
## _" All Texas property owners, renters, and businesses deserve property tax relief."_
[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjrkrtl-yuddtktydi-y/) DALLAS, TX, June 1, 2023 -- The current divide over property taxes is in many ways unnecessary. Conflicts over homestead exemptions, corporate tax abatements, and the property appraisal system would disappear if property taxes were eliminated.The first step in eliminating ALL property taxes is to eliminate school property taxes. If Texas leaders are going to get serious about eliminating our school maintenance and operations property tax (M&O), [**here are five steps they must take to lock the state into a path to accomplish this within eight years:**](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjrkrtl-yuddtktydi-j/)**1\. Limit State Spending Growth: **Limiting state spending growth to no more than 5.9% per biennium (2.9% annually) would provide budget surpluses that could be dedicated to property tax relief.**2\. Freeze School M &O Property Taxes:** Freezing school M&O property tax revenue at the current level stops school districts from undermining efforts to eliminate the M&O tax with constant increases.**3\. Use 90% of Texas ' Budget Surpluses:** Using 90% of state funds budget surpluses will provide enough funds to eliminate the M&O property tax in 8 years (or less).**4\. Require Voter Approval to Exceed the No-New-Revenue Tax Rate:** Cities, counties, and special districts must ask voters for permission to Exceed the No-New-Revenue Tax Rate.**5\. Enshrine Property Tax Relief in the Texas Constitution:** Property tax relief must be made permanent by passing an amendment to the Texas Constitution. [Read Paper](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjrkrtl-yuddtktydi-t/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of **liberty** , **prosperity** , and **virtue** in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.###
### _Help us advance liberty and prosperity in Texas:_
[Donate](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjrkrtl-yuddtktydi-h/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjrkrtl-yuddtktydi-k/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjrkrtl-yuddtktydi-u/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjrkrtl-yuddtktydi-o/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjrkrtl-yuddtktydi-b/) | [ Share ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-fb-zjrkrtl-yuddtktydi-x/) | [ Tweet ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-tw-zjrkrtl-yuddtktydi-f/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-zjrkrtl-l-z)
---|---|---
[www.HuffinesLiberty.com](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zjrkrtl-yuddtktydi-n/)[info@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:info@huffinesliberty.com)
(214) 526-3000 The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization. Contributions are tax-deductible.

Friend,

Don't panic. The thunderous noise you heard last night was just the applause from Governor DeSantis' campaign event in Cedar Rapids, Iowa.

Whether you live 5 or 500 miles away, Governor DeSantis knows you've felt the effects of an economy careening towards bankruptcy and a border so porous it's offering illegal aliens seemingly unfettered access to our country.

But if you tuned in last night, you'd know that those days are numbered. Under his leadership, **Governor DeSantis has pledged to start making changes on DAY 1. **

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=fb8ec009a2424df9a60785ba05b5edf1&_e=pJdggj4oorby4vxDq_znN7NACj7uHsxqhQIA1ZQtdNXOp3q4q8gGOnmSN4aw-eTqwRoIa9_ugHKH8ZAL3leULBAW3RcAOCEjcQtu4I8pd0KytLZOPHSLdVMomP87CZ9-5RDQ3FZWEc1XTunDiIATu3o1jSFkmSGxmIKLj_cWAIFoIJ8m2nEJK2elx7a0xloTmbQFFS-ObVPqMHpQqDvcGM835MtdO2WEDdRoLzrzp1udaS6oVxKswBO8Zwp1-3sLTqTpAkKgQPUKS0n_-GEkoHyBbX_8D2VlvoJKQrUeX44p4hLtJzxf1zxmIpUcS1BedLti8wBXHKIT3Yns6shxaqSPioAWsrp6ld701ruXybaZuPLaDJOQD5QhgL3kkHJk0fYjdtvZRoXnrsuWYkOQawy-ynueqNXKuoN9MAA0w3BscFC2M7anNt__1t9slJFZNB7otv_L24BXRixv2C6qLA%3D%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

clean_body: Sorry for the noise | | | | | | | | | | Friend, Don't panic. The thunderous noise you heard last night was just the applause from Governor DeSantis' campaign event in Cedar Rapids, Iowa. Whether you live 5 or 500 miles away, Governor DeSantis knows you've felt the effects of an economy careening towards bankruptcy and a border so porous it's offering illegal aliens seemingly unfettered access to our country. But if you tuned in last night, you'd know that those days are numbered. Under his leadership, Governor DeSantis has pledged to start making changes on DAY 1. If you missed last night's event, don't panic over that either: | | | On Team DeSantis, we make sure you get the message because we rely on you to spread it. The days of ineffective government and a bureaucracy that our Founding Fathers wouldn't even recognize will be coming to a swift end on January 20th, 2025, friend, and we can't wait. Our movement is making waves across the nation. Governor DeSantis is asking for your support. Let's get this country back on track. Join Team DeSantis "by becoming a donor today." body:
|
---

**_Talking Points Memo:_
Texas GOP Moves To Commandeer Elections In Houston

_“Texas state lawmakers crept closer late Monday night to approving a series of bills aimed at stripping one of the country’s largest cities of the authority to run its own elections.”_** | [Fight Back Nationwide!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64197282/409289367/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230601_FR_6A_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmZGM3MjMxLWQyMDAtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Fd7WaS_ZQeUuMX5WtI75TKZ_zsQj7TCSB7lmKwU8NGQ=)
---
Team, this latest power grab from the Texas GOP is _truly_ unprecedented.

Republicans know they can’t win elections by running on their extreme agenda – voters made that perfectly clear last November when they sent shockwaves across the country by turning out in full force to defeat election-denying and anti-choice candidates.

**But now, Texas Republicans are determined to silence voters’ voices by taking full control over elections in Houston, the state’s largest and most Democratic city.** The Texas legislature has passed legislation that will give the Republican secretary of state veto power over how elections are run in Houston and could even allow state officials to _overturn_ legitimate election results.

**This kind of assault on our elections has no place in our democracy, team. Will you pitch in to help power the NDRC’s work to protect voting rights and more across the country?**

body:
We’ll keep this quick.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=110%2E552475%2EAC6J7J)
Peter, we’ll keep this quick:
Thanks to supporters like you, **we reached our end-of-month fundraising goal before midnight last night**. 🎉
This was a critical step to ensure we have what it takes to re-elect Bob Casey and defend our Senate majority, and we couldn’t be more grateful for this team.
We’ll have more updates soon, but until then — THANK YOU!
Team Casey
P.S. If you didn’t get a chance to show your support for Bob last month, **[pitch in now to be one of our first June donors and ensure we stay in a strong position ahead of the FEC deadline on June 30th.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230601-1?refcode=em20230601-1&refcode2=110_552475_AC6J7J&akid=110%2E552475%2EAC6J7J)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Peter,

Don't panic. The thunderous noise you heard last night was just the applause from Governor DeSantis' campaign event in Cedar Rapids, Iowa.

Whether you live 5 or 500 miles away, Governor DeSantis knows you've felt the effects of an economy careening towards bankruptcy and a border so porous it's offering illegal aliens seemingly unfettered access to our country.

But if you tuned in last night, you'd know that those days are numbered. Under his leadership, **Governor DeSantis has pledged to start making changes on DAY 1. **

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Kim Nguyen
subject: Happy Pride Month!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
| | Happy Pride Month!

I’m so grateful for the support you’ve given my campaign over the last few months as we build up momentum to take on Michelle Steel and her regressive agenda.

Steel’s anti-LGBTQ+ record simply doesn’t reflect the views of our families and communities here in CA-45.

**We believe in true equality for _everyone_ , and we don’t tolerate transphobia, homophobia, or hate in any form.**

Yet, time and time again, Michelle Steel has failed to stand up for the LGBTQ+ community and even refused to commit to protecting gay marriage.

**I want to be 100% clear: I stand firmly with the LGBTQ+ community, and I’m committed to fighting back against hate and discrimination in Congress.**

Pride Month is about taking a stand for our rights, honoring those who fought to secure those rights, and celebrating the many contributions of LGBTQ+ people to our shared history and culture.

I hope you’ll join me in celebrating with pride throughout June!

– Kim

---
|

We believe in true equality for everyone , and we don’t tolerate transphobia, homophobia, or hate in any form. Yet, time and time again, Michelle Steel has failed to stand up for the LGBTQ+ community and even refused to commit to protecting gay marriage. I want to be 100% clear: I stand firmly with the LGBTQ+ community, and I’m committed to fighting back against hate and discrimination in Congress. Pride Month is about taking a stand for our rights, honoring those who fought to secure those rights, and celebrating the many contributions of LGBTQ+ people to our shared history and culture. I hope you’ll join me in celebrating with pride throughout June! – Kim | | | = | Democrat Kim Bernice Nguyen is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation.** The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. At just 25, she became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council. Now, she's running for Congress to reduce prescription drug costs, increase housing affordability, invest in working families, and strengthen our democracy. | Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress Kim Nguyen for Congress 3843 S. Bristol St #604 Santa Ana, CA 92704 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: Do you remember the Tennessee Three?
body:
It’s clear: Republicans will stop at nothing to keep their buddies in the gun lobby happy. With your help, we can equip Dems with the resources they need to defeat the GOP and win across the country. | | |

| | Here’s an update on the situation in Tennessee: **FIRST:** TN House Republicans voted to expel Democratic state Reps. Justin Jones and Justin Pearson for joining student-led, peaceful protests in support of gun violence prevention. **THEN:** Democrats nationwide denounced the GOP’s actions. President Biden called the expulsion _shocking and undemocratic._ President Obama said it _added to an erosion of civility and democratic norms._ **NOW: Special election dates have officially been set in Tennessee – and we need Reps. It’s clear: The Republican Party will stop at _nothing_ – including silencing their political opposition – to hinder our progress, maintain the status quo, and keep their buddies in the gun lobby happy.
But with your help, we can equip Democratic candidates with the resources they need to overcome these challenges and win across the country. Together, we will build a brighter future for all.
[Make your first donation of the year right now: Your immediate contribution of $7 or $25 will directly support things like grassroots organizing, voter outreach, candidate recruitment efforts, and more in states like Tennessee.](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURt3B-Jxc4nNvF-EVj5ZQXouTGNU81r8Pai2xmdmEl-BHhCCUTDbFgqiQ9GWvqKIW1ZLiR36yes2911jBQdE8GS-jhp-rafF3FbfJlT4mhjfaHHUAiuR9DjaB69OYf-HExFE92yj97KrlOR_ut1t_cpNbQ9RoY-71FBwTLYw5IpWQ2Mg0FE8_KV60Ymrg_eOp1BxJx55WCpK8hPwitdUAqpi-kd2_EG_D4vFeI2PzG3pZOJQimPjcff-BortbbaNBs8OAihIZkwwrU5oaB5GVJTg35tH1yu9vt7YJ2rtOl778N2PrGHs0ZpxNnPE2_u0fRwxYtUUvh9Iw_OuuzCRzY6gXrqZumTX8xKuDil4EVqsow4fWQAY1Vmy8pbOEYRrsj2/3wo/07FWGZTbR9KTp-pxdR4jCA/h6/keXYZJ4vDP_PahA6PAYBCa6exMJ24fBNtgCadSRsS8c)
These special elections are an opportunity for grassroots supporters like yourself to support the DLCC, the organization at the forefront of electing Democrats like Reps. Jones and Pearson to state legislatures. **Your contribution will bolster our efforts in states like Tennessee and help fight for progressive values nationwide.**
Thank you for your unwavering commitment to building a better America. Your support makes all the difference.
With gratitude,
Team DLCC
P.S. Don't miss this opportunity! By making a donation today, you'll not only help elect Democrats in places like Tennessee but also contribute to our national efforts to strengthen Democratic power at the state level. clean_body: It’s clear: Republicans will stop at nothing to keep their buddies in the gun lobby happy. With your help, we can equip Dems with the resources they need to defeat the GOP and win across the country. | | | | | Here’s an update on the situation in Tennessee: FIRST: TN House Republicans voted to expel Democratic state Reps. Justin Jones and Justin Pearson for joining student-led, peaceful protests in support of gun violence prevention. THEN: Democrats nationwide denounced the GOP’s actions. President Biden called the expulsion shocking and undemocratic. President Obama said it added to an erosion of civility and democratic norms. NOW: Special election dates have officially been set in Tennessee – and we need Reps. Jones and Pearson to know that we have their backs as they run for their original seats. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | It’s clear: The Republican Party will stop at nothing – including silencing their political opposition – to hinder our progress, maintain the status quo, and keep their buddies in the gun lobby happy. But with your help, we can equip Democratic candidates with the resources they need to overcome these challenges and win across the country. Together, we will build a brighter future for all. These special elections are an opportunity for grassroots supporters like yourself to support the DLCC, the organization at the forefront of electing Democrats like Reps. Jones and Pearson to state legislatures. Your contribution will bolster our efforts in states like Tennessee and help fight for progressive values nationwide. Thank you for your unwavering commitment to building a better America. Your support makes all the difference. With gratitude, Team DLCC P.S. Don't miss this opportunity! By making a donation today, you'll not only help elect Democrats in places like Tennessee but also contribute to our national efforts to strengthen Democratic power at the state level. | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states.
